The coffee itself was exquisite, perfectly brewed, and served with a touch of class that matches the grandeur of the surroundings. Every sip was a reminder of why this place has stood the test of time—it's not just a café; it's a destination that offers a unique blend of history, elegance, and culinary delight

Whether you're a local or a visitor, The Tea Room in the Block Arcade is a must-visit. It’s more than just a place to enjoy a coffee; it’s an experience steeped in history and tradition, offering a taste of Melbourne’s past in the most extraordinary way.

Name: Tea&Sympathy
Author: Chris Mouratidis
Review: I’m a repeat customer who has been impressed by the high quality teas on offer at a reasonable price. I really like the herbal and green teas on offer. The teas I’ve tried are so fresh you really notice the difference.

Name: Tea&Sympathy
Author: Martin Griffith
Review: An excellent range of teas chosen with care. Excellent service and good prices. If you are looking for quality Teas, this should be your first stop.

Name: Tea&Sympathy
Author: Jarrod Glasunow
Review: Amazing teas and great service. Highly recommend A+++

Name: St. Julien Tea House
Author: Julie Dunn
Review: I can not rate this gorgeous place highly enough! Taken here for a High Tea for my birthday.  Exceptional service, delicious food and a delightful ambience. Something to look at in every corner. Pretty and quaint. Unlimited coffee and beautiful teas of all kinds. Highly recommend for a special occasion or just a tea and a scone! Definitely won't disappoint. Thank you to the ladies of St Juliens tea house. A birthday to remember ❤️

Name: St. Julien Tea House
Author: Lullabye Behrendt
Review:
What a gorgeous little place for afternoon tea tucked away in Surrey Hills.
The various blends all look and smell delicious however ‘Tease Me’ was a true winner for me with the smooth camomile complimenting the lavender perfectly.
Don’t miss out on the savoury menu either, the soup of the day was a Creamy Mushroom that was to die for, creamy and herby served on fabulous sourdough.
My friend ordered the Mushroom Crouque Monsieur which was perfectly flaky and cheesy with a bright fresh salad to accompany.
Incredible customer service from start to finish I couldn’t recommend this place more ❤️

Name: St. Julien Tea House
Author: Andrew Bartram
Review:
Overall Experience: St. Julien Tea House offers a very pleasant experience, making it an ideal spot for a relaxed morning or afternoon. The ambience is charming, with a cosy, welcoming atmosphere that’s perfect for enjoying a leisurely breakfast or afternoon tea.

Food & Drink: The scones are absolutely delicious—light, fluffy, and served with fresh cream and jam. The tea selection is impressive, with a variety of blends that are beautifully presented and brewed to perfection. I particularly enjoyed their tea, which had a wonderful aroma and flavour.

Service: The service here is top-notch. The staff are attentive without being intrusive, always ensuring that your tea is perfectly steeped and your cup never runs dry. They’re also knowledgeable about the menu and happy to make recommendations.

Atmosphere: The tea house has a delightful, tranquil atmosphere, with elegant decor that makes you feel like you’re stepping into a different era. The seating is comfortable, and the soft background music adds to the relaxing environment.

Name: St. Julien Tea House
Author: Lois Ferne
Review: What a lovely cafe , absolutely delicious scones freshly baked straight from the oven . They were really good !! We all had coffee and it was great , next time we will try the huge selection of teas . Definitely an excellent place for morning tea or lunch 😊

Name: St. Julien Tea House
Author: Andrea Beres
Review:
Dearest Bethel and Bethan
Thankyou for an amazing 89th birthday high tea for my mum and family. All the amazing service, extras and quality did not go unnoticed… we will certainly return again and recommend your business highly. It’s hard to achieve the quality of food and service and and you exceed all expectations xxxx

Name: Collins Coffee House
Author: Ayase Melbourne
Review:
An elegant hidden gem tea room in Melbourne CBD! The vintage vibes of the historical building, unique teacups and furniture collected by the owners create a beautiful setting, paired with an amazing menu that leaves you spoilt for choice!

Featured in video
Traditional high tea ($75pp)
This set features various savoury sandwiches, fresh scones and sweet cakes, with a choice of coffee or a pot of tea. I liked the sweet peach and strawberry guava tea.

The scone were freshly baked and fluffy, paired well with the raspberry jam and cream.

Savoury menu includes tarts with caramelized onion and feta, pumpkin and sage. I loved their refreshing classic cucumber and cream cheese sandwich!

The sweet menu was right out of a fairytale! With adorable plating and amazing flavours! My favourite was the lemon tea cake! The white chocolate matcha cake had a mild matcha taste, and well balanced sweetness.

I've actually been there a few times before just for takeaway coffee and have been meaning to try their afternoon tea!

It was a nice experience and I would be back soon! This set is more expensive, but it's perfect for a special occasion, or a nice day out with just because flowers 🩷

Name: Collins Coffee House
Author: Courtney Gabb
Review: We hosted Mums 60th last week and what an amazing afternoon we had. The food was delicious, the service was fantastic and building and way they’ve decorated the store is stunning. Would highly recommend coming here to enjoy your next High Tea.

Name: Collins Coffee House
Author: Anima Sola
Review: Have attended Saturday high tea which was made extra special thanks to a violinist performance. Amazing atmosphere and the selection of savoury and sweet items was great.

Name: Collins Coffee House
Author: Mandie L.
Review: My friends and I had a wonderful high tea experience here. Their scones were to die for! I wonder what they put in their jam, because it was so addictive. The teas and mocktails here tasted beautiful as well. Great customer service :-)

Name: Collins Coffee House
Author: Enny Benzonelli
Review: I had been wanting to visit Collin’s Coffee House for a while, and I finally made it. Lucky for me, I got a table without booking. The service was great, and I felt pampered during my short stay. The scones were lovely, the whipped cream was amazing, and the raspberry jam was just delicious. The chai tea was a great blend too. I will come back for the high tea experience but need to bring some friends, as it seems like a better experience if done in a group.

Name: Ceylon Tea House Dine in Takeaway
Author: Bibin Thomas
Review: Ceylon Tea House is a good place for those seeking a taste of Sri Lankan culinary delights. From the moment you step inside, the warm ambiance and friendly service transport you to a world of vibrant flavors and exotic aromas. The menu boasts a diverse selection of authentic dishes, each prepared with fresh, high-quality ingredients. Whether you're a seasoned foodie or simply curious to explore new culinary territory, Ceylon Tea House has something to tantalize your taste buds. They have buffets on every Friday evening. Recommending this place for visiting with family and friends 😊.

Name: Ceylon Tea House Dine in Takeaway
Author: Jathu Sabesan
Review:
I ordered takeaway on Tuesday, and everything was perfectly fine. However, when I ordered again on Thursday, the food was completely different from what I received on Tuesday and taste was very bad. After eating the meal, I also experienced food poisoning.
Food on Tuesday-one rotting kothu and one string hopper kothu
Food on Thursday- two chicken kottu rotti

@ceylon Tea house, don’t jump into the people straightaway.

Name: Ceylon Tea House Dine in Takeaway
Author: Sanjeeva C
Review: One of the best Sri Lankan restaurants in the area. We enjoyed the buffet last Friday and it was awesome. Service and the environment were welcoming and had a wonderful night. We'll go back again.

Name: Ceylon Tea House Dine in Takeaway
Author: Sue Ratnayake
Review: Best Sri Lankan FOOD. Had my daughter's birth day party there, it was awesome. They've got some fantastic buffet menus you can choose from to suit any occasion.  Owners are super flexible and friendly, so you can negotiate what you want and how things need to be done. Great place to celebrate Birthdays.

Name: Ceylon Tea House Dine in Takeaway
Author: JK STREAM
Review:
My suggestion to the people who ever buying food anywhere..
Just look the food guys before buy or takeaway..

If say mixed Fried rice or Seafood Fried rice or Chicken Fried rice they have to put seafood or chicken pieces in there right they shouldn’t serve just plan rice.

I am DISAPPOINTED.
To Shop owner please 🙏 take this note and maintain your services.

Name: Olinda Tea House & Restaurant
Author: Wilfred Edmund Lee
Review: We came here for lunch. Ordered few dishes including dessert. The food was great - especially the flavour and they used a quality products and ingredients. We enjoyed the food and also the atmosphere. The price was a bit high but acceptable in my opinion.

Name: Olinda Tea House & Restaurant
Author: Douglas Aberdeen
Review: Pleasant Chinese food, especially the dumplings, but not quite 5 star worthy. The building and gardens are really nice. A great wedding or function venue. The high tea looked nice as well. Service was prompt and tea refills were plentiful, as they should be. We sat near the gas fireplace which was a bonus. Save some time for a look around. Reservations recommended for weekend lunch.

Name: Olinda Tea House & Restaurant
Author: Fooodnom
Review:
I think I’ve found the prettiest restaurant in Melbourne! Nestled in the heart of the stunning Dandenong Ranges, this contemporary modern Asian fusion spot offers lunch and dinner and is famous for its signature High Tea. Surrounded by 17 acres of mountain ash forests and historic flower gardens, it’s the perfect place to unwind.

We opted for the à la carte menu this time, and the dining experience was truly exceptional. The portion sizes were top-notch. The crispy fried chicken with peanut and chili was incredible—perfectly spicy and incredibly crispy. The pan-fried honey soy eye fillet cubes were tender and juicy, making each bite delightful.

Their desserts were equally impressive. The piggy cake was particularly charming—adorable and not overly sweet. Everything was a 10/10.

Plus, they have alpacas, and the scenery is absolutely breathtaking.

Name: Olinda Tea House & Restaurant
Author: Raman Singh
Review:
This is a hidden gem. Well not so hidden. The seating space outside is so serene. On a slightly better day with little less chilly weather you can sit outside with the fire pit and you will have time of your life. Plenty of seating space inside as well.
The food is exquisite. The sweet piggies taste as good as it looks. The dirty chai is one of the best I have ever had. The menu consists of a large variety of food.
The service is excellent. Staff is super friendly and courteous.
Plenty of parking available.

Name: Olinda Tea House & Restaurant
Author: jackson sullivan
Review: Olinda Tea House is a fantastic restaurant, you’re surrounded by forests and greenery. The food is delicious, and the environment adds to the overall dining experience. It's a great place to relax and enjoy a meal in a peaceful, natural setting.

Name: Oriental Teahouse Brunswick
Author: Kim Rushbrooke
Review: OTH catered my son's 21st. First time using their services and they definitely have return business from me! Their dumpling range for catered services is "to die for". Our guest could not stop saying how delicious the food was. Also the people who delivered and set up for me were the most delightful people. And grateful for my clientele. If you're looking for something that bit different, but easy to serve and eat, then this company is the one to go to every time. Big thank you to Adam who was super helpful and open to making changes during the planning. Thank You..

Name: Oriental Teahouse Brunswick
Author: Bijan K
Review: I couldn't believe how much these dumplings were for the size and quality. I don't mind paying top dollar for food but when it says lemongrass chicken and its just a ball of chicken mince with no flavouring thats really dissappinting. The xiao long bao had no soup in them and were again flavourless. Its about $4 per dumpling minimum.

Name: Oriental Teahouse Brunswick
Author: James Jones
Review: Although I note the dumplings are pricey, once you try them, you'll see why. Hands down the best cook at home dumplings I've ever had. The prawn ginger dumplings were bursting with flavour, easy to heat up, full of prawns and the quality is evident. Well worth the price. Wish I got the 50 pack now as 10 was not enough.

Name: Oriental Teahouse Brunswick
Author: Anthony K
Review: Delicious dumpings and wonderful service. In addition to the dumplings I would also recommend the duck spring rolls which we found really tasty

Name: Oriental Teahouse Brunswick
Author: Monica Marshall (Minnie Mon)
Review: Great tasting food.  So convenient,  just down the road from home and easy to book at the last minute and collect. Wish they would have some fish options though like some of their other outlets.  Menu a bit limited if you don't eat meat,  otherwise great !!

Name: Tea House on Burke
Author: Sylvia Wang
Review: This Cantonese restaurant in Melbourne offers a warm and inviting atmosphere with exceptionally friendly staff. The quality and taste of the dishes are consistently outstanding, making every visit a delightful experience. Among the Cantonese restaurants in Melbourne, this one truly stands out for its superb cuisine and excellent service. Highly recommended for anyone looking to enjoy authentic Cantonese flavors.

Name: Tea House on Burke
Author: Angie Bee
Review:
I'd only been here once before, back in 2016, and thought to try it again.  I wish I'd done so earlier, because it was soooo incredibly good and delicious.  Honestly, the food is great.  The food takes a little bit of time to come out (even during non peak times), but the actual service is very good and they're attentive and the meals all came out at the same time, which is almost unheard of in many Chinese restaurants (that I've been to).   They even give you delicious sugar cookies at the end of the meal.
They could definitely stand to freshen up and modernise the decor and repaint the dirty and old shabby looking walls, but overall that's really about the only complaint.  Everything we ate, we loved and I'll definitely be coming back again.

Name: Tea House on Burke
Author: Samuel Fisher
Review: I recently dined at Tea House on Burke. The food was delicious, the ambience was pleasant, and most of the staff provided good service. However, the server who seated us seemed to be in a bad mood, which made me feel uncomfortable. It's unfortunate because everything else was great. I hope management addresses this issue to improve the overall experience.

Name: Tea House on Burke
Author: Vickie B
Review: 10/10 for service.  I had all vegetarian options which were very delicious.  My guests had non vegetarian veterinary which looked really nice

Name: Tea House on Burke
Author: Dinesh D’sa
Review: I've been to Tea House on Burke; arguably one of the best fine dining experiences in Camberwell. The food is simply delicious and nothing but sumptous fine dine chinese cuisine; the service excellent and i enjoyed the ambience very much

Name: Family Tea House
Author: Scott Wolfson
Review:
Absolutely the best!
The Food is just divine and service is absolutely top!

I had the Duck fried rice along side the dumplings.

Couldn't fault this restaurant.

Clean, affordable and tasty.

Also cater to larger groups!

Name: Family Tea House
Author: NishNosh Jinx
Review:
Given the high google rating I was expecting the food to be amazing but it was disappointing.
Chicken fried rice was oily and without seasoning or any real flavour.
The mince chicken and green beans were mainly green beans and diced mushroom with about a tablespoon of minced chicken at the bottom. This was particularly disappointing as I don’t like mushrooms and the menu doesn’t mention it contains mushrooms.

Name: Family Tea House
Author: Shirley Tang
Review:
A trap. Top reviews were from a year ago so there must had been a change of management.

Menu was limited at lunch with options and price is sky high. Ordered wonton noodle soup for 18$, basically instant noodle in tasteless water with 6 pre frozen wonton. Costco wonton soup tastes even better than this. Felt Robbed and will never return.

Name: Family Tea House
Author: TinTin Pookachi
Review: Foul beyond words! They put a long black hair in my fried rice! It nearly made me throw up! It’s was soooo gross 🤮 I pulled it out of my throat it was a horrible sensation 👺

Name: Family Tea House
Author: 陳
Review:
For myself, I think the chef cooks very beautifully.
The only problem is the sauce was too light.
Maybe should consider adding some more seasoning.    Some items are bitted slightly more expensive than other restaurants.
In general, I will come back again.

Name: Oxi Tea Room
Author: Lisa K
Review: I came for their high tea experience and it was beautiful in terms of presentation. I found the overall experience to be quite pricey for what was offered. Some of the dishes were intriguing but left my taste buds a bit confused. There is a good selection of teas and you can smell the tea leaves before choosing. If you are seeking an interactive and unconventional high tea, this might be worth trying. It’s definitely more about the experience than the traditional high tea. I might return to try their cakes next time.

Name: Oxi Tea Room
Author: Nicole
Review: Loved my first high tea experience! 💕 Everything was a little piece of art. The only constructive criticism I can say is I feel like the staff need to be educated more on what is “halal”. We asked about the meat that was served to us and the worker said “it’s pork but it’s halal”? My partner and I were so confused as he is Muslim. Otherwise everything was lovely! :)

Name: Oxi Tea Room
Author: Criss Mi
Review: Some of the desserts were good, while others didn’t suit our taste, which may just be due to personal preferences. The service was excellent, and the environment is perfect for a relaxing tea time. They offer a wide variety of teas, which I absolutely loved, even though they are quite expensive. I purchased some tea leaves before leaving, but was surprised to see that they weighed and sealed them in plastic, costing me $15-$17 for 15gram.It would be nice if they provided a proper can or more decent packaging. That said, I can’t deny how good the tea tastes, and I’ll definitely be back. Just a friendly reminder: there's a 10% surcharge on weekends, even when buying loose tea, and they also charge a 10% service fee. Sounds a bit crazy, right? Haha.

Name: Oxi Tea Room
Author: Tristan
Review:
Oxi Tea Room is truly a hidden gem—literally! You have to turn the corner and go up the stairs, but I’m so glad I found it. The chandelier sets a lovely tone, and I was warmly greeted by the receptionist while waiting to be seated. I expected to need a reservation for this spot, but luckily, it was a quiet Sunday afternoon, perfect for enjoying some fine tea and delicious dessert.

The host introduced me to a wide variety of teas, each with unique qualities. I wanted to try them all but chose the one that caught my nose—it was gentle and smooth. The dessert presentation was beautiful, and the flavors were subtle yet delightful.

The waitress was well-trained, keeping my water glass full at all times and presenting the menu in a way that made me feel very comfortable and welcome.

It was a lovely afternoon, and definitely worth the visit.

Name: Oxi Tea Room
Author: Debra Cooper
Review: Amazing experience. The most unique High Tea we've experienced. Delicious food and presentation, lovely teas and gorgeous ambience. The staff are amazing and the challenge was a lot of fun. Just beautiful. Keep doing what you are doing, as you're doing  it well.

Name: High Tea Experience
Author: Karyn Myers
Review:
Such unhelpful phone service when trying to follow up my booking. Website seemed to process my booking, funds transfer marked pending on bank site, but when I called to confirm, the person who answered couldn’t  find my booking and said they were probably booked out. When I queried if they were booked out or not I was told to stop shouting, which is disconcerting considering my voice was very calm and civil. I am currently not sure whether I have a booking or not, which I did try to explain to the person on the other end. Here’s my pickle - I can’t book anywhere else until my pending transaction resolves one way or the other, because I don’t want to double book, but at that point if there is no booking it will be too late to book elsewhere.
Ah dear shouldn’t be quite this difficult.

Name: High Tea Experience
Author: Francione PInto
Review:
Great coffee, quick service and a fantastic host.
I'll be back 🙂

Name: High Tea Experience
Author: Danielle
Review: The cakes are delish

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Victor
Review: Vietnamese coffee shop. Generally buzzing with Vietnamese uncles and aunties. Coffee is sweet and strong. Environment is pleasant and staff polite.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: jen kak
Review: Try Vanilla Milk Tea if your stumped on flavour.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: nina eats
Review:
Best sugar cane in the area
Good value

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Ella Burkett
Review: Super amazing tea! Best range of flavours and very friendly staff. Very fairly priced too.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Hannah Nguyen
Review: So yummy ! My favourite is your strawberry milk tea and 3 coloured drink. 10/10

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Cam
Review:
Best milk tea! Especially if you like them on the sweeter side. The honeydew milk tea is addictive here! Well priced and friendly staff.
I've been going here since they opened 23 years ago, they're always consistent.
Five stars!

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Rachael Wang
Review: love my favourite black forest milk tea drink and their wheat-made straws alot! much better than the other beverage stores. other beverages stores should update their straws instead of using cardboard straws

Name: Happy Cup
Author: M D
Review: Our go-to bubble tea shop.  We usually get the taro, roasted rice or classic milk tea and they are consistent, good value and not overly sweet.  Pearls are always soft and chewy with a bit of sweetness. Good place to come and hang out, with plenty of seating including a couple of sofas.

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Joey Tan
Review: The best Bubble tea I know and I’ve experienced bubble tea from both America and Australia. They have good prices and are insanely quick. Once I timed them and it took less than 20 seconds for my order.

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Robert D'Alberto
Review: I have been coming here for 20 years. By far the best bubble tea around.

Name: Mongkok Tea House
Author: Michael T
Review: The best bar in Melbourne for cocktails. Jack, Henry and the team create their own ingredients that go into each and every cocktail to perfection. Cannot find another bar like this in Melbourne. The food is also on another level with Hong Kong influence especially, the Duck, the Chicken and the Signature Pineapple Bread. Crispy skin and juicy texture blows my mind with every bite. The ambience lends to a romantic mood, though can also be enjoyed with intimate friends. The best combination of food and cocktail will satisfy the uninitiated and once experienced, will claim The Mongkok Tea House to be a Melbourne iconic institution. 5 Stars!

Name: Mongkok Tea House
Author: Adrin
Review: Mongkok Tea House in Melbourne impresses with its mouthwatering modern Cantonese cuisine and impeccable service. All dishes are a must try. Paired with a unique variety of cocktails, the culinary experience is elevated to new heights. The attentive staff ensures an unparalleled dining atmosphere, making Mongkok Tea House a destination for food lovers seeking authenticity with a modern twist  and excellence. Will definitely come back with friends and anniversaries. Thank you for the little gift, Henry!

Name: Mongkok Tea House
Author: Nguyen Truong
Review:
Wow, Mongkok Tea House truly exceeds my expectations. From the moment you walk in, the ambiance is warm and inviting, with a charming decor. The staff are incredibly knowledgeable and attentive.
The menu is equally impressive with delicious, freshly prepared dishes that pair beautifully with their creative cocktail list. Overall, it is the perfect place to unwind, whether you want to have a fun date, catch up with friends or enjoy a peaceful solo moment.

Name: Mongkok Tea House
Author: Melbourneinfood
Review:
It is truly one of the best experiences i've had in Melbourne.

The appetizers are no jokes!
Got to try their oysters, truffle arancini (the best i've ever tasted), drunken kingfish crudo, crispy pork mantou, and pineapple bun.
Amazingly, none of them dissapoint!!

Not only the appetizers, the main dish are also really good, especially the corn-fed duck! I can confidently say this is the star of the dish!

Also tried the Jasmine soy Barramundi, it has a unique taste, but I enjoyed it!

Definitely don't forget the cocktail, guys!
You'll missing out a lot if you forget to try it, as their baristas are all participated in the barista championship and some even made it to the top 10!!

How great is that?

Make your move up here and try it yourself!

Name: Mongkok Tea House
Author: Justin Tan
Review: A group of us came here for the banquet meal at $89/person. Each item in the menu comes mostly on a shared plate, even the dessert, which is odd. I would suggest that the dessert be served individually because you are using the same spoon each time you dig into the dessert. It's not unhygienic.  The outstanding items are the oyster (1 per person), barramundi, and poached chicken. The cocktails are very nice. I have the Yolada and the orange blossom.  I highly recommend the latter. The place is dimly lit, making it difficult to take good photos.

Name: TEAMOO
Author: Connor
Review: Would give 6 stars if I could. This is the best place in South Yarra to relax and unwind with some vegan dumplings and high quality authentic tea. Terry, the owner, is incredibly knowledgeable in ancient Chinese tea and will assist in choosing the right tea for you as well as educating on proper tea serving. Couldn’t recommend higher.

Name: TEAMOO
Author: Efan Du
Review:
Booked a tea ceremony for my partner as a birthday gift and got to know the place.
Was never impressed by any dumplings I had in Melbourne until I had the vegetarian dumplings here. The dumplings are handmade, packed with seasonal ingredients and full of flavour even without the sauce ( that’s how you know it’s exceptional).
Terry is the most kind and carefree owner, you will see regular customers hanging around and make themselves at home.
Strongly recommended for anyone that wants to leap from tea bags to proper loose leaf tea.

Name: TEAMOO
Author: Soobin Hong
Review: Had wonderful experience with good service. Owner was super nice to us and introduced how to drink the tea. This is my new favorite place in south yarra. Want to visit next time to join meditation as well. Drinking tea make me warm, calm relax. Thank u so much

Name: TEAMOO
Author: Melanie Morales
Review:
Always a lovely experience at this tea shop, been going there for years. The tea selection is great & the vegan dumplings are delicious and so fresh! Plus the owner is the kindest person you will ever meet and he never fails to make us feel at home.
Very peaceful experience, high quality Chinese tea & good food. If I could give it more than 5 stars I definitely would! 😊

Name: TEAMOO
Author: Julia Venchy
Review: The one and only classic tea shop in Melbourne. Boss Terry is a master of traditional China tea , I have learnt so much about tea through tea tasting , and found my favourite tea. Best place for a relaxing afternoon with the health benefit of traditional Chinese tea.

Name: Bubble House
Author: Liam Casey
Review: My family and I love Bubble House. Pearls are super soft and aren't too chewy (meaning it's freshly cooked!) and the tea is tasty. Sharetea is closer to us but we go out of our way for Bubble House cuz it's that nice :)

Name: Bubble House
Author: P L
Review:
The best bubble tea place in Mooroolbark😊
I ordered the Mango Grape Oolong Fruit Tea with less sugar and it was perfect, just how I like it. The flavours go so well together and the drink is very pretty!
The owner is super nice and friendly, she said I was her first Uber Eats customer and gifted me a Portuguese tart. It really made my day😁 The Portuguese tart base was flaky and buttery while the custard was smooth and just the right sweetness. The charring on the top was done perfectly. I'm glad I'm not allergic to eggs or milk!

I've tried all the trendy spots in cbd and Bubble House is just as good!
Can't wait to go back and try the Biscoff Bubble Waffle, it looks so good😋

Thank you to the owner for choosing Mooroolbark, we're very lucky to have you in our suburb!

Name: Bubble House
Author: bouds
Review: Eva is the sweetest thing in Bubble House (sorry Lawrence). She's very passionate and lovely to have a chat with. She takes great care to make sure her tea and ingredients are high quality. Delicious bubble tea, thanks Eva!

Name: Bubble House
Author: Mandy
Review: Cute little Bubble tea cafe in Mooroolbark! Highly recommend the delicious bubble Waffles and Bubble Tea. The owner is lovely. Will be returning again and again. Amazing!

Name: Bubble House
Author: Madison Reardon
Review:
I've tried a lot of bubble tea stores, from chain stores to smaller family run stores, and this one definitely passes my expectations! The right level of sweetness in the teas, yummy bubble waffles and portugeuse tarts, and the most lovely shop owner behind the counter.

She uses wheat based straws which are one of the better alternatives to paper straws despite being more expensive to the store, because she knows thats important when it comes to drinking bubble tea.

It's spiked in popularity amongst the local Facebook groups since opening, and it's clear that the owner cares about the people supporting her new business.

My personal recommendation would be the Peach Oolong Milk Tea (with real peach puree) served warm, delicious.

Only lost a star on atmosphere because there aren't many seating areas nearby to choose from, the three picnic tables next to the store are reserved for Manna Lane customers.

Name: The Austen Tea Room
Author: Yvonne Clark
Review: I ordered raisin toast lightly toasted and coffee. It was toasted perfectly to my taste. Loved the almond milk coffee. It's a quaint place and a hidden gem in Essendon. Service and staff were excellent. The next time I'm in Melbourne I will surely be back!

Name: The Austen Tea Room
Author: Tess Warrener
Review: Nestled in the leafy suburb of Essendon, lies the corner cafe The Austen Tearoom. What a treat to be able to find a cafe like this .. sitting  in the warm glow of the sun on a Sunday afternoon,  sipping tea, eating lamingtons &  scones!  Thank you for your warm hospitality! We had a memorable afternoon.

Name: The Austen Tea Room
Author: Ceci Arz
Review:
I’m rating this place taking as parameters: coffee quality, staff members and ambiance. I love this semi hidden pearl in Essendon which I discovered by chance one day when luckily, I took the wrong road. Since then, I love stopping by for a coffee every time I’m in the surroundings. The coffee is delicious, creamy, nutty, tasty, perfect froth. Kiuli is a brilliant barista and always attending customers with a smile and the friendliest attitude. The place has many separate rooms where is feasible to have a private gathering or celebration. The decorations are adorable, romantic, refined, I can see the inspiration on Jane Austen in every detail selected to ornament each room.
The Austen is frequently busy, visited by locals who stop by to enjoy a cuppa, a treat and a talk with a friend.  I’ve taken many pictures for all of you to depict the lovely vibes of this shop. Ceci

Name: The Austen Tea Room
Author: Anna T
Review:
Pros
- Beautiful rooms, lovely table setup including stunning pink roses
- Food was presented well
- Finger sandwiches were nice enough
- Gluten free option was good (I didn’t get gluten poisoning so that’s always a bonus for us coeliacs!)

Cons
- Service was extremely slow
Our sandwiches and hot food trays were delivered within 15 minutes of arrival BUT
We were not asked for tea (or coffee) orders, as we assumed at least a pot of each would be brought to us...but no. Eventually after 45 minutes we asked for some! Only a pot of tea was brought to our table, no coffee. We were then told that had to be ordered by the cup.
- Staff and owner not that friendly
Perhaps they were all having a bad day, but there definitely wasn’t service with a smile the day we went!
- Hot food was not hot, more like lukewarm on delivery to the table
- Had to ask for tomato sauce (who serves pies without that?)

They would be more efficient if they planned and prepared better, rather than constantly running backwards and forwards, especially when there are so many little separate rooms.

Final verdict
Unfortunately I have to say I wouldn’t return here or recommend it to others.

Name: The Austen Tea Room
Author: Grant Stephens
Review: The bacon and eggs were delicious and my companions were very pleased with their club sandwiches. The coffee and tea were excellent as were the cakes we snuck in afterwards.

Name: Gardens House High Tea
Address: Royal Botanic Gardens, Gardens House, Birdwood Ave, Melbourne
Author: Susan Lengyel
Review: We had an amazing high tea experience for Mother’s Day. The four of us arrived early and relaxed in the Royal Botanic Gardens and the Gardens House private outdoor space before being escorted to our seats upstairs. We loved the arrival Taittinger Champagne and the tea and coffee was excellent quality. The food, staff, service and ambiance were superb. All the staff were extremely friendly and knowledgeable, and kept us in good spirits. They let us stay and continue our vibrant conversations after the sitting time finished for which we were grateful. Highly recommend booking if you have a special event.

Name: Gardens House High Tea
Address: Royal Botanic Gardens, Gardens House, Birdwood Ave, Melbourne
Author: Kitty Au
Review: Beautiful afternoon tea. Modern renovate in upstairs. Enjoy the food👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

Name: Gardens House High Tea
Address: Royal Botanic Gardens, Gardens House, Birdwood Ave, Melbourne
Author: Rebecca Little
Review: Wonderful High Tea! The food was incredible and the atmosphere was so lovely! 5 STARS!

Name: Gardens House High Tea
Address: Royal Botanic Gardens, Gardens House, Birdwood Ave, Melbourne
Author: Lindsay Gerraty
Review: Absolutely loved this venue, sat outside, it was a beautiful day in a beautiful place, cannot fault the food, every dish was excellent, menus for the children, (2 girls) was excellent,  service excellent, highly recommended this high tea in the beautiful Botanical Gardens. Warning don't eat much in the morning as you will enjoy the plentiful lovely food, we booked 1pm to 3.00 pm, don't be late, take the two hours and enjoy.

Name: Gardens House High Tea
Address: Royal Botanic Gardens, Gardens House, Birdwood Ave, Melbourne
Author: Rhonda Jamieson
Review: Botanical wonderland HiTea $580 for 4 adults, 2 kids. Not worth $125 adult per head. No organised activities for the kids although advertised. The food was good quality. But the event was messy and the staff were totally untrained and confused. Everything was dumped on the table and we didn’t know what was what - kids vs ours vs vegetarian. The kids food was placed in front of one child and none for the other. And vegetarian food was placed next to the other child. Just confusing. Staff were polite but our waitress looked at me blankly when I explained that we had not requested vegetarian food. Later I gained another waiters attention and he called their manager who rectified the problem and explained what food was for adults vs kids. Tablecloth too long - metres of cloth was tucked under the table to stand on. Coffee was cold. They only half filled the champagne glass. Poorly organised service. To top it off, they asked our guests to pay for the additional person rather than ask us. Having said all that, the staff were polite and readily attended to our beverage needs. And the food was plentiful and tasty.

Name: Ruby T's Maling
Author: jen m
Review: I had the pleasure of having a delicious beef barley soup here with a scone to top off the meal...I was pleasantly surprised with an extra dollop of fresh whipped cream after I mentioned how much my grandma loved whip cream. Superb food and the extra service is the icing on the cake...like going to grandma's house 🏠

Name: Ruby T's Maling
Author: Jan Baer
Review:
Fabulous! I visited for the first time with my mother and we enjoy the delicious lasagna lunch with salad and chips. This is a beautiful bakery as well. With all kinds of delightful desserts and cakes, We took a jelly slice and a lamington with cream cake to go cake to go!
Returned the second and third time in the past 2 weeks, highly recommend the Sunday Roast of the day! Lemon meringue pie with whipped cream for dessert.
Cheers, highly recommend.

Name: Ruby T's Maling
Author: Ji Anne Yong
Review:
Literally waited 5 years to have this passionfruit cake again and it’s so worth it 🤣🤣 Be sure to come after 1pm however because you’d be disappointed to find out it’s not available till then!

The cake is so soft but yet spongey and not too sweet, the whip cream is absolutely decadent and amazing and the passionfruit icing... my lawd, it was heavenly! Such an amazing cake and worth the high price of $6.50

The service is also really friendly and nice!

If you’re ever around the area and just abit peckish for some tea, Ruby T’s is great!

Name: Ruby T's Maling
Author: Nicole
Review: Yesterday was the fourth time I've been to Ruby T's cafe, and it wasn't great. My friend's tea cup was dirty and the milk she was given had black crumbs floating in it. The waitress took my plate away without asking if I was done. When I said that I was still busy, she said, "But you only had some cream left." It's not her concern what I had left, I was actually going to eat it. Not a pleasant experience.

Name: Ruby T's Maling
Author: David Yates
Review:
Food is excellent quality and coffee is good. Not large, and the cafe is often full during the norning, so apparently popular with locals, mainly of the older generation. Rather like an old style tearoom.
Pam is lovely and her staff great.
Greatest drawback is that their cloth tablecloths are rarely cleaned, so look grubby. Carpet could also do with a good shampoo.This has dropped my score by a star.

Name: Beasley's Nursery & Tea House
Author: Kez Y
Review:
Beautifully maintained nursery! Its like taking a walk in a park. Also great to have a cafe to have coffee and hang out! Good staff service in the cafe too. Also i love the dedicated indoor well lit area for the indoor plants! Indoor Plants are happy there.
Only thing is plants are comparatively more expensive than other places.

Name: Beasley's Nursery & Tea House
Author: Chee Teng
Review: Today went to visit Nursery and tea house trying their in house scones snd looking at their plants

Name: Beasley's Nursery & Tea House
Author: BJ Turner
Review:
Lovely well maintained nursery with plenty of plants and a cafe on site where you can admire the scenery.

Recently returned and although the nursery is still lovely and well maintained the cafe was not up to previous visit.
Hope they regroup.

Name: Beasley's Nursery & Tea House
Author: Helen Plant
Review: It‘s really a great place for relaxing with friends and family. A big playground ouside of the main entrance and a cafe inside as well. I’ve been there several times and strongly recommend to you.

Name: Beasley's Nursery & Tea House
Author: Liz Naval
Review: It’s a shame the kitchen was closed but the cakes OMG they’re yum! The chai latte was excellent and the staff are all friendly. Was pretty hot today and seated outside but the friendly guy said I’ll move you inside once a table is available, and he did. The nursery has good choices of pots and plants. Coming back is a no brainer. Hopefully , I’ll give a 5 next time when the kitchen is open.

Name: Australian Tea House
Address: Queen Victoria Market, D Shed, Stall 95/96 Queen St, Melbourne
Author: D Portakalci
Review: Was a happy find at the Queen Victoria Market. ATH has a beautiful variety of loose leaf tea. It's the only place that sells organic raspberry leaf tea locally and the price was great for the amount. I was thrilled to see they had caffeine free organic raspberry tea because I needed it for my pregnancy and no one else in town had it. The lady behind the booth was helpful, kind, and even shared her knowledge on organic herbal healing for certain ailments. Also, I was given free pamphlets on superfoods as well as mushroom elixirs. This tea leaf smells soo fresh- I can't wait to go back.

Name: Australian Tea House
Address: Queen Victoria Market, D Shed, Stall 95/96 Queen St, Melbourne
Author: Sally Atkinson
Review: I can't thank you enough for your remarkable product, Miracle Tonic. I find it very strengthening, nourishing and toning on my body. Recently a friend got Covid and were very lethargic. After taking this tonic they had a speedy recovery and got their life back on track very quickly. I also can't believe how healthy I feel after drinking your teas. My favourites are matcha chai latte, black vanilla and green tea with only real apricots. You do all your teas so well! There's such a large tea range, including amazing tasting herbal infusions, very spoilt for choice.!

Name: Australian Tea House
Address: Queen Victoria Market, D Shed, Stall 95/96 Queen St, Melbourne
Author: Saeed A

Name: New Tea
Author: Marie Le
Review: This place I will go to for a refreshing beverage. They choose the finest and authentic tea. The fruits tea menu are delicious. My favourite is green tea cheese. The cup sealed it makes it leak proof, keeping you clean and on the move. Great service, James is polite and friendly. Store always look nice and clean.

Name: New Tea
Author: Oscar Riches
Review:
Tea is good.
Service is fine not rude. In fact since I've been back service is better.
Selection of new teas to keep interest is also nice.
Taro and sago thick not too sweet.
Tried the soy tea oolong and was pleased.
Best tea in Springvale beats most of the other franchises

Name: New Tea
Author: Victor
Review: Bubble tea store in Springvale. Quite enjoy my bubble tea here. You do pay a premium but tea taste fresh and the pearls are nice and bouncy.

Name: New Tea
Author: Thay
Review: love the service here at New Tea, the staff are friendly and welcoming, this oolong milk tea taste so so so good among all bubble tea shop I’ve tried. 9/10 for this flavor, must try this shop for your next bubble tea list.

Name: New Tea
Author: Lyva Sou
Review: Beautiful experience, i tried the drinks there and it did not disappoint. The creme brulee was phenomenal it was their signature drink. Staff were nice and friendly and were very helpful. The owner is very nice and welcoming as well. Reasonable price for good quality drinks. 10/10 would go again😄

Name: Milan Teahouse
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: High Tea at Pan Pacific Melbourne
Author: Iris Yang
Review: Back at Pan Pacific Melbourne for high tea, and it’s just as awesome as I remember! They have more savory options than most places, which I love, since it’s not all about the sweets. Jennifer took such great care of me, making the whole experience even better. If you’re after a high tea that’s a little different and totally delicious, this is the place to be!

Name: High Tea at Pan Pacific Melbourne
Author: Erica
Review: Beautiful high tea for dad's 90th birthday - spectacular setting, spacious, quiet and relaxed. Generous, tasty savoury bites and pretty, intricate sweets, with unlimited tea/coffee - all delicious. Jennifer provided wonderful attentive, friendly service and we all agreed the afternoon was faultless. Dad was absolutely chuffed :)

Name: High Tea at Pan Pacific Melbourne
Author: M H
Review: Went here with my friend today and had the loveliest time. The food was fresh and full of flavour. However, the highlight was Jennifer’s service. Jennifer was kind, attentive and friendly. She made the day so special for my friend and me. We felt so welcomed and comfortable because of her. Thank you so much Jennifer!

Name: High Tea at Pan Pacific Melbourne
Author: Can Kantoglu
Review:
Incredible high tea, I must say!!!

I've booked it last minute for mother's day for my wife. We had a few dietaries too, and they took down our booking without a deposit, no fuss, no issues.
The venue is on the 4th floor of the Pan Pacific Hotel in Southbank, Melbourne. It has premium views of the Yarra, up and downstream.

The ambiance exceeds what you'd expect from a world class hotel in a busy district of any metropolitan city.

When it comes to food.... Oh the food...
It was so delicious that I almost convinced my wife to stay for the second sitting as well.

Service staff were the friendliest bunch I've seen around. Attentive, interactive and humorous.

Definitely choose Pan Pacific for your next high tea!!!

Name: High Tea at Pan Pacific Melbourne
Author: josette frost
Review: My daughter and I went for high tea on Saturday at 12. It was served on level 4 in the lounge which was such a nice atmosphere. Scones arrived first with delicious rose petal jam, lemon curd and cream, followed by the stand which looked incredible. I ordered TWB Bain de Roses tea which I absolutely loved. Our favourites on the tea stand were the Mango tart with Jasmine Tea Veil and Geraldton Wax, Yarra Valley Salmon, Desert Lime and Caviar, and the Serrano Ham Croquette. Jennifer looked after us and the service was 5*. Such a lovely experience and I highly recommend it

Name: Mámor Chocolates & High Tea Szalón
Author: Kim Van Swinden
Review: Probably one of the best high tea we’ve had. We had the luxe high tea and the food came out really quick. I really liked that the chef gave a spiel of each of the dish delivered. There was a lot of thought put the food, the decor and the atmosphere. Very cute and cosy experience. My photos don’t really do justice to the experience we had.

Name: Mámor Chocolates & High Tea Szalón
Author: Luna Lee
Review: Highly recommended!!! My daughter and I found this quaint beautifully well thoughtfully decorated little High Tea Cafe run by friendly Janet the owner who welcomed us at the door. We enjoyed a scrumptious pretty presentation of selections of savoury and sweet desserts, delicious, delicately prepared and served. We sat by the large window and enjoyed the warm sunlight lazily sipping warm herbal tea and watching the passerbys. So glad to have found this lovely local tea room. I look forward to return with friends.

Name: Mámor Chocolates & High Tea Szalón
Author: Lisa Tran
Review: My sister organised my hen's hightea at Mamor Chocolates. Such a charming venue (stunning for lots of photos) beautiful decor and loved all the china and crockery. The staff were flexible with making some slight changes to the hightea selections which sealed the deal for our event. Thanks to the Mamor team for a truly enjoyable experience!

Name: Mámor Chocolates & High Tea Szalón
Author: Tuta
Review: We just Love all the food, it was Yumm and the service too. It was good birthday brunch.

Name: Mámor Chocolates & High Tea Szalón
Author: Linda Sumartono
Review: Had a great experience with Mámor Chocolates for my hens party! ❤️ Janet has been very helpful from the booking process, and the team provided excellent service throughout the session! I booked in the Luxe High Tea session and it's so worrh it! They also carefully provided us with the details of food we're having. Amazing food and tea selections, great setup and interior with vintage inspired look. Definitely recommended if you're looking for best high tea experience in Melbourne!

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Sallie Morrison
Review: A special treat that has turned into a weekly outing for my son and I. The staff are amazing and know my order each time. Tea tastes great and I can’t wait for summer to have the frozen teas.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Kevin Fear
Review: Best bubble tea I ever had. affordable, taste good, customer service was lovely, and the consistency of quality it shows they care about the product. Highly recommend. Beats franchise bubble tea. I had strawberry with green tea and herbal jelly. I just wish they had a ward system buying their bubble tea. Had plenty selection there as well.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Katrina Blinoff
Review: I suppose I’m a regular here!! They remember my order and it’s such a cute shop, always feel comfortable going there. Tasty and close place to my house! Recommend it.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Anna K
Review:
Yummy taro milk tea, it was so tasty that I forgot to make a photo earlier 😋
Thank you!

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Jess Y
Review: Loved the bubble tea here. Made just right and friendly staffs. Thank you Tea Break. I will be back 😊

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nina Genuino
Review: We regularly go here for their milk tea. It’s our first time to try their Bahn mi and it’s the best!! Better than Lily’s! and better than the ones we’ve had in Vietnam. The bread was crispy on the outside but light and fluffy on the inside and the crispy pork was sooo crunchy 🤯 I regret sharing because it’s soooo good 🤤🤤🤤

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nicole
Review:
Very friendly service, I was greeted as soon as I walked in the store. Nice decor and a clean store if you’re wanting to dine in.
I had a drink chosen based on the menu attached to the shop front window but discovered heaps more options once inside the store and promptly changed my mind 😆 Was then blown away to discover my Mango Milk Tea had actual mango in it… totally thought it would just  be a flavouring syrup.

UPDATE: Have now tried their Ba Minh 🤤 Me, being the fussy features that I am, meant I wanted mine without salad etc. but I somehow managed to still get a sauce… thankfully it was DELICIOUS! Hands down, it’s up there with one of the best I’ve had. Crispy roll, succulent pork and oh so tasty.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Andrew Carlson
Review: I came here for lunch and had their rice paper rolls. 1 prawn and 1 chicken. OMG so delicious and fresh. Very flavourful with fresh herbs and salad. Their spicy / soy dipping sauce with so good. And their friendly delightful service made my day. Also affordable too. This place is a little gem. Thank you.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: crisy
Review: i love this place! i always come after work and it’s one of the only boba places open. such amazing couple running the shop and always working hard! WONDERFUL CUSTOMER SERVICE! definitely needs more recognition! i absolutely love the drinks, visit if you love more traditional styled bubble tea! fierce competition at werribee but this place always continues to make amazing boba. DEFINITELY RECOMMEND!!

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: hallemah assaad
Review: Best bubble tea store in Werribee, most polite, friendly owners and delicious bubble tea no matter what you choose.

Name: 御黑堂The Yunique Tea Docklands
Author: GossipGirl XOXO
Review:
updated:
I had a bubble tea today. The tapioca pearls were still hard. Could not even be chewed!

This is the last time to try!

——

The tapioca pearls are way too hard.
Very average.
3 stars are for the staff, they are very nice (sorry I have to downgrade the review from 3 to 1 star!)

Name: 御黑堂The Yunique Tea Docklands
Author: Christina Dang
Review:
I decided to try Yunique for the first time and ordered five drinks. To my surprise, the employee told me it was too much. When I asked what she meant, she reiterated that it was too much. I was left confused—I’ve never been to a place where ordering their products was considered excessive.

The employee got visibly stressed and annoyed by my order. It’s crazy to me because I’m supporting the business and giving them money. While she did take my payment, her attitude and the level of customer service I received were unlike anything I’ve ever experienced. The drinks were okay, but not the best. I will not be coming back. It seems like they’re just open for decoration, not to actually take orders or sell stuff.

Name: 御黑堂The Yunique Tea Docklands
Author: 樱木花
Review:
Bubble tea - black sugar Pearl with matcha.
Always wanting to try out new bubble tea.
This is yet another one. Hidden in the mall but would see it if you go to Woolworths.
Little pricey but you get to decide sugar level which is sometimes rare with other bubble tea store. But less ice ended up with no ice and not cold enough.  Pearls are Q… and tasty though!!!!

Name: 御黑堂The Yunique Tea Docklands
Author: Sreerag Nampoothiri K
Review: I think it’s safe to say, this is the only bubble tea place in docklands. Located in the close proximity of the mall, makes it an easy choice to go for and to have something to sip while you take a walk around. The lady at the store was extremely polite and she was very friendly. I have tried the Brown Sugar Milk tea and the pearls were very nice.

Name: 御黑堂The Yunique Tea Docklands
Author: Ashley Jenny W
Review:
Tried this cute bubble tea shop for the first time since it's nearby, and it didn't disappoint! The pearls were fresh and just the right amount of chewy. The milk tea was yummy too! Didn't love the grapefruit tea as much as the syrup tasted too artificial for my liking. But will definitely be back to try their other fruit flavours!

The staff were friendly, quick and professional too! Here's hoping them all the best - this side of Docklands needs its own staple bubble tea shop!

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Melb Food Baby
Review: Their dorayaki are all made fresh to order so they were warm and fluffy. Really enjoyed the mango ice cream & peanut butter combo most. Their mango & coconut milk drink is also very good but recommend adding extra toppings

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Miss Culinaryy
Review: Dorayaki in melbourne made fresh on the spot! Was surprised by how huge the dorayaki were, we also enjoyed the delicious oreo cake thai milk tea, felt like drinking milk tea but with a hint of cake on it!

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Oracle Chow
Review:
right in the heart of melbourne central, this spot serves freshly made dorayaki for as low as $4! while they do serve bubble tea, i feel like their dorayaki steals the show 🍓✨

i ordered:
❤︎  matcha ice cream & red bean dorayaki ($6) ⭐️
❤︎  strawberry ice cream & nutella dorayaki ($6)
❤︎  oreo & cream cheese dorayaki ($5.50) ⭐️
❤︎  mango & coconut milk ($10.30)
❤︎  thai milk tea deluxe ($8)

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Janelle
Review:
The dorayakis are actually very soft, it tasted good esp when I had it warm!! My favourite's the ice cream one, (people who also love a cold-warm food combo dessert will get it😋) its surprisingly very yummy, I also liked their matcha ice cream! As for the drinks both of them are preety yum but the mango coconut mmmmm delicious!! I didn't know about this before I take a sip but they have coconut jellies inside, it paired so well with the drink itself🤩✨

And the doriyakis are only $6😲 so cheap💥 Had a yummy mid-day work snack minus the guilt😋😋😆 I really liked it! Will come back to try their other drinks and dorayaki flavours hehe

- foodie instagram @81.room

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Melbourneinfood
Review:
When you’re craving for dorayaki, let me spill you a secret!

They sell one of the best tasting dorayaki here!
They also sell the “durian” flavoured milk tea, which i found pleasing, as i love durian. Lol

Definitely check it out!

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Ines Fernandes
Review:
Absolutely recommend!

The decoration of this place is just gorgeous and it is probably one of the most instagramable bubble tea places I have been. Super soft tones of salmon and white, with some gold touches and the vibe is just so enjoyable that you will want to sit here for hours!

I actually have visited this place 5 times (in 2 months!) and have to say that I will keep coming back. Their acai bowls are AMAZING in terms of size, taste, consistency and toppings! Price is also very reasonable and fair - it comes in a small or regular size.
They now have another option of pistachio soft serve and although I haven't tried it yet, I have to make sure I do next time.

The bubble tea menu they have is also incredible in terms of options as expected and they also have soy milk available as a diary-free option.

There are also other items on the menu such as mochi waffle that looks like a normal waffle but actually has a mochi consistency! How cool. There's 3 different flavours and they are quite popular.

The staff was lovely and the place/atmosphere is just bliss.
Would 100% come back!

…
[Follow my adventures on instagram @crushinglimits]

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Jen
Review:
✨BBT & AÇAI✨

Head to Tea Royale to get their açai and bbt because you won’t regret it! Super refreshing and so many options to choose from! Loved the açai and drinks were so tasty! 🤤

Don’t forget to try their mochi waffles because these are AMAZING! 🤩🤩

Featured:
🧋 royal milk tea
💜 taro milk tea
🥭 mango grape oolong tea
🍓 strawberry yakult
🫐 açai w/ pb
🧇 Biscoff mochi waffle

Thank you for the invite. 💌

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Janelle
Review:
Finally trying them after hearing that it‘s one of the most popular bubbletea in town🥸 I was actually surprised that they have soooo many different tea/drinks options to choose from😲 Here’s what we‘ve got✨

🍇Green grape Yakult
🍇Green grape Smoothie
🧋Phoenix Pearl Bubbletea
🥤Pistachio Shake
🍵Peach Spring Tea
🧇Mochi Waffle
🧇Biscoff Mochi Waffle

The Latest additions to the menu are the Green Grape series❇️ They were so refreshing and there were actually some big green grapes inside the drink🤤 The Pistachio Shake also got me! My first time seeing/trying this and I love it, if you love a creamy milk shake and/or love pistachio like me, definitely try it✨

Have to mention their mochi waffles as well, cause they are actually chewy!! And it’s $4.5 only what the😲 To be the biscoff mochi waffle wasn‘t that strong in biscoff, it was rather mild, so I like the original mochi waffle more, enjoyed the taste of their batter🫶🏻

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Davy S
Review:
I love bubble tea and this place offer a variety and more!
My fav is Taro smoothie with coconut jelly. Soo good!
Their Jasmine and black pearl also good.
They currently have the grapes + yakult combo which is delicious too
Happy sippimg
O and the prize is reasonable also.

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Noland Hoang
Review: Pistachio shake not so good but cost 10$ , everytime i purchase drinks here its a disappointment hurt my stomach so bad probably because high in fat. Their strawberry yakult tasted really bad. but cant get enough of their mochi waffle , best dessert to munch on

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Lakesha James
Review:
They forgot my cream cheese foam on two different occassions and it's definitely full sweetness when I asked for half.

What is the point in customisability if they keep getting it wrong. I've only been there twice and it's been a mess up every time. Wasted my money and my friend was driving me, by the time we got home and realised my order was messed up it was too late to go back.

I may avoid them in the future.

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Danielle CLARKE
Review: My daughter and I went exploring around the Bentleigh Shopping Strip and saw the sign for Palgong Tea. We got excited when we saw at the bottom of the street board say Korea's finest bubble tea. I ordered the Banana flavoured tea. It was yummy 😋 I would definitely recommend visiting if you are in the area. Great staff, very friendly and you will leave smiling 😃

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Kenneth Lee
Review:
🧋🧋🧋🧋🧋REFRESHING AND DELICIOUS

We ordered the lychee black tea with pearls and it really hit the spot!! The staff were extremely friendly and accomodating and the setting of the cafe was clean, modern and inviting.

Highly recommend visiting this gem in Bentleigh especially when bubble tea stores are scarce in the area - can’t wait to revisit!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Sarah Melbs
Review:
@palgongtea.australia 📍 With 200 stores worldwide I can’t believe I didn’t know this was in melbourne 😄🇰🇷🧋This South Korean BBT chain is the first of its kind to land here 🇰🇷🇦🇺 highly recommend the k- classics including the banana milk tea😄🍌 as well as the refreshing Korean grape soda ade🍇!!

the menu is v reasonably priced imho starting from $4.90+ 🤯 Highly recommend if you’re keen to try a Korean style bubble tea! 🇰🇷🧋🫰🏻They were so busy with locals! The line was insane. there’s seating out the back too!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Yu Kim
Review: Best tea place in town!! I’ve been there a couple of times with my friends and family. The staffs were friendly and really helpful. They make sure that everyone feels comfortable and answer all the questions I asked for the menu. You must try the Green grape Ade!! It is refreshing and freezy🤍💚🤍💚 Also, my best drink from Palgong tea is YOGURT SMOOTHIE!! Absolute favourite❤️

Name: Tea More
Author: 樱木花
Review:
Sorry but both tea - peach flavoured oolong and jasmine green tea has no tea taste at all.
Staff was poker face. Doesn’t ask if he didn’t understand us.
We actually wanted the tea with no milk or cheese. Just tea with pearls.
Not really a comfortable internet bar as well.

Name: Tea More
Author: Cauliflower tsai
Review:
I used the delivery platform to purchase, and with discounts, I purchased three drinks for only $5.7, which is great value for money! The drink is not bad.
It is recommended not to order less than 50% of the sugar content, otherwise it will not taste good😜

Name: Tea More
Author: James K
Review: Very good environment, great service, and friendly staffs. They don’t speak English, but man I love how kind they are to those who don’t speak Chinese. They also have fantastic drinks, and snacks! Awesome place 🤙🏻👌🏻

Name: Tea More
Author: Tony
Review:
So this little bubble tea place is a part of an internet cafe, which is fine, they open long hours as a result, and that helps.

The offers are very limited, but what they do offer is actually quite decent.

The prices are really great, so thumbs up 👍 there.

I wish they'd spend a bit more effort on this side business of theirs and make a few more varieties, but obviously it's none of my business to interfere with that. But one can wish.

Name: Tea More
Author: MDOG
Review: Does not get better than this place when it comes to bubble tea I remember first trying a drink from here in August 2021 and always come back to relive that time  ❤️

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Sarah
Review: Tried the teas for the first time today and they were all excellent. Perfect ratios of sugar, ice and flavour. We ordered the honeydew, Thai red, lychee and signature. Can't wait to try more flavours next visit.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Kim Chu
Review: Oolong Milk Tea with pearls is my go-to! Usually have the one with ice, but got a hot one today which is great too! Love it! Also very friendly staff!

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Amanda B
Review: Ordered a few teas via delivery expecting an average experience, but was surprisingly blown away. Easily some of the best, if not THE best, teas I’ve ever had. The taro tea specifically, it’s my favourite tea but can be really hit or miss depending on how the place makes it - the one from here was perfectly made, exceptionally smooth and creamy with the right amount of flavour. The fruit teas are made with a really lovely syrup that has a taste unlike other tea places. Highly recommend, this will be my new regular tea place.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Maria M Dimitrov
Review: Definitely one of my favourite bubble tea stores, I even bought there cup and get 50 cents off every time I use that cup. Good price range as other places like to up there prices which end up being too expensive. Good variety of flavours, but wish they could add kiwifruit fruit tea as not many bubble tea places do that flavour. Overall, amazing store with friendly staff :)

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Vanessa Wong-Lee
Review: A bubble tea store with the most laid out display of toppings. 4 sizes to pick from and also a unique can style for an additional cost. Honeu milk tea taro pudding and pearls. The tea is aromatic with hints of honey. The pearls are so soft and chewy whilst the taro pudding has a strong flavour, perfect to match with the drink.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: Tia Alysse
Review:
I ordered Gotcha’s Brown Sugar Milk Tea with Pearls, and it was delicious from start to finish, so much that I got another one before I went home.
The pearls were exceptionally fresh, and the staff we’re really friendly and kind.
I’ll definitely be stopping here every time I go to Watergardens.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: SusutheChen
Review: It was a great quality taro milk bubble tea. The pearls were cooked to perfection, boasting an ideal level of elasticity that strikes a delightful balance.😋

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: jeannie wong
Review: The Boba are so soft!! Good service! Always our go to bubble tea!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: Kristina Muzoska
Review: Black Sugar Pearl Fresh Milk and Golden Passionfruit Green Tea so fresh and full of flavour!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: Anisa Anwar
Review: Great drinks, lovely staff. I had the lychee green tea and thoroughly enjoyed it, will definitely be trying other flavors next time!

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jan Marie Limbo
Review: we love the mango slush and the brown sugar boba here!! the staff is also super lovely ❤️

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Ariel Lim
Review: I ordered the Taro milk tea with taro balls. The best taro milk tea I tried si far.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Furever Grooming
Review: Super friendly owner and staff, always love to come here for a nice cup of bubble tea!

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jenslie George
Review: Love the bubble tea here. It’s the best. The staff is very friendly.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: O L
Review: Lovely service, nice decor. Loved the fresh fruit ingredients in the drinks, and a very good amount for the price. The drinks look beautiful and taste great, I recommend the Grateful Grape tea.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: E L
Review: Rating solely based on their signature brown sugar boba milk - pretty good, but pearls are a bit soft (not sure if it’s because we ordered the drink warm), could be more bouncy. Could have also been more aggressive on the caramelised brown sugar flavour.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Helen Evangelina
Review:
From creamy to refreshing, Xing Fu Tang has it all!

What I ordered:
🧋Signature Brown Sugar Boba Milk
🍵Matcha Boba
🥭Mango Smoothie and Panna Cotta
🥤Lychee Green Tea w/ Coconut Jelly
🧇Croffle w/ Biscoff Sauce

I usually don’t like boba pearls because they can be hard to chew, but I love XFT boba—they're so chewy and soft! The brown sugar boba is super milky and creamy, which I love.

The mango smoothie was refreshing - and look how cute the bunny panna cotta is🥹 If you love lychee, you would definitely love the Lychee Green Tea which was light and refreshing. My friend loves lychee and she loved it!

I was actually surpsied with the Matcha Boba because it has strong matcha flavor—most bubble tea shops don’t get it right, but this one did!

And the croffle was delicious!

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Yama Vikara
Review: I bought the croffle today to fill my sugar needs. Was a bit skeptical but turned out it was 10/10!! The croffle itself was crunchy outside but soft inside, just the right sweetness level for me. The sweetness from the syrup and biscoff crumble were on point to my taste and the whipped cream just balanced out the taste and texture on every munch!! Definitely a yes to the croffle and will buy it another time.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Vandana T Sivadas
Review: Their bobo’s are always on the hot woke and thats the taste for your drink. Its a must try. I had croffle with biscoff sauce. Highly recommended. Brown sugar cooked bobos are the best. Must try

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Anusha Karanayil
Review: I’ve tried quite a few bubble tea places and this one has easily become my favourite! They have so many creative drinks that taste so good! Pleased to say I will be a regular at this place from now on! I’ve tried the mango panacotta, Biscoff and the brown sugar bubble teas so far and they’re all equally delicious.

Name: Tas Tea Bubbles
Author: belle
Review: Drinks are always made fresh to order, love coming here! The owner is always so friendly. Definitely recommend the Taro and Avocado coconut milk :)

Name: Tas Tea Bubbles
Author: Human
Review:
Excellent brown sugar milk tea with creme Broulee. The pearls were also extremely soft and nice, compared to most bubble tea places.

Super friendly owner as well!

Name: Tas Tea Bubbles
Author: Z H
Review: Honestly a great place, the owner was super lovely and the drink was really good. he was very professional and when i mentioned that i wasn’t a fan of sweet drinks, even though i forgot to ask for less sugar he automatically did it and got me to see if i liked it. which i really appreciated as it was perfect! highly recommend :))

Name: Tas Tea Bubbles
Author: Angela Roybal
Review:
Drinks are made fresh and are absolutely delicious! The couple who run the shop are so lovely, if you’re in the area or a local, this should definitely be your go to boba shop!!

You may need to wait a little but what’s a little wait time compared to a delicious drink? Come visit ASAP

I always order their fresh Taro Milk Tea but all their drinks are great

Name: Tas Tea Bubbles
Author: cheung yat ming
Review: We tried their taro pearl milk tea and cannot forget how tasty it is, we bought a pearl milk tea from other shop at the same time to compare, and we definitely can say this shop has the best taro milk tea which is made from real taro, you can definitely taste the freshness and rich in flavor.

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Daniel Saliba
Review:
It was a fairly quiet time when I arrived, but there was so much to love about this little corner of Sunbury. Kevin at the counter was incredibly charming and hospitable with his service, and the bubble tea I was served was properly delicious.
The location so close to the train station makes it remarkably convenient to visit after a day out (or before embarking on your journey), so I'd absolutely recommend paying Tea Bag 3429 a visit. Thanks Kevin!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Andrea Beattie
Review: Best bubble tea we’ve ever had. It was delicious and fresh — perfectly made. They have a great selection of flavours and toppings too, and the service was quick, professional and very friendly! Thanks guys, we’ll definitely be back!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Martin M
Review: Great selection of bubble teas and the girl who served us (Ela) was a legend - the place was nearly closing but she was very accommodating and happy to smash out a big order for us! Best customer service and tea in town!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Brendan Foletta
Review:
I generally enjoy coming here, but when I bought a drink for my daughter, we ended up waiting for a very long time.

Customers came and went, and when I inquired about our order, the staff member told us she had already prepared it, but it was wrong, and she hadn't informed us that it was ready.

I asked her if she hadn't noticed that we were waiting for so long, which didn't make sense to me.

Frankly, I initially thought the drink on the counter was for an Uber Eats order because it was different from the one we had ordered.

She didn't acknowledge us and just placed it on the counter without even looking at us.

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Ishah Clay
Review: Super tasty bubble tea with the flavours we are used to. I got the brown sugar milk tea with pearls and it was SO GOOD. It had a real brown sugar taste and the pearls were the perfect texture and sweetness. We also got the honeydew milk tea and passionfruit green tea, and they were really good as well. The service was great and the owner was really friendly and helpful. I will definitely be back and will tell friends and family to go here, as it's the type of tea we really like. So glad they came to Sunbury and we don't have to go to all the way to Watergardens to get good bubble tea.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Josh Briscoe (Aer)
Review: I love going to Gotcha M-City. First time I went upstairs as I’m a worker nearby I came across this bubble tea shop, the staff were very welcoming and helpful because it was my first time buying a drink at Gotcha. There’s a lot of variety of drinks on offer which I appreciate a lot. Their smiles make my day which is why I come there a lot now. Very quick and efficient to bring out drinks to customers including me!. I highly recommend everyone to come and visit Gotcha M-City they make great quality drinks and their customer service is amazing. =)

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Emdwyn Anderson
Review: They make fresh pearls every day, so the texture is always fantastic (I got classic pearl milk tea). As it was the end of the day, they were getting rid of their excess pearls and gave us free pearls on the house!!! Love these people and their tea!!!!!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Dan T
Review: Excellent service, helpful and the drinks were delicious. First time having Brulee though, some instructions would have been good (I didn't stir and the Brulee was all at the bottom) but overall even the end bit was delicious, I just wish I mixed it prior!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Lorraine Goh
Review:
24/9/2024 9pm

Absolutely appalled by the customer service I received today at the M-City Gotcha store. I have never been treated so poorly by wait staff in my entire life.

The lady working picked up her phone whilst taking our order and proceeded to speak on the phone and then gave us the incorrect drinks. When we came back to tell her, she was extremely rude, dismissive and unapologetic.

Not only that, she was also extremely rude to the other wait staff. Definitely not a good look and a very disappointing experience.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Hakan T.
Review: If I'm ever feeling like some bubble tea, I always find myself making my way to this store. Easily my favourite bubble tea in Melbourne! Dom is very friendly, polite and always greets his customers with a huge smile. He is always happy to give recommendations according to my taste and likes. He finished preparing my drinks after a couple minutes, with the perfect ratios and freshest ingredients. Highly recommend for anyone nearby in the area craving refreshing beverage.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Emily Le
Review:
Overall amazing experience here. Pearls are made fresh every 2-3hrs cause apparently they do it in small batches at a time so pearls always fresh. Good mixing with sugar level and ice that is not too sweet but also not too bland

P/s: the tall guy with glasses is cute and nice, plus he has a puppy that he brings to work sometimes and so so so so so cuteeeeee

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: M O R M E N
Review: It was pretty delicious. The Dirtea was like a brown sugar bubble milk tea but with creamy add-ons. The super Dirtea is the same but without fresh milk.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Cairo K
Review: Hands down the best TEASER in MELBOURNE! From all the drinks down to the taste 🥰🥰 I order every week atleast, the drinks are always the most tastiest at this store , I usuallly order 1 LT Fresh fruit tea and Lemon Bomber, but recently have got into Punched Lemon Ice Tea (Strawberry) ! I love that they are open late as well! Thanks so much! ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Alexander Pomnikow
Review: Delicious bubble tea right in southbank. Lively staff, great tasting bubble tea and awesome trading hours. Not much salad I could say about this place. Used to have a gaming centre, but how turned into an Asian shop. Nice variety of stuff for sale there.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Matt
Review: Share a space with a gaming lounge and a snack shop.  Drinks were not too bad.

Name: MOMO TEA (Burwood)
Author: Rachel Tang
Review: pearls are hard, egg puff is 7.5$ but not sweet at all, very plain while other egg puffs at other places are sweet.

Name: MOMO TEA (Burwood)
Author: Mia
Review: Lovely service, sadly no aloe vera :( but alas, perfectly good bubble tea, just what you would expect from a bubble tea shop, but the hours are amazing!!! Being open so late is great for students

Name: MOMO TEA (Burwood)
Author: Andrew W
Review:
01/2023

Ordered a $8.20 L size Black Sugar Milk Tea with The Lot (pearls, cheese foam, Oreo pieces) and it was perfectly balanced :) Discovered they are on the MemberBuy app and got 25% earning credits too ^_^

I really hope they get more customers because this shop is really good.

3/2/2024 - Seems like under new management the past few months, and has improved the decor a bit. Using 10% cashback on Shopback app my tracked spend has been $250 here per 6 months 🫣

Name: MOMO TEA (Burwood)
Author: Yohan Pasqual
Review: Great bubble tea, friendly and helpful staff.

Name: MOMO TEA (Burwood)
Author: darker0726
Review:
Shows open on Sunday but actually not.
Waste times. Just saw another two girls drop by too.

Ware time

Name: Taning Lemontea
Author: Amber Harrison
Review: So glad I chose this place in the multi options around these streets. I didn't want a huge sugar & milk combo,  the wheatgrass lemon tea was made fresh, so refreshing & about 1000 less calories than a usual bubble tea. Lovely service so kind & thoughtful ,  making sure I liked the taste before I left. Will definitely be back.

Name: Taning Lemontea
Author: Danny Lai
Review: If you’re after a tea place that doesn’t just sell your typical bubble tea, then definitely pay Taning a visit! Their drinks come in huge cups and offer more unique flavours and ingredients.
