I really enjoyed the pear, white fungus, goji berry & date milk tea that was well balanced and atypical. Their charcoal lemon tea was also really refreshing.

Name: Taning Lemontea
Author: Janelle
Review:
A ‘hand-crushed’ lemon tea in Melbourne, they only sell lemon teas but in great variety of them. What a concept!🍋

What we order✨
Charcoal Lemon Tea
Yogurt Lemon Tea
Jasmine Lemon Tea

Just thought it’ll be cool to get a Charcoal drink but for those who also want to try it out this will taste the same as their signature lemon tea, with that being said it still tasted great! I thought it tasted more limey and thus, refreshing than the normal lemon tea I’ve had💥

We only got a regular cup but their regular is super big!😳 Definitely a good drink to cure the Melbourne summer heat🔥 Will come back and try out the other lemon teas😙

- foodie insta @81.room

Name: Taning Lemontea
Author: Anh Tran
Review:
small shop with specialised drinks in
lemon tea! There were only 5 options to
choose from in their opening days, We both like the jasmine lemon tea over the 1st one. Very refreshing and the cup is so big. might be good to drink once in a while.

Name: Taning Lemontea
Author: DaDaMi Deus
Review: It’s a small store. I didn’t even find it last time I visited Melbourne in June. If you have enough traditional bubble tea, their lemon tea would be a must-try!! Full sugar is recommended!!

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Sophia Wimshurst
Review: My fav boba shop in the town! I love their strawberry yoghurt one it’s so yummmm and the staff are all very lovely they are all nice people especially Jason he’s so friendly :)

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Suvarna Lee
Review: Really lovely tea shop with a bit of a different spin. Tea is delicious and pearls are freshly made so a whole lot chewier. Drinks are not stirred so the toppings are sort of layered. It’s unusual in a very pleasant way. Staff are very friendly and patient.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Herald - Barako PH
Review:
I'm absolutely loving Popping and Tea Williams Landing! My go-to order is the Coffee Milk Tea, and it never fails to impress. The perfect blend of rich coffee and creamy milk tea is a match made in heaven.

But what really sets this place apart is the friendly staff. They're always welcoming and attentive, making sure you feel right at home.
Can't wait to come back and try more of their delicious drinks!

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Mado
Review: Worst place to drink bubble tea. Got the mango milk tea and taro milk tea, both drinks taste was so bad. I threw them in the bin. The lady who is working there is so rude as well.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Srey Chhim
Review: My go to for bubble tea. Most of the time they will get the order right ✅️  and when they do they are delicious 😋 I find when you added too many toppings, one will get missed.

Name: Rickett's Point Beaumaris
Author: Claude Picinali
Review:
Well what a beautiful place for coffee & cake with sensational views of Port phillip Bay.
Great location , super friendly staff, a MUST go to for any one who has never been.
The atmosphere is lovely and you could sit and watch the world go by!!
I highly recommend this place

Name: Rickett's Point Beaumaris
Author: alona tomakin-barrett
Review: Spent my sister's birthday at this beautiful place. The food,service and atmosphere is divine. Accepts walk ins.

Name: Rickett's Point Beaumaris
Author: Sarah North
Review:
I ate here in June 2024. For menu a little overpriced. The pricing of the parking out the front is extortionate, though this is not the fault of the cafe.
There is a wide variety of food and service was pretty quick, though it was quiet. The service is friendly and efficient. No table service and you must order at the counter. Nice views and lovely location. I ate the special of spiced lentil soup with bread which was tasty and very filling. My colleague had the ricketts point burger which he enjoyed though the chips were a little soggy.

Name: Rickett's Point Beaumaris
Author: ian gordon
Review:
Special place to dine. One of Melbourne's best locations with food cooked to perfection.  Staff are friendly and prompt with their service.

Cannot fault.

At busy times parking can be difficult.  But that can be overcome with patience.

Name: Rickett's Point Beaumaris
Author: life
Review: Wow I just popped in for a coffee after a beautiful run on the track.. a hidden little park and this place is oh so cosy warm and friendly with great coffee !!

Name: New Tea
Author: Marie Le
Review: This place I will go to for a refreshing beverage. They choose the finest and authentic tea. The fruits tea menu are delicious. My favourite is green tea cheese. The cup sealed it makes it leak proof, keeping you clean and on the move. Great service, James is polite and friendly. Store always look nice and clean.

Name: New Tea
Author: Oscar Riches
Review:
Tea is good.
Service is fine not rude. In fact since I've been back service is better.
Selection of new teas to keep interest is also nice.
Taro and sago thick not too sweet.
Tried the soy tea oolong and was pleased.
Best tea in Springvale beats most of the other franchises

Name: New Tea
Author: Victor
Review: Bubble tea store in Springvale. Quite enjoy my bubble tea here. You do pay a premium but tea taste fresh and the pearls are nice and bouncy.

Name: New Tea
Author: Thay
Review: love the service here at New Tea, the staff are friendly and welcoming, this oolong milk tea taste so so so good among all bubble tea shop I’ve tried. 9/10 for this flavor, must try this shop for your next bubble tea list.

Name: New Tea
Author: Lyva Sou
Review: Beautiful experience, i tried the drinks there and it did not disappoint. The creme brulee was phenomenal it was their signature drink. Staff were nice and friendly and were very helpful. The owner is very nice and welcoming as well. Reasonable price for good quality drinks. 10/10 would go again😄

Name: Naröcha Premium Tea Room
Author: Rouven Grossmann
Review:
Good place to grab a matcha latte and some sweet treats.
Enjoyed the coconut pandan cake a lot💥💥💥💥💥.
Can’t wait to try the other sweets there.
They also offer a range of cakes and bubble teas.

Name: Naröcha Premium Tea Room
Author: venice min
Review: I can’t believe that can served out to customers. Tasted strong chemicals favored As you can see the photos ！Worst drink! Never ever had in my life. If you can’t make this flavor don’t make it . Disgusting taste

Name: Naröcha Premium Tea Room
Author: Shandy Mae
Review: I was randomly craving bubble tea and ordered at Narocha because of their cakes and variety of bubble tea flavors!!!! They did not disappoint 🫶🏻🫶🏻 My first time ordering here but it certainly won’t be the last. Thank you to the lovely staffs for the sample of your matcha strawberry cake 🍰❤️ It made my day so much better!!

Name: Naröcha Premium Tea Room
Author: Suvarna Lee
Review: This is hands down the best tea place in Melbourne!!! And that’s massive considering I have tried such a large variety of bubble teas! The staff are amazing and their service is just outstanding. The place is large enough to sit down, enjoy your milk or fruit teas and settle into a delicious small cake! Their cakes are fantastic too! The flavours of tea and cakes are endless but I recommend the grape and vanilla, mango and pandan or mango and Thai milk tea cake! Just yummm!

Name: Naröcha Premium Tea Room
Author: Mel K
Review: Such a little gem for anyone who love bubble tea. This unique shop had lots of Japanese variety and Malaysian flavor as well as usual bubble tea varieties. Finally hojicha is on the bubble tea menu. They use A2 milk for their tea, which can suit for everyone. They also made the Japanese branded powder for their Japanese tea. This tea shop menu show luxury feeling with usual price. Love this tea shop so much. Plenty of indoor seating and very spacious. Social distance definitely not an issue at all. Very close to train station and located on the main street. Plenty of parking around. Stuff are very helpful to explain their menu. I definitely will come back for other menu :)

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Chau Tran
Review: The drinks were great. I’d love to try other drinks at Choulee later. But, the staff members were not friendly and welcoming with a cursoy attitude and no facial expression at all, although it was not busy at that time. I hope the store will take this into consideration and bring the customers better customer experience. ❤️

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Leonard
Review:
Really fun, clean, and vibrant atmosphere for bubble teas, yogurt drinks and more.
I ordered the people rice yogurt drink which was really good.

Aside from it being a tad bit more sweeter than I prefer and the rice being too small and not as cherry... all was good. I recommend the rice yogurt over Milk Flower place.

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Prashna Gautam
Review:
I love this place, I've been here thrice. I ordered the passion fruit tea for the first try, which was sincerely my first time drinking a fruit based tea but the only thing I can say about it is that it was very refreshing in the 30 degree weather of Melbourne. The next two times I have ordered the Earl Grey tea, since it's my favourite tea base. I have enjoyed adjusting the sweetness level and the milk as I like less sugar or no sugar in my drink.
I brought a friend of mine along with me, who didn't find boba tea as appealing when we had it in other places but she loved this one. We went there today and I found that the quality of the drinks have been consistent which I have not found in other places, so I like this place + I can sit and talk with my friend while drinking tea. The staff at the front desk was also really friendly and the service overall was great... I'm looking forward to exploring more flavours in the future, I love match and strawberries so maybe that'd be a good one to try...

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: v
Review: visited here multiple times & so far the drinks have always been good quality! store interior is also aesthetic so it’s nice to chill inside. drinks have always been served quite fast too! recommended to try :)

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Brissy Reviews
Review: Such a cute bubble tea shop. Mu sister and I loved it. It was a bit hard to find using apple maps but that might have been my phone.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Emmy Lien
Review:
The staff was very friendly and enthusiastic. All of the drink is also delicious and suitable for all ages.

I have returned here so many times and still loving drinks in here.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Nuramalina Hassan
Review: Service is great and Fast  and the staff members are always friendly.we always come here to get the “Dirt-Tea”. My boys love it.  There’s always plenty of pearls. Today I had the watermelon quenchers.  It’s one of my favourite. Love it.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Charlotte Vine
Review: Usually enjoy this place but was super excited for a tea tonight and ordered, and was being prepared for around 15-20 minutes and then my order was cancelled all of a sudden with no reason provided? Which meant the other tea place I like was then closed when I tried to place order elsewhere. So a bit cut. Was keen for bubble tea. :(

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Diary of Baby boys
Review:
Love how the staff is so friendly and welcoming.
Being a bubble tea lover, this place has the best tasting flavours for bubble tea. Definitely coming back.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Tulsi Thakar
Review: We ordered mango milk tea, and it came up really tasty. The staff was very friendly and fast. The service was quite quick. Highly recommended for all those who love to drink bubble tea.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jan Marie Limbo
Review: we love the mango slush and the brown sugar boba here!! the staff is also super lovely ❤️

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Ariel Lim
Review: I ordered the Taro milk tea with taro balls. The best taro milk tea I tried si far.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Furever Grooming
Review: Super friendly owner and staff, always love to come here for a nice cup of bubble tea!

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jenslie George
Review: Love the bubble tea here. It’s the best. The staff is very friendly.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: O L
Review: Lovely service, nice decor. Loved the fresh fruit ingredients in the drinks, and a very good amount for the price. The drinks look beautiful and taste great, I recommend the Grateful Grape tea.

Name: JSY Tea Westfield Doncaster
Address: Westfield Shopping Centre, G151/619 Doncaster Rd, Doncaster
Author: hoi yiu wong
Review:
Great shop with great teas! Enjoyed the tea tastings and the experience of watching them brewing the teas in traditional ways.
They do serve very good Matcha and Oolong teas which are my favourites! I ordered their Organic Tea Ceremonial Grade Matcha Latte and it’s the best matcha I’ve ever had…
I tried their new arrival Peach oolong as well, and its natural flavor is just as same as a real peach!

Name: JSY Tea Westfield Doncaster
Address: Westfield Shopping Centre, G151/619 Doncaster Rd, Doncaster
Author: Yao Bob
Review:
I went to meet a friend in Doncaster today and found this JSY TEA very interesting. The environment is great and it's real Chinese tea, not Bubble tea. ordered a hand made brewa tea and a cold brew tea, the taste is great, it's really made from very good tea leaves, not the industrialized product made from tea leaf powder that Bubble tea uses.
The service staff was very nice and introduced a lot of tea knowledge. It is a very interesting store.

Name: JSY Tea Westfield Doncaster
Address: Westfield Shopping Centre, G151/619 Doncaster Rd, Doncaster
Author: nib
Review: Sweet and knowledgeable staff who offer samples and recommendations when you need it :) Pleasant and warm environment with large range of teas and tea-wares to browse and choose from!

Name: JSY Tea Westfield Doncaster
Address: Westfield Shopping Centre, G151/619 Doncaster Rd, Doncaster
Author: Ester Glucose
Review: A very nice Taiwanese tea shop! They have a wide selection of tea, and the staff members have great expertise. The cold brew osmanthus oolong tea for takeaway was incredible, crazy fragrance and tastes great - Would recommend

Name: JSY Tea Westfield Doncaster
Address: Westfield Shopping Centre, G151/619 Doncaster Rd, Doncaster
Author: Y.H. Lin
Review:
Today I randomly wandered on the ground floor and was attracted by the aromatic and adorable decorations of this Taiwanese tea house, JSY Tea. I knew this brand since the Taiwanese director hosts a podcast sharing tea stories.
They currently invite customers to have a free lucky draw upon entry. I got a “Si ji chun Oolong” with a warm blessing “Wishes granted”. The staff invited me to experience the process of tea brewing, explained the tones and benefits of oolong, and let me enjoy the tea with elegant tea set.
As a Taiwanese, I feel they are enthusiastic about bringing authentic and premium quality tea to customers overseas. I enjoyed the moment of tasting my favourite teas and connecting the tastes and flavours to my life experiences…haha that’s right! Plenty choices in JSY Tea provides so many wonderful teas that can challenge taste buds. I would say this is a treasure place for tea lovers:)

Name: NUTTEA Melbourne Central
Address: Next to Axil Coffee Roasters, GD078/211 La Trobe St Located:, Melbourne
Author: Helen Evangelina
Review:
Was looking for a good warm drink because it was cold and decided to go here. We got the hot chocolate hazelnut and earl grey w/ chocolate nut cream. I loved the earl grey - the nut cream was so creamy and it went well with the earl grey. Such a good winter warmer!

I would definitely get their nut cream again - so good😍

Name: NUTTEA Melbourne Central
Address: Next to Axil Coffee Roasters, GD078/211 La Trobe St Located:, Melbourne
Author: Keven Luan
Review:
Solid place for bubble tea.

Got the most popular choice Earl Grey Tea with Chocolate Nut Cream and the chocolate nut cream was doing a lot of heavy lifting. The tea was mediocre but it was the cream that made it taste good.

Expect to spend $10 on a bubble tea here.

Name: NUTTEA Melbourne Central
Address: Next to Axil Coffee Roasters, GD078/211 La Trobe St Located:, Melbourne
Author: Where is Beo
Review:
Have you tried nut mylk tea before?
We tried the new “Dragonmelon” series which was released to celebrate the year of the Dragon 🐉💗
Since there’s no dairy or puree (they blend real fruit for you!) the taste is definitely lighter and more refreshing.
You can adjust the ice and sugar level as well :))

Name: NUTTEA Melbourne Central
Address: Next to Axil Coffee Roasters, GD078/211 La Trobe St Located:, Melbourne
Author: Hana H
Review: The nut cream was soooo good. Super earthy with the right amount of sweet n salty. Expensive but definitely coming back for another drink.

Name: NUTTEA Melbourne Central
Address: Next to Axil Coffee Roasters, GD078/211 La Trobe St Located:, Melbourne
Author: Rothman Lo
Review: Went here on Monday and the drinks were delicious! The employee, Jess, was very friendly and super helpful. She also explained how to enjoy the drinks. Great job!

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Sallie Morrison
Review: A special treat that has turned into a weekly outing for my son and I. The staff are amazing and know my order each time. Tea tastes great and I can’t wait for summer to have the frozen teas.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Kevin Fear
Review: Best bubble tea I ever had. affordable, taste good, customer service was lovely, and the consistency of quality it shows they care about the product. Highly recommend. Beats franchise bubble tea. I had strawberry with green tea and herbal jelly. I just wish they had a ward system buying their bubble tea. Had plenty selection there as well.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Katrina Blinoff
Review: I suppose I’m a regular here!! They remember my order and it’s such a cute shop, always feel comfortable going there. Tasty and close place to my house! Recommend it.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Anna K
Review:
Yummy taro milk tea, it was so tasty that I forgot to make a photo earlier 😋
Thank you!

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Jess Y
Review: Loved the bubble tea here. Made just right and friendly staffs. Thank you Tea Break. I will be back 😊

Name: T-Theory
Author: Yosh Ha
Review: I was having a bad day, and the only thing that’s going to cheer me up is a large, fresh and tasty jasmine green milk tea with less ice, standard sugar (and black pearls yea). So today’s choice of vendor was the M store (undisclosed name for legal purposes). The milk tea was horrendous. It was so bad that we couldn’t finish our milk teas and we had to throw them away, then we decided to drive to T Theory because it’s right around the corner to dispose the two untouched M milk teas and to get new ones. When we got to the godly T Theory store, the employee initially told me that the store was closed. Feeling defeated I ranted about how terrible my day was and the one thing that was going to save it was even worse. Hearing that, that angel of a staff member offered to make me the most heavenly and beautifully constructed cups of milk tea ever grazed the surface of our Earth. It is so refreshing and so soul touching that my boyfriend shed a single tear. So thank you, for that kind stranger that I did not have the courtesy to ask for her name, for saving my day, and making my whole week. To T-Theory, from your new biggest fan/customer, if that lady (working at 10.30pm on 31st July 2024) wasn’t an owner, you MUST raise her salary by at least 25%. I thank you, T-Theory for introducing the world to her. We will continue taking out business back here REPEATEDLY and we urge who ever reads this to do the same. Thank you for your reading, evidently, I poured my heart and soul into this review, as did that staff member with our milk teas.

Name: T-Theory
Author: Rabia Zafar
Review:
Super yummy! Love bubble tea? Or have always wanted to try it? If you love bubble tea make sure you try T-Theory🧋
🥭🥝When it comes to the range of boba drinks and fruit teas available at T-Theory you might as well have a second stomach so you can taste all the deliciousness! 🤩So many great options! They also had faloodeh and it was just perfect combo with the bubble tea! Beautiful cosy store!
The options were fantastic and plenty, and the Mango Fruit tea was just delicious and very refreshing!! Overall, delish bubble teas, conveniently located. A must MUST go!!

Name: T-Theory
Author: Davina H.
Review:
Management seems questionable. Why is the employee working alone with no other assistance? Saw the server dealing with 15 orders on her own which made the waiting time a bit long...

However, I was served by a nice female indo server. Had a pleasant chat with her about our hometowns. She was very sweet and made my order super fast!

But please fix the management.

Name: T-Theory
Author: Karen
Review:
Ordered jasmine green milk tea and brown sugar milk tea, contained barely any flavour. Tasted like watery milk.

Never ordering here again, no wonder there’s only one in Melbourne!!!

Name: T-Theory
Author: Meghana Karande
Review: In Love with their bubble Milk Tea! Super close to University of Melbourne. It is usually hard to get the basic drinks right, but you will love it here with their multiple options of fruit tea, slushee and yogurts to choose from. And the decor is cute too!!

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Sarah
Review: Tried the teas for the first time today and they were all excellent. Perfect ratios of sugar, ice and flavour. We ordered the honeydew, Thai red, lychee and signature. Can't wait to try more flavours next visit.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Kim Chu
Review: Oolong Milk Tea with pearls is my go-to! Usually have the one with ice, but got a hot one today which is great too! Love it! Also very friendly staff!

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Amanda B
Review: Ordered a few teas via delivery expecting an average experience, but was surprisingly blown away. Easily some of the best, if not THE best, teas I’ve ever had. The taro tea specifically, it’s my favourite tea but can be really hit or miss depending on how the place makes it - the one from here was perfectly made, exceptionally smooth and creamy with the right amount of flavour. The fruit teas are made with a really lovely syrup that has a taste unlike other tea places. Highly recommend, this will be my new regular tea place.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Maria M Dimitrov
Review: Definitely one of my favourite bubble tea stores, I even bought there cup and get 50 cents off every time I use that cup. Good price range as other places like to up there prices which end up being too expensive. Good variety of flavours, but wish they could add kiwifruit fruit tea as not many bubble tea places do that flavour. Overall, amazing store with friendly staff :)

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Vanessa Wong-Lee
Review: A bubble tea store with the most laid out display of toppings. 4 sizes to pick from and also a unique can style for an additional cost. Honeu milk tea taro pudding and pearls. The tea is aromatic with hints of honey. The pearls are so soft and chewy whilst the taro pudding has a strong flavour, perfect to match with the drink.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Josh Briscoe (Aer)
Review: I love going to Gotcha M-City. First time I went upstairs as I’m a worker nearby I came across this bubble tea shop, the staff were very welcoming and helpful because it was my first time buying a drink at Gotcha. There’s a lot of variety of drinks on offer which I appreciate a lot. Their smiles make my day which is why I come there a lot now. Very quick and efficient to bring out drinks to customers including me!. I highly recommend everyone to come and visit Gotcha M-City they make great quality drinks and their customer service is amazing. =)

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Emdwyn Anderson
Review: They make fresh pearls every day, so the texture is always fantastic (I got classic pearl milk tea). As it was the end of the day, they were getting rid of their excess pearls and gave us free pearls on the house!!! Love these people and their tea!!!!!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Dan T
Review: Excellent service, helpful and the drinks were delicious. First time having Brulee though, some instructions would have been good (I didn't stir and the Brulee was all at the bottom) but overall even the end bit was delicious, I just wish I mixed it prior!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Lorraine Goh
Review:
24/9/2024 9pm

Absolutely appalled by the customer service I received today at the M-City Gotcha store. I have never been treated so poorly by wait staff in my entire life.

The lady working picked up her phone whilst taking our order and proceeded to speak on the phone and then gave us the incorrect drinks. When we came back to tell her, she was extremely rude, dismissive and unapologetic.

Not only that, she was also extremely rude to the other wait staff. Definitely not a good look and a very disappointing experience.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Hakan T.
Review: If I'm ever feeling like some bubble tea, I always find myself making my way to this store. Easily my favourite bubble tea in Melbourne! Dom is very friendly, polite and always greets his customers with a huge smile. He is always happy to give recommendations according to my taste and likes. He finished preparing my drinks after a couple minutes, with the perfect ratios and freshest ingredients. Highly recommend for anyone nearby in the area craving refreshing beverage.

Name: Toppings n Tea
Review: The worker was so friendly and explained how the place worked since we had never been before. The price is only based off of cup size and is very reasonable (this cup was $8.40). There was a lot of toppings to choose from and quite a few drink flavours too. My only issue was the you can’t control the sugar amount in the drinks, and they all tasted quite bitter and strong. Would’ve liked if they were a bit sweeter!

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Clare Taylor
Review: When we got there we got greeted and shown how the process of creating your own tea. Loved that we could sample the flavours and the variety of mix ins they had on offer. Process was quick and easy and tea was yummy, thank you! 🧋🩷

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Yvonne Lum
Review: This place is really cute and for a change, you get to make your own mixture of bubble tea. Reasonable price. Customer service is fantastic! Mady, the sweet girl full of smiles, showed us how it works and gave us a good run down of the options. Good job! Definitely recommend.

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Nara Lee
Review: Fun and unique experience of picking out your own tea and toppings! It’s a great place to try new combinations at a reasonable price per cup. Staff are friendly as well and the store is very cute and easy to locate! Would recommend!

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Tomomi
Review:
I recently visited a DIY bubble tea shop and had an amazing experience! The concept is fantastic—you can add as many toppings as you want, which made creating my bubble tea so much fun😍 The variety of teas available is impressive, and you can even taste them before making your choice. I noticed some people mixing different teas, which is a great option for those who like to experiment.

The staff were incredibly helpful and kind, even though they were quite busy. They always had a smile on their faces and were very friendly when talking to customers! Overall, it was a delightful visit, and I highly recommend this bubble tea shop to anyone looking for a unique and enjoyable experience!

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nina Genuino
Review: We regularly go here for their milk tea. It’s our first time to try their Bahn mi and it’s the best!! Better than Lily’s! and better than the ones we’ve had in Vietnam. The bread was crispy on the outside but light and fluffy on the inside and the crispy pork was sooo crunchy 🤯 I regret sharing because it’s soooo good 🤤🤤🤤

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nicole
Review:
Very friendly service, I was greeted as soon as I walked in the store. Nice decor and a clean store if you’re wanting to dine in.
I had a drink chosen based on the menu attached to the shop front window but discovered heaps more options once inside the store and promptly changed my mind 😆 Was then blown away to discover my Mango Milk Tea had actual mango in it… totally thought it would just  be a flavouring syrup.

UPDATE: Have now tried their Ba Minh 🤤 Me, being the fussy features that I am, meant I wanted mine without salad etc. but I somehow managed to still get a sauce… thankfully it was DELICIOUS! Hands down, it’s up there with one of the best I’ve had. Crispy roll, succulent pork and oh so tasty.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Andrew Carlson
Review: I came here for lunch and had their rice paper rolls. 1 prawn and 1 chicken. OMG so delicious and fresh. Very flavourful with fresh herbs and salad. Their spicy / soy dipping sauce with so good. And their friendly delightful service made my day. Also affordable too. This place is a little gem. Thank you.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: crisy
Review: i love this place! i always come after work and it’s one of the only boba places open. such amazing couple running the shop and always working hard! WONDERFUL CUSTOMER SERVICE! definitely needs more recognition! i absolutely love the drinks, visit if you love more traditional styled bubble tea! fierce competition at werribee but this place always continues to make amazing boba. DEFINITELY RECOMMEND!!

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: hallemah assaad
Review: Best bubble tea store in Werribee, most polite, friendly owners and delicious bubble tea no matter what you choose.

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Ines Fernandes
Review:
Absolutely recommend!

The decoration of this place is just gorgeous and it is probably one of the most instagramable bubble tea places I have been. Super soft tones of salmon and white, with some gold touches and the vibe is just so enjoyable that you will want to sit here for hours!

I actually have visited this place 5 times (in 2 months!) and have to say that I will keep coming back. Their acai bowls are AMAZING in terms of size, taste, consistency and toppings! Price is also very reasonable and fair - it comes in a small or regular size.
They now have another option of pistachio soft serve and although I haven't tried it yet, I have to make sure I do next time.

The bubble tea menu they have is also incredible in terms of options as expected and they also have soy milk available as a diary-free option.

There are also other items on the menu such as mochi waffle that looks like a normal waffle but actually has a mochi consistency! How cool. There's 3 different flavours and they are quite popular.

The staff was lovely and the place/atmosphere is just bliss.
Would 100% come back!

…
[Follow my adventures on instagram @crushinglimits]

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Jen
Review:
✨BBT & AÇAI✨

Head to Tea Royale to get their açai and bbt because you won’t regret it! Super refreshing and so many options to choose from! Loved the açai and drinks were so tasty! 🤤

Don’t forget to try their mochi waffles because these are AMAZING! 🤩🤩

Featured:
🧋 royal milk tea
💜 taro milk tea
🥭 mango grape oolong tea
🍓 strawberry yakult
🫐 açai w/ pb
🧇 Biscoff mochi waffle

Thank you for the invite. 💌

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Janelle
Review:
Finally trying them after hearing that it‘s one of the most popular bubbletea in town🥸 I was actually surprised that they have soooo many different tea/drinks options to choose from😲 Here’s what we‘ve got✨

🍇Green grape Yakult
🍇Green grape Smoothie
🧋Phoenix Pearl Bubbletea
🥤Pistachio Shake
🍵Peach Spring Tea
🧇Mochi Waffle
🧇Biscoff Mochi Waffle

The Latest additions to the menu are the Green Grape series❇️ They were so refreshing and there were actually some big green grapes inside the drink🤤 The Pistachio Shake also got me! My first time seeing/trying this and I love it, if you love a creamy milk shake and/or love pistachio like me, definitely try it✨

Have to mention their mochi waffles as well, cause they are actually chewy!! And it’s $4.5 only what the😲 To be the biscoff mochi waffle wasn‘t that strong in biscoff, it was rather mild, so I like the original mochi waffle more, enjoyed the taste of their batter🫶🏻

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Davy S
Review:
I love bubble tea and this place offer a variety and more!
My fav is Taro smoothie with coconut jelly. Soo good!
Their Jasmine and black pearl also good.
They currently have the grapes + yakult combo which is delicious too
Happy sippimg
O and the prize is reasonable also.

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Noland Hoang
Review: Pistachio shake not so good but cost 10$ , everytime i purchase drinks here its a disappointment hurt my stomach so bad probably because high in fat. Their strawberry yakult tasted really bad. but cant get enough of their mochi waffle , best dessert to munch on

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Emily Le
Review:
Overall amazing experience here. Pearls are made fresh every 2-3hrs cause apparently they do it in small batches at a time so pearls always fresh. Good mixing with sugar level and ice that is not too sweet but also not too bland

P/s: the tall guy with glasses is cute and nice, plus he has a puppy that he brings to work sometimes and so so so so so cuteeeeee

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: M O R M E N
Review: It was pretty delicious. The Dirtea was like a brown sugar bubble milk tea but with creamy add-ons. The super Dirtea is the same but without fresh milk.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Cairo K
Review: Hands down the best TEASER in MELBOURNE! From all the drinks down to the taste 🥰🥰 I order every week atleast, the drinks are always the most tastiest at this store , I usuallly order 1 LT Fresh fruit tea and Lemon Bomber, but recently have got into Punched Lemon Ice Tea (Strawberry) ! I love that they are open late as well! Thanks so much! ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Alexander Pomnikow
Review: Delicious bubble tea right in southbank. Lively staff, great tasting bubble tea and awesome trading hours. Not much salad I could say about this place. Used to have a gaming centre, but how turned into an Asian shop. Nice variety of stuff for sale there.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Matt
Review: Share a space with a gaming lounge and a snack shop.  Drinks were not too bad.

Name: machi machi Caulfield
Address: 11 Sir John Monash Dr, Caulfield East
Author: Kezzia Chan
Review:
I love this place especially after uni.

But sometimes I could be waiting for my tea for 15 minutes. I know it gets busy, but surely there is a more efficient way of making the teas both for online and in store.

Besides that I love this place. The people there are always nice and the tea is amazing.

Name: machi machi Caulfield
Address: 11 Sir John Monash Dr, Caulfield East
Author: Chen Wang
Review: Yuna provided great service and the perfect smile when I was struggling with my homework🥰

Name: machi machi Caulfield
Address: 11 Sir John Monash Dr, Caulfield East
Author: Ara Shin
Review: Really good bubble tea ( and obsessed with their Machi mango series^u^) The wait time is kinda long but it’s understandable since they are often quite busy and they make sure to warn you of that when you order which is considerate!!

Name: machi machi Caulfield
Address: 11 Sir John Monash Dr, Caulfield East
Author: GossipGirl XOXO
Review:
The price does not match the quality!
The tapioca pearls are very hard, if this is late in the day, just before the closing time, I can understand, but it’s around 3pm.
I don’t think I will go back again.

Reply to business’s (owner’s) reply:
1: No, I drank this straightaway. I threw it away on my way to Caulfield Village Shopping Center.
2: my drink was no ice at all.

Name: machi machi Caulfield
Address: 11 Sir John Monash Dr, Caulfield East
Author: Benya Surasit
Review: Waited for 1 drink more than 5 mins and no order, came out they did all takeaway order who ordered after me, i ordered normal sweet but it was tasteless.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Stelly
Review:
Love the Hello Kitty collaboration! Their large drinks come in cute Hello Kitty cups and they have lots of Hello Kitty character merch - including tumblers, drink bottles, etc.

Their fruity drinks are my favourite - especially the Golden Passionfruit and the signature Fruit Tea! Super refreshing 😍

This location even has seating areas!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Alice Cossette
Review: Comfy seating and nice atmosphere. We ordered the signature pearl milk tea and passion fruit tea. 🧋 Nice flavours and everything is customizable 😃 You order via a tablet and service is very quick. Recommend this place for all bubble tea lovers after studying at State Library 📚

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Payel Gayen
Review:
Gotcha, at Melbourne Central Shopping Mall is a perfect place for bubble tea enthusiasts. My taste buds were treated to a symphony of flavors as I savored both the Lychee Green Tea and the Gotcha Signature Fruit Tea. What truly sets Gotcha apart is their commitment to customization - you can fine-tune your beverage to perfection by adjusting sugar and ice levels to your liking. I, for one, chose to savor the pure essence of these exquisite teas.

To sweeten the deal further, a special offer graced our visit - the opportunity to enjoy any two of their top 20 drinks in generously sized mugs for a mere $10.

The staff at Gotcha were not only diligent but also friendly, adding a warm and inviting atmosphere to the experience. If you're seeking a refreshing and flavorful journey for your taste buds, look no further than Gotcha. It's a gem in the heart of Melbourne, waiting to delight your senses.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Timinmelbourne
Review:
I was recently invited to attend the worldwide launch of @gotchafreshtea and @pokemon

Gotcha farm their own tea, and their drinks are natural. Yep, there's no chemicals or additives. Their drinks are absolutely delicious. I had a Taro fresh milk w mini pearls, which was so good. My mate had a blue pea fruit tea, which was fantastic

Lovely friendly service and pretty quick given that everything is made to order. I'll be back.

Collab

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Cade Terence
Review:
Fantastic atmosphere and drinks, one of my favourite tea places.

The atmosphere is cozy and looks great, and you are able to order your tea with all specifications (sugar level, ice level, size) using the touch screen. The pearls are slightly warm due to being freshly made, and they give you a lot. You can really taste the tea 🍵 which I am very satisfied with - it's not just sugar and milk. Great stuff

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Sophia Wimshurst
Review: My fav boba shop in the town! I love their strawberry yoghurt one it’s so yummmm and the staff are all very lovely they are all nice people especially Jason he’s so friendly :)

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Suvarna Lee
Review: Really lovely tea shop with a bit of a different spin. Tea is delicious and pearls are freshly made so a whole lot chewier. Drinks are not stirred so the toppings are sort of layered. It’s unusual in a very pleasant way. Staff are very friendly and patient.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Herald - Barako PH
Review:
I'm absolutely loving Popping and Tea Williams Landing! My go-to order is the Coffee Milk Tea, and it never fails to impress. The perfect blend of rich coffee and creamy milk tea is a match made in heaven.

But what really sets this place apart is the friendly staff. They're always welcoming and attentive, making sure you feel right at home.
Can't wait to come back and try more of their delicious drinks!

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Mado
Review: Worst place to drink bubble tea. Got the mango milk tea and taro milk tea, both drinks taste was so bad. I threw them in the bin. The lady who is working there is so rude as well.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Srey Chhim
Review: My go to for bubble tea. Most of the time they will get the order right ✅️  and when they do they are delicious 😋 I find when you added too many toppings, one will get missed.

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Christophe Demouche
Review:
We ordered:
Taro Pearl Green Milk Tea
Red Beans Matcha, Very refreshing delicious drink, great customer service, will come back and try another delicious Boba Tea. As a bonus this store is open until 11:30pm when others around are closed.
If you're a bubble tea lover, you should definitely check this out

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: ADITI SAHA
Review:
The most refreshing boba feast you can have in the city @dingteaelizabeth.melb where they use quality, authentic and local ingredients to make the drinks.

What we had:

Berry sparkling drink, this will remind you of all things summer, so relaxing to sip on this even on a cold winter afternoon. The fresh minty taste will really make you feel refreshed. Must try
Aloe Vera honey and lemon drink, the sweet and sourness are so perfectly balanced in this drink. Strongly recommended and it’s very delicious
Brown sugar boba milk, oh my this is by far the best brown sugar boba drink I had in the city, the boba is so soft and melts in my mouth, the warmth of this drink is perfect to make you feel good in this weather. Very yummy and addictive, also it’s not very sweet enough to make you enjoy the flavours.

Also the vibe here is so cool and relaxing, just walk in to their store on Elizabeth street, order your favourite drink or two and enjoy it.

Also the prices are super standard and reasonable and the service is very prompt on a busy weekend.

Guys do checkout @dingteaelizabeth.melb this weekend for a tasty and refreshing boba treat with your friends and family.

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Stephanie Rose
Review:
🍮 Creme Brûlée Brown Sugar Pearl Milk Tea
🍏 Apple Green Fruit Tea, Star Jelly

Ding Tea is a bubble tea brand that believes in the infinite possibility of tea - no matter black tea or milk tea, consistently launching new and refined drinks. They are a big brand, promoting their Taiwanese tea over 5 continents! 🌎

I’m not the biggest expert on bubble tea, only really began drinking them this year and I often go for a Lychee Green Tea. When I saw their Creme Brûlée Milk Tea, I knew I had to try something new. I almost wish I hadn’t because now I’m OBSESSED! It is so perfectly balanced and creamy, with delicious brown sugar pearls and a crispy, blowtorched, caramelised cream top. I’ll be returning frequently for this one. 🔥🔥

I also tried their Apple Green Tea with Star Jelly, which was also really nice and I enjoyed the different texture of the jelly opposed to a regular soft Pearl. I recommend going with 50% less sugar in this flavour.

Staff were very friendly and were happy to help you through their many choices and explain them to you. The venue could have been more refined but that is my only feedback here! Great option for your CBD bubble tea fix.

⭐️ 4.5/5 (Great)

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Sarah Melbs

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Elina Ramezani
Review: The bubble tea was delightful, but unfortunately, the overall experience was marred by the messy and untidy environment. The bagasse disposal area was right in front of the customers, which wasn’t very pleasant. The place didn’t feel very clean.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Mandie L.
Review:
(Reviewing on behalf of my friend)…
Such a fun and yummy experience! They let you sample all the different milk tea flavours and they all tasted beautiful! Loved the honeydew flavour most. Wonderful range of toppings too!

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Mitchell Hoeboer
Review:
Actual S-tier boba.
You pay for a cup, add your own toppings & ice then choose the tea flavour you want.
They give you a little sample cup to try the tea before you decide which you want.
Definitely going to tell my boba appreciating friends about this place.

Also staff were super friendly and explain how it works if you haven't been there before.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Michy
Review:
I loved how fresh the boba tasted as well as all the variety of teas that we got to try before we made our drink.

Today I got the Thai milk tea with taro pudding, custard pudding and brown sugar pearls.

The staff was also very friendly!

I would recommend coming to toppings & tea when you are or ever go to Springvale 🧋

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Lissa Breen (LissaCaldina)
Review:
AUSTRALIA’S FIRST DIY BUBBLE TEA (TOPPINGS N TEA) !!

With UNLIMITED teas and toppings. It was fun and my 1st experience with DIY Bubble Tea. I mixed 3 type of teas + 7 toppings, OMG heaven on earth. You only need to purchase the cup size and you can choose whichever tea flavor & toppings as much as your cup can hold . The best ever bubble tea.
You will be spoiled with more than 10 types of tea flavors and 20+ toppings to choose from and trust me you’re gonna want more than 1 cup in your hand. The lady(staff) in this photo was super friendly, helpful and funny as well .

Located just 5 mins walk from Springvale station .

It’s such a fun experience like no other ‼️ Great Bubble Tea with Great Service.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: May Vuong
Review:
Notice the ice machine, or else you gonna end up with a no-ice bubble tea like me 😂 this place is nice since you can add on as many toppings as you like but doesn't need to worry about the price. The only minus point is that you cannot adjust the sugar level tho

TOPPING & TEA
📍33A Buckingham Ave, Springvale VIC 3171
⏰ 10am - 9pm
💰 $6.30 small size
☑️🌕🌕🌕🌑🌑

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Dip Silwal
Review:
I had 2large teas for $10 and it was great.The place was nice and clean and the cups were fancy,loved it.
Also the customer service was excellent,so I'll surely come back again.
Highly recommended🙏

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Susi Sushma
Review: I ordered mango milk tea with signature pearls, my transactions went through from my phone, was not on pending. Initially they didn’t want to give me my drink they said bank will refund me in 2, 3 days and if doesn’t, reach out to them and I live in Sunbury and cost me more than the drink I purchased. I demanded them to give me my drink and when they gave me the drink it was tasteless, flavourless and pearls were also less just tasted like milk and sugar.  Very bad taste. I don’t recommend them.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Foodie Files Melbourne
Review:
I have to say for a takeaway tea joint they really nail the interiors. I tried the signature fruit tea which was as the name suggests super fruity and you can see the fresh pieces floating through the vibrantly coloured cup.

I also had a passionfruit galaxy tea but found it not as full bodied although I adored its galactic multicoloured appearance. My third drink was the black sugar fresh milk tea and I absolutely loved the pearls in this. Probably a tad too sweet but I really enjoyed the flavours and I believe you can ask for half sugar if you like. There’s a crazy number of options to choose from so I was glad these three were dictated to me as the popular choice

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Katie Fretche
Review: I rarely come for strolls in the city but when I do my kids always drags me to Gotcha. They love the drinks! 10/10. We’ve had good experiences with the store and the drinks since we’ve visited a couple of time before as well. We haven’t had the time to sit inside the place and enjoy our drinks since we’re always rushing to places so I can’t give a rating on that for sure. But other than that, anyone who’s a boba fan, this place is a must try😉

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: vu minh
Review:
Good place to take a cup of milk tea. Nice and clean decorated shop. The pearls are tasty and chewy. However, the drink is too sweet compared to other milk tea shops although we already ordered 50% sugar. You can ask to change the toppings on the default drink.
Currently, they have the cute pokemon cup and mon-fri $9.9 promotion for 2 cups which is quite worth it.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Victor
Review: Vietnamese coffee shop. Generally buzzing with Vietnamese uncles and aunties. Coffee is sweet and strong. Environment is pleasant and staff polite.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: jen kak
Review: Try Vanilla Milk Tea if your stumped on flavour.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: nina eats
Review:
Best sugar cane in the area
Good value

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Ella Burkett
Review: Super amazing tea! Best range of flavours and very friendly staff. Very fairly priced too.

Name: Rainbow Tea
Author: Hannah Nguyen
Review: So yummy ! My favourite is your strawberry milk tea and 3 coloured drink. 10/10

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Daniel Saliba
Review:
It was a fairly quiet time when I arrived, but there was so much to love about this little corner of Sunbury. Kevin at the counter was incredibly charming and hospitable with his service, and the bubble tea I was served was properly delicious.
The location so close to the train station makes it remarkably convenient to visit after a day out (or before embarking on your journey), so I'd absolutely recommend paying Tea Bag 3429 a visit. Thanks Kevin!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Andrea Beattie
Review: Best bubble tea we’ve ever had. It was delicious and fresh — perfectly made. They have a great selection of flavours and toppings too, and the service was quick, professional and very friendly! Thanks guys, we’ll definitely be back!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Martin M
Review: Great selection of bubble teas and the girl who served us (Ela) was a legend - the place was nearly closing but she was very accommodating and happy to smash out a big order for us! Best customer service and tea in town!

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Brendan Foletta
Review:
I generally enjoy coming here, but when I bought a drink for my daughter, we ended up waiting for a very long time.

Customers came and went, and when I inquired about our order, the staff member told us she had already prepared it, but it was wrong, and she hadn't informed us that it was ready.

I asked her if she hadn't noticed that we were waiting for so long, which didn't make sense to me.

Frankly, I initially thought the drink on the counter was for an Uber Eats order because it was different from the one we had ordered.

She didn't acknowledge us and just placed it on the counter without even looking at us.

Name: Tea Bag (Sunbury) - Home of Bubble Tea
Author: Ishah Clay
Review: Super tasty bubble tea with the flavours we are used to. I got the brown sugar milk tea with pearls and it was SO GOOD. It had a real brown sugar taste and the pearls were the perfect texture and sweetness. We also got the honeydew milk tea and passionfruit green tea, and they were really good as well. The service was great and the owner was really friendly and helpful. I will definitely be back and will tell friends and family to go here, as it's the type of tea we really like. So glad they came to Sunbury and we don't have to go to all the way to Watergardens to get good bubble tea.

Name: Unearthed Tea & Coffee
Author: Raewyn Harper
Review:
Shopped here a year ago. Back to restock our tea's.  Have had vanilla Chai, English breakfast. Now trying Vanilla tea and their new English breakfast 😋.
Friendly owner. Loves a chat. 🥰
Will definitely be back.

Name: Unearthed Tea & Coffee
Author: Oscar Cooke-Abbott
Review: Owner is extremely knowledgeable, enthusiastic and helpful. Coffee is fresh, high quality and varied. I’m sure the tea is too!

Name: Unearthed Tea & Coffee
Author: Geoff Higgins
Review: Peter has a great product range of specialised coffee and tea. And also lovely imported chocolate and other gifts and appliances for preparing tea and coffee. My Dad has been a customer for almost 20 years. He loves the South American ground coffees for his plunger. (Peter also has a great range of coffee plungers.)

Name: Unearthed Tea & Coffee
Author: Leah Anderson
Review: Best coffee beans and tea anywhere.   Have been buying my coffee from Peter for many years.  Always fresh. Peter is well versed in  what makes a good cup of tea and coffee and has the goods to prove it. Thank you Peter . ☕️

Name: Unearthed Tea & Coffee
Author: Janet Guillot
Review: I have a been a customer for well over 10 years so this review is well overdue!  Over the years we have bought 2 coffee machines, 2 grinders and hundreds of kg of amazing locally roasted coffee beans, teas, tea pots etc from this wonderful shop.  Pete’s is terrific at sharing his extensive knowledge on tea and coffee and every week when I pop in I see how passionate and patient he is with every single customer. At the moment his shelves are adorned with the most gorgeous array of Easter Chocolates.  He stocks beautifully crafted chocolates all year round as well. The quality tea pots we sells have bought us and many of our friends that we bought them for so much joy. Yes joy. To sit with a lovely herbal tea (especially at this time) poured from one of these beautiful different coloured teapots is a treat that anyone can indulge in.  Pop in, say hello, smell the beautiful aromas and experience small business at its best.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Mandie L.
Review:
Tasted like the standard Chatime bubble tea. Nothing to complain about :-)

My friend tried the new Milo range and doesn’t recommend it (just make your own), but everything else (fruit tea, milk tea) tasted fine and good.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Joanne Fong
Review:
My recent experience at CT left me thoroughly impressed and eager to share my praise.
The atmosphere was inviting and staff were welcoming.
The service by outstanding staff Eric was flawless. He was not only attentive but also anticipated our needs without being intrusive.
Drink was right to our taste,thanks for Eric's recommendation.
I highly recommended.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Karuppusamy Vijaya
Review: Best experience at this chatime location, was served by this nice boys which gave good customer service. The atmosphere was very nice and enjoyable. I had brown sugar milk tea Drinks are very delicious!!, but too sugary less flavour but I would definitely recommend.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Pinky Tse
Review: Great location. Very easy to order. There’s option to order in person, scan QR code or self-order. Friendly staff and very clean.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Wong Jym
Review: Many thanks to Eric(the handsome cute guy) for giving excellent service. The staff is polite and attentive, friendly, going above and beyond to provide a wonderful experience. 5 star is not enough to rate for it. Would love to come again. Thanks.

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: 樱木花
Review:
Chanced upon this bubble tea outlet.
Ordered my favourite oolong lychee - not many bubble tea have this flavour.
And they put real bits of lychee in your drink. Yum!!!
Was here on a tues midday and not too busy. Drink was ready fast and taste nice.

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Elly Brown
Review: Had milk teas from here and compared to other brands I'd have to give it one star for the quality and taste. Milk tea has no milk just sugar and water not milky consistency like proper milk teas.

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Mick Kay
Review: Angela was awesome , works her backside off and still smiles after a long day and produces the goods !! Bravo Angela , she could work in any field of hospitality .

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Shazia Hakimi
Review:
Very bad customer service. Gets the drink wrong but don’t want to change it.
I called 3 times no one picked up.
I guys called me over 8 hours later now am I supposed to still have the drink.
Plus we changed the topics the lady said yes that’s fine and added the other toppings.
She doesn’t usually work there and got it wrong. We had to repeat the order 3 times but she still got it wrong

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Fiona Lim
Review: We purchased two cups of bubble tea today around 3:30pm. My daughter accidentally dropped her bubble cup onto the floor and it spilt. My daughter went back to your store to seek for help for the mess that she had created. The young lady who served us prior handled the situation calmly and well, she pulled out the chairs to barricade the mess, told us she could clean it up for us, along with her colleague. And out of good will, she even made my daughter a replacement cup of bubble tea. I can't thank her more for being so nice.

Name: Teaser The Pines Doncaster East
Author: Jessica Chen
Review: A great local bubble tea store. We ordered multiple drinks and the wait time was not as long as we expected. The drinks were amazing and the staff were really lovely. They apologised for the delay in getting our drinks out even though they were busy with lots of customers. Would highly recommend!

Name: Teaser The Pines Doncaster East
Author: Lei Ma
Review: Love the Teaser at the Pines. The team there is always friendly and welcoming. Drinks are taste refreshing and  nice. Highly recommend.

Name: Teaser The Pines Doncaster East
Author: Albee Leung
Review:
So glad there is a new store open next to my home. My partner and I saw the promotion poster and we arrived at 5.15pm on 10th October. We spent few minutes time to look on the menu, after we decided the drinks and we walked to the order counter, we wait there for a while, there is a lady staff eventually saw us and just said " we are closed", her other colleague said to her "aren't we finished at 6?" The lady said to us "we have too many orders"

My partner and  I were so disappointed 😢 You have a promotion showing the time is between 11am to 6pm. And the reason you are not accepting orders is because there are too many orders, we don't understand why you do this promotion. Moreover, we didn't see any 'Closed' or 'Sold out' signage. If so, we won't waste our time looking at the menu. They didn't even say any apologies, even they could say "oh, sorry we are sold out", this will make a bit of sense.

We will never go back again!

Name: Teaser The Pines Doncaster East
Author: Jessica Chieng
Review: The front staff lady is so friendly :) Ordered from EASI and there was no delivery person showed up so I drove to the store to pick up myself. Was quite annoyed but her customer service makes me feel better 😊

Name: Teaser The Pines Doncaster East
Author: 童淳惠（Sunny）
Review: Fast service and tasty drinks. Shop looks nice and clean. Will try different flavours next time!

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Melb Food Baby
Review: Their dorayaki are all made fresh to order so they were warm and fluffy. Really enjoyed the mango ice cream & peanut butter combo most. Their mango & coconut milk drink is also very good but recommend adding extra toppings

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Miss Culinaryy
Review: Dorayaki in melbourne made fresh on the spot! Was surprised by how huge the dorayaki were, we also enjoyed the delicious oreo cake thai milk tea, felt like drinking milk tea but with a hint of cake on it!

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Oracle Chow
Review:
right in the heart of melbourne central, this spot serves freshly made dorayaki for as low as $4! while they do serve bubble tea, i feel like their dorayaki steals the show 🍓✨

i ordered:
❤︎  matcha ice cream & red bean dorayaki ($6) ⭐️
❤︎  strawberry ice cream & nutella dorayaki ($6)
❤︎  oreo & cream cheese dorayaki ($5.50) ⭐️
❤︎  mango & coconut milk ($10.30)
❤︎  thai milk tea deluxe ($8)

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Janelle
Review:
The dorayakis are actually very soft, it tasted good esp when I had it warm!! My favourite's the ice cream one, (people who also love a cold-warm food combo dessert will get it😋) its surprisingly very yummy, I also liked their matcha ice cream! As for the drinks both of them are preety yum but the mango coconut mmmmm delicious!! I didn't know about this before I take a sip but they have coconut jellies inside, it paired so well with the drink itself🤩✨

And the doriyakis are only $6😲 so cheap💥 Had a yummy mid-day work snack minus the guilt😋😋😆 I really liked it! Will come back to try their other drinks and dorayaki flavours hehe

- foodie instagram @81.room

Name: Prime's Hai Tea
Author: Melbourneinfood
Review:
When you’re craving for dorayaki, let me spill you a secret!

They sell one of the best tasting dorayaki here!
They also sell the “durian” flavoured milk tea, which i found pleasing, as i love durian. Lol

Definitely check it out!

Name: Pearl Tea Airport West
Author: Ana Clemente
Review:
I wanted to share my recent experience at your store, as it left me quite disappointed.

Yesterday, I bought a bubble tea, but when I tried to open the seal with the straw, the cup broke. I asked the staff member for a replacement, but she laughed and told me I had to pay for a new one. I explained that the breakage wasn’t my fault, but she was dismissive and moved on to the next customer.

As a regular customer, I found this response very frustrating. Sometimes, packaging can be faulty, whether it’s a weak cup or a loose seal, and it wouldn’t have cost much to replace my drink. I hope you can understand how disappointing this experience was and consider improvements to both packaging and customer service!

Name: Pearl Tea Airport West
Author: Melvin Lay
Review: Ordered 9 different drinks for my colleagues and myself today. Overall really happy with the staff member on this morning, I apologied because there was so much to make but was extremely patient and I understood that drinks do take time to make :). Left a tip for her efforts and all my colleagues loved the drinks and they want more in the future

Name: Pearl Tea Airport West
Author: Koalafood clan
Review: Soft serve was not good at all. Pearls were hard, brown sugar syrup was pungent sour flavour & thickness consistency was like a corn flour consistency rather than sugar syrup consistency. The soft serve was an odd flavour aswell.

Name: Pearl Tea Airport West
Author: Sarath Vegasana
Review: Had the grape green tea! Was yum! My partner had a soda. Was super refreshing. They have mega size which is really good huge bubble tea drinkers!

Name: Pearl Tea Airport West
Author: Isuru Weeraratna
Review: Best bubble tea I had in Airport west and you should have Thai green bubble tea and always requests for the bubble seeds, affordable price.

Name: Tea Room at National Gallery of Victoria
Author: Brooklyn B
Review: Simply incredible! We enjoyed the high tea with champagne. Everything was incredible. All the food was beyond amazing. We were treated with care and respect. The customer service was next level! I hope the waiters and chefs are paid very well, they all deserve it. Thank you so so much.

Name: Tea Room at National Gallery of Victoria
Author: Lucien Lim
Review:
A great place to sit and chat with friends and loved ones after visiting the NGV. While the food and tea weren’t anything special, the service was so good that it made the food and drinks taste better. In particular, our main server was extremely courteous and friendly, really brightening up our day.

A lovely experience overall, highly recommended!

Name: Tea Room at National Gallery of Victoria
Author: Gina
Review: Yum yum, 🥂 club sandwiches, savory pastries, the most delicious little sweet treats topped off with Tea, scones, Jam & cream. With a nice walk around NGV. Who would have thought this little place existed 😍

Name: Tea Room at National Gallery of Victoria
Author: Bronwyn Dajczer
Review:
Fabulous experience of High Tea @NGV. It was busy as it's the Christmas/New Year break but we were warmly greeted, served with grace and the food was delicious.
The Champagne was creamy and refreshing, the only fault was the thick glassed flute. The food was amazing and just enough without being too much to enjoy.
Definitely recommend this treat 💕

Name: Tea Room at National Gallery of Victoria
Author: Kim R
Review: Very enjoyable with a menu that catered for all tastes.  Fresh local produce from local suppliers including the Yarra Valley which was presented well and in a timely manner. The staff were attentive, friendly and treated us with care and respect.  The atmosphere was one of fine dining and relaxation. All within a reasonable price range.  If you are spending an enjoyable day at the art gallery, I can highly recommend the Tea Room for those breaks in between your viewing pleasure.  Communication from booking a table to requesting feedback on your visit is next level compared to other dining establishments. You will not be disappointed.

Name: Top Tea
Address: KI002/1 Main St Box Hill Central Shopping Centre
Author: Sandy Ouyang
Review: The new pomelo ice tea is a disaster, I’ve never had any pomelo that bitter in my life. Just one little sip, you will have that bitterness in your whole mouth and last for a few minutes. Horrible drink. Also, there is no phone number to contact on their google review page, and the number on TOPTEA website have no one answering.

Name: Top Tea
Address: KI002/1 Main St Box Hill Central Shopping Centre
Author: Tobey Nguyen
Review: I like the tea but not the straw. For every tea latte you will receive a ridiculously small straw that you cant even enjoy the drink properly. It’s like sipping air.

Name: Top Tea
Address: KI002/1 Main St Box Hill Central Shopping Centre
Author: Yolanda Rr
Review: It’d probably be a good idea to give your staff a speaker for calling orders so customers won’t get rolled eyes for asking about missed numbers and having to suck the melt drink. I understand staff must be very stressed giving the long queue but no one wants pay over 10 dollars for this.

Name: Top Tea
Address: KI002/1 Main St Box Hill Central Shopping Centre
Author: B
Review:
I never jump on google just to complain about a drink, but thanks to topetea boxhill for ruining my favorite drink at toptea, and my day experience yall. $12 today was a solid stole.
I was looking forward for my pecan top, its all i wanted when ordering this drink, but i got NO PECANS but alot of pecan skins, thats has no crunch and flavor at all, ruining the whole texture and flavor of the drink, and is just annoying to to chew on. I did not ask the staff about this because i thought pecans would be underneath the flakey powdery skins, but no.
Also ur staff attitude is the worst comparing to all the milktea stores ive been to in Melbourne, the staff who took my order could not hide abit of her impatience, as if she’s superior 😅bro i just wanted to order a milktea, the one and only role that u had was take my order, and just go on, if u cant even put up with a normal customer for 1 sec when u take their order, then get out of hospitality and do something else, its not my fault u hate ur job😅😅😅
I was once spoiling toptea for its flavor, but the continued worsening is very much disappointing.

Name: Top Tea
Address: KI002/1 Main St Box Hill Central Shopping Centre
Author: KiT (SillYKiT)
Review: Top tea is the best milk tea shop in Melbourne. They are introducing new limited time drinks or pastries every one to two months. My favourite from their all-time menu is coconut milk with black rice and mochi.

Name: T2 Tea - Melbourne Central
Address: Shop GD 049, Melbourne Central, 300 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Zoe
Review: Store is beautifully decorated and the Caucasian lady was really helpful. She wrapped the items for me and would revisit if I have the chance to. She was also helpful to recommend the tea that I was looking for as a gift. Thank you!

Name: T2 Tea - Melbourne Central
Address: Shop GD 049, Melbourne Central, 300 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: I. C.
Review:
Really really disappointed about the customer service that I received  today.
I normally buy T2 and I even give T2 as gift to my family, but I won't anymore.
I came today at the store in Melbourne central and I was looking for a particular tea that I had one night with my girlfriend,  she didn't remembered the name of it but from the smell was or strawberry cream or  pack a peach. I asked for a sample which they normally give it to you, to making sure was going to be the exact tea for me to purchase and they said " no we don't give sample anymore" which is a lie because  at ringwood shopping center everytime I would like to try a new tea, I ask for a sample and than following the purchase.  It's $20 I want to make sure I like that tea. And she was not even trying to help me with my issue. Not happy at all.

Name: T2 Tea - Melbourne Central
Address: Shop GD 049, Melbourne Central, 300 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Morgan Townsend
Review: Amazing staff! Everyone there is so nice and welcoming! The ambience of the store is amazing! Everyone is so knowledgeable about teas! Their efforts in customer service doesn't go unnoticed!

Name: T2 Tea - Melbourne Central
Address: Shop GD 049, Melbourne Central, 300 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: shauna murtagh
Review: Went to this store yesterday on the 3rd of April at around 1pm. I was greeted with the most welcoming service I've encountered. The workers were so kind and funny, and at the time I was carrying a heap of heavy books in a paper bag, which embarrassingly ripped open when I was at the counter upon leaving. The woman at the front counter went out of her way to retrieve a new bag for me. I felt so bad that I offered to pay for it, and she insisted I didn't, and then proceeded to double bag it for added security for the trip home on the train. I never write reviews but 100% wanted to show gratitude for that act of kindness. I wish I had gotten a name, but she was this gorgeous woman with bangs. I purchased the mangoes and cream tea - absolutely delicious! I even tried it with that same lady's suggestion; iced and with fresh fruit - will definitely be my favourite for some time, and will definitely be back for these amazing products and exceptional service. Thanks so much! Your act of kindness will not go unnoticed.

Name: T2 Tea - Melbourne Central
Address: Shop GD 049, Melbourne Central, 300 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: JP T
Review: good atmosphere, all the staff are lovely.

Name: LUPICIA Fresh Tea
Address: QV Shopping Complex, 14/16 Artemis Ln, Melbourne
Author: C
Review:
Bought the matcha black soybean rice tea here. Male staff was rude, felt like he did not want to be there. Asked where the matcha teas are and he just said “there” and continued with his stuff.
We picked our teas, paid (extra $4 for the can) and left.
Store was cute, lots of japanese teas and gift sets.

Name: LUPICIA Fresh Tea
Address: QV Shopping Complex, 14/16 Artemis Ln, Melbourne
Author: E L
Review:
Ever since I ordered my first batch of tea from here in 2021, I have literally never bought tea anywhere else. This place is it.

Going into the store is a great experience - the owner is friendly, knowledgable and generous with his time, allowing you to smell each tea while you make your selections. He will also take the time to explain things to you and recommend teas according to your preferences.

He taught me an extremely important lesson about maximising flavour extraction from tea leaves by brewing first in a jug/mug, then pouring it into your drinking cup through a fine double mesh sieve (which they also sell here). My tea has never tasted better.

Online deliveries are super reliable as well and always arrive within a couple of days.

I cannot recommend this place enough. Just the best tea shop I’ve ever been to, hands down.

Name: LUPICIA Fresh Tea
Address: QV Shopping Complex, 14/16 Artemis Ln, Melbourne
Author: Emma
Review: Lovely little tea shop, stocking high quality tea from a variety of places around the world, including China. The owner is very friendly and happy to help with suggestions and guidance. Super great spot to get gifts for friends, family or something for yourself!

Name: LUPICIA Fresh Tea
Address: QV Shopping Complex, 14/16 Artemis Ln, Melbourne
Author: Alexandria
Review: I was super excited to come across this shop while in Melbourne - they have a really amazing range of teas from countries that are renowned for making wonderful tea. Having just visited China this year, and being astounded by the incredible quality and flavours of the tea there, it was exciting to come across a shop that stocks tea from China. Staff were friendly and happy to give recommendations. Great spot for a special gift too. Only suggestion is it would be cool to be able to buy a cup of takeaway tea to drink on the go! Can’t wait to visit again.

Name: LUPICIA Fresh Tea
Address: QV Shopping Complex, 14/16 Artemis Ln, Melbourne
Author: M C
Review:
A very lovely tea shop! Has a great selection of tea that you can smell and choose from, and there is a minimum weight that you have to purchase for each tea.

They also sell tea cups and tea pots, and packaged tea in lovely tins, which will be a perfect gift for tea lovers.

Highly recommend that you visit this shop the next time you are in the city.

Name: MBT-My Bubble Tea-Australia No.1 DIY Bubble Tea Kits
Author: Xianjing Huang
Review: This was a great purchase. Love every sip of it, It turns out much better than the bubble tea shops.  We follow the instructions and use fresh milk, taste much better and healthier! Will continually buy more!

Name: MBT-My Bubble Tea-Australia No.1 DIY Bubble Tea Kits
Author: Jessie Lin
Review: MBT bubble tea kit is 5 stars all the way! I ordered for a friend's birthday & it was the perfect gift. She loved it & sent me photos all day on how happy she was to receive which made my day!

Name: MBT-My Bubble Tea-Australia No.1 DIY Bubble Tea Kits
Author: zhen li
Review: The customer service of my bubble tea is great! The signature milk tea with tapioca pearls is one of my favourite drinks. Also the tropical green tea is very delicious! Highly recommend! 5 star experience!

Name: MBT-My Bubble Tea-Australia No.1 DIY Bubble Tea Kits
Author: Rong Chen
Review: This was a great purchase. It was exactly what we needed since we weren't able to get out and enjoy Boba. Just as advertised, fast delivery

Name: MBT-My Bubble Tea-Australia No.1 DIY Bubble Tea Kits
Author: Huayi Yao
Review: So yummy! Clear directions. Perfect DIY kit for boba lovers when all the local shops are closed for quarantine.

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Lakesha James
Review:
They forgot my cream cheese foam on two different occassions and it's definitely full sweetness when I asked for half.

What is the point in customisability if they keep getting it wrong. I've only been there twice and it's been a mess up every time. Wasted my money and my friend was driving me, by the time we got home and realised my order was messed up it was too late to go back.

I may avoid them in the future.

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Danielle CLARKE
Review: My daughter and I went exploring around the Bentleigh Shopping Strip and saw the sign for Palgong Tea. We got excited when we saw at the bottom of the street board say Korea's finest bubble tea. I ordered the Banana flavoured tea. It was yummy 😋 I would definitely recommend visiting if you are in the area. Great staff, very friendly and you will leave smiling 😃

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Kenneth Lee
Review:
🧋🧋🧋🧋🧋REFRESHING AND DELICIOUS

We ordered the lychee black tea with pearls and it really hit the spot!! The staff were extremely friendly and accomodating and the setting of the cafe was clean, modern and inviting.

Highly recommend visiting this gem in Bentleigh especially when bubble tea stores are scarce in the area - can’t wait to revisit!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Sarah Melbs
Review:
@palgongtea.australia 📍 With 200 stores worldwide I can’t believe I didn’t know this was in melbourne 😄🇰🇷🧋This South Korean BBT chain is the first of its kind to land here 🇰🇷🇦🇺 highly recommend the k- classics including the banana milk tea😄🍌 as well as the refreshing Korean grape soda ade🍇!!

the menu is v reasonably priced imho starting from $4.90+ 🤯 Highly recommend if you’re keen to try a Korean style bubble tea! 🇰🇷🧋🫰🏻They were so busy with locals! The line was insane. there’s seating out the back too!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Yu Kim
Review: Best tea place in town!! I’ve been there a couple of times with my friends and family. The staffs were friendly and really helpful. They make sure that everyone feels comfortable and answer all the questions I asked for the menu. You must try the Green grape Ade!! It is refreshing and freezy🤍💚🤍💚 Also, my best drink from Palgong tea is YOGURT SMOOTHIE!! Absolute favourite❤️

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: Tia Alysse
Review:
I ordered Gotcha’s Brown Sugar Milk Tea with Pearls, and it was delicious from start to finish, so much that I got another one before I went home.
The pearls were exceptionally fresh, and the staff we’re really friendly and kind.
I’ll definitely be stopping here every time I go to Watergardens.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: SusutheChen
Review: It was a great quality taro milk bubble tea. The pearls were cooked to perfection, boasting an ideal level of elasticity that strikes a delightful balance.😋

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: jeannie wong
Review: The Boba are so soft!! Good service! Always our go to bubble tea!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Watergardens
Author: Kristina Muzoska
