Author: Chathura Perera
Review: Path is an absolute gem and arguably the finest brew bar in Melbourne. The moment you walk through the door, you’re enveloped in an ambiance that perfectly balances chic elegance with a homely charm. The coffee here is nothing short of exceptional—each cup is a masterpiece, brewed with meticulous care and a genuine passion for the craft. The menu is a delightful journey of culinary creativity, offering everything from heavenly pastries to delectable drinks that are as visually appealing as they are delicious. The staff exudes warmth and professionalism, enhancing the overall experience. Whether you're seeking a serene spot for a solo retreat or a vibrant venue for a gathering with friends, Path stands out as the epitome of café perfection. It’s not just a place to enjoy coffee; it’s a destination for an unforgettable experience. Melbourne is lucky to have Path!

Name: Path Melbourne
Author: Narit Kimsat
Review: Best coffee in town, world class venue, exceptional service, vibrant atmosphere, their daily dessert selections are to die for. Bonus point for the venue cleanliness. I would give this place more than 5 stars if I could. Bonus bonus point their white coffee always got beautiful crèma. Tip top place not to be missed. ☝️

Name: Path Melbourne
Author: Ricky
Review: Came here to enjoy the Path coffee experience. I started off with an espresso made with their Yunnan beans. It was refreshing, light, and floral with good acidity. I finished off with a pour over from their heavier Brazilian beans. It was quite floral with some good nutty flavour. The barista was friendly and gave me some insight into the espresso and pour over making. An overall pleasing experience on my coffee journey! Thankyou!

Name: Path Melbourne
Author: pastelsparkles
Review:
This place was SO interesting. We came to Path because my partner was looking for a more elevated coffee experience and we definitely got just that here.
The menu described the different drinks you could order here based on their notes, which was so fun.
It was definitely a more artisanal experience and I’m glad I’ve had enough nice coffee to feel like I could appreciate this place.
Definitely somewhere to visit if you want a beautiful coffee experience. We had a lot of fun here. The space was lovely and the coffee was amazing 🥰

Name: Path Melbourne
Author: Huang Guangci
Review:
1st visit (June 2023): Got a hot white to go, was a pleasant experience.

2nd visit (Aug 2024): got an iced latte and a iced black, dined in. service was cold, coffee was diluted and overall underwhelming. Melbourne has a really competitive coffee scene and this place is a skip. For better coffee, much friendlier service and less pretentious vibe, try Rosso instead… or maybe of the other places Melbourne has to offer

Name: Everyday Coffee
Author: Amo Cereigido
Review:
The best cinnamon roll I have ever had.
Vegan Bagel was quite expensive but also delicious. Super friendly service and great atmosphere!
:)

Name: Everyday Coffee
Author: Martin Ryan
Review:
if you drink tea don't bother, $6.06 for a measured 200 ml cup (apparently it looks tiny) and a side of milk, and no chance of deciding on your own brew strength. , It's $5.50 in the menu so was I charged 56c for the milk or was this a surcharge for using eftpos? The guy who served me was nice, not his fault,  but but If the owners really are worried about space being taken up by pesky tea drinkers with pots of tea I suppose it works, because I won't be back again! Also the bagels are definitely over priced, $24 for a big brekky bagel, when an actual big brekky elsewhere is probably the same price! definite thumbs down

addendum: turns out in the very small print at the the bottom of the menu there is a 10% surcharge for weekends, according to the ACCC this has to be at least as large as the most prominent price on the menu, and I didn't see it posted anywhere else in the cafe... I ordered at the counter and didn't have a menu to look at! I posted a pic of the menu, see if you would have noticed it!

Name: Everyday Coffee
Author: Alana D (awholelattelana)
Review: Super friendly staff and cook and very chill atmosphere! Cook made me a special of the the carrot lox on its own as a side to takeaway so I could try it! Usually a couple offerings of batch brew and lovely with a side of oat milk! Some cute merch too including the sturdy Everyday mug and the bagu everyday tote bags! Recommended by Renee from Melbourne Vegan Guides! Have more vegan options these days

Name: Everyday Coffee
Author: Flashback Arrest
Review: I used to love this place. I've been going since they were on Johnson st. Today the heaters were off, the music too loud, the cappuccino was really bad and the avocado bagel bland 😞 I would've told them about it if I had been asked "how was everything?" before paying, but I wasn't.

Name: Everyday Coffee
Author: Nikki Liakos
Review: Was served by the most loveliest person thank you jack (I think that was his name) he was the manager. Very friendly customer service and went out of his way to cater to us even though they were about to close was an absolute legend. Delicious food & coffee.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: E L
Review: Rating solely based on their signature brown sugar boba milk - pretty good, but pearls are a bit soft (not sure if it’s because we ordered the drink warm), could be more bouncy. Could have also been more aggressive on the caramelised brown sugar flavour.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Helen Evangelina
Review:
From creamy to refreshing, Xing Fu Tang has it all!

What I ordered:
🧋Signature Brown Sugar Boba Milk
🍵Matcha Boba
🥭Mango Smoothie and Panna Cotta
🥤Lychee Green Tea w/ Coconut Jelly
🧇Croffle w/ Biscoff Sauce

I usually don’t like boba pearls because they can be hard to chew, but I love XFT boba—they're so chewy and soft! The brown sugar boba is super milky and creamy, which I love.

The mango smoothie was refreshing - and look how cute the bunny panna cotta is🥹 If you love lychee, you would definitely love the Lychee Green Tea which was light and refreshing. My friend loves lychee and she loved it!

I was actually surpsied with the Matcha Boba because it has strong matcha flavor—most bubble tea shops don’t get it right, but this one did!

And the croffle was delicious!

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Yama Vikara
Review: I bought the croffle today to fill my sugar needs. Was a bit skeptical but turned out it was 10/10!! The croffle itself was crunchy outside but soft inside, just the right sweetness level for me. The sweetness from the syrup and biscoff crumble were on point to my taste and the whipped cream just balanced out the taste and texture on every munch!! Definitely a yes to the croffle and will buy it another time.

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Vandana T Sivadas
Review: Their bobo’s are always on the hot woke and thats the taste for your drink. Its a must try. I had croffle with biscoff sauce. Highly recommended. Brown sugar cooked bobos are the best. Must try

Name: Xing Fu Tang Melbourne
Author: Anusha Karanayil
Review: I’ve tried quite a few bubble tea places and this one has easily become my favourite! They have so many creative drinks that taste so good! Pleased to say I will be a regular at this place from now on! I’ve tried the mango panacotta, Biscoff and the brown sugar bubble teas so far and they’re all equally delicious.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Stelly
Review:
Love the Hello Kitty collaboration! Their large drinks come in cute Hello Kitty cups and they have lots of Hello Kitty character merch - including tumblers, drink bottles, etc.

Their fruity drinks are my favourite - especially the Golden Passionfruit and the signature Fruit Tea! Super refreshing 😍

This location even has seating areas!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Alice Cossette
Review: Comfy seating and nice atmosphere. We ordered the signature pearl milk tea and passion fruit tea. 🧋 Nice flavours and everything is customizable 😃 You order via a tablet and service is very quick. Recommend this place for all bubble tea lovers after studying at State Library 📚

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Payel Gayen
Review:
Gotcha, at Melbourne Central Shopping Mall is a perfect place for bubble tea enthusiasts. My taste buds were treated to a symphony of flavors as I savored both the Lychee Green Tea and the Gotcha Signature Fruit Tea. What truly sets Gotcha apart is their commitment to customization - you can fine-tune your beverage to perfection by adjusting sugar and ice levels to your liking. I, for one, chose to savor the pure essence of these exquisite teas.

To sweeten the deal further, a special offer graced our visit - the opportunity to enjoy any two of their top 20 drinks in generously sized mugs for a mere $10.

The staff at Gotcha were not only diligent but also friendly, adding a warm and inviting atmosphere to the experience. If you're seeking a refreshing and flavorful journey for your taste buds, look no further than Gotcha. It's a gem in the heart of Melbourne, waiting to delight your senses.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Timinmelbourne
Review:
I was recently invited to attend the worldwide launch of @gotchafreshtea and @pokemon

Gotcha farm their own tea, and their drinks are natural. Yep, there's no chemicals or additives. Their drinks are absolutely delicious. I had a Taro fresh milk w mini pearls, which was so good. My mate had a blue pea fruit tea, which was fantastic

Lovely friendly service and pretty quick given that everything is made to order. I'll be back.

Collab

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea - Melbourne Central
Author: Cade Terence
Review:
Fantastic atmosphere and drinks, one of my favourite tea places.

The atmosphere is cozy and looks great, and you are able to order your tea with all specifications (sugar level, ice level, size) using the touch screen. The pearls are slightly warm due to being freshly made, and they give you a lot. You can really taste the tea 🍵 which I am very satisfied with - it's not just sugar and milk. Great stuff

Name: Gong cha Chinatown
Author: Gold Silver
Review: omg ，After drinking a little, I found a mosquito inside. The shop owner should pay attention to food hygiene！thank you！

Name: Gong cha Chinatown
Author: Nicharee A
Review: I bought 3 large cups from this store, after I scanned my membership card I was told that they have changed their membership through their application so I need to download their it which I downloaded already when I was in the queue just don't know that they changed and I only need to sign in! Then the staff told me I have to go out of the queue, sign in and come back to order again! Are you kidding me?? I waited about 10 minutes in the queue already to order and you told me to go back to queue up again? I was so disappointed and angry! Nit even "SORRY" that she said! You know many bb milk tea shops are operating in Melbourne?? but I still pick you as a royalty customer but look what you have done to me! I chose not to get the membership and ordered anyway. After I paid I tried to sign in the app and it took me not even 1 min! This was ridiculous ever! Not recommended! And not coming back!

Name: Gong cha Chinatown
Author: Mc Smith
Review: I went to this store on tuesday night by their closing time. An asian staff (looks pretty old) was extremely rude. Probably, she had a bad day. but she needs to be properly trained on how to behave to her customers with a smile.

Name: Gong cha Chinatown
Author: Yorrick Choo
Review:
Just about to start a beautiful day with my wife until we met this horrible person serving us at gongcha Chinatown.

It wasnt busy at all and we were the only customers. Ordered our drinks and we threw our receipts into the bin. The A****** worker  said we should keep our receipt in the most utter poorly way as possible. C'mon let's be real here if there's a lot of customers I understand but we were literally the only customers! So she grabbed out receipt out of the bin and slammed it on the table. And she purposely didn't give us straws.

What a definition of an A******!

P.S. learn to smile for once in your life.

Name: Gong cha Chinatown
Author: Chris Martin
Review: Loved my Double coconut tea with little sugar & ice plus black pearls!!! Other half had a peach green tea & enjoyed that too. Really refreshing. Thank you Gong Cha! 😊

Name: Dessert Plus Kikuchi Sushi
Address: Shop 6/67 Main Hurstbridge Rd, Diamond Creek
Author: QI Martin
Review: Absolutely loved my visit to Dessert Plus! The sushi was fresh, delicious, and beautifully presented. The dragon roll and spicy tuna roll were exceptional. The milk tea was a perfect complement—I tried the brown sugar boba milk tea and it was heavenly. The staff were friendly and provided excellent service. The cozy ambiance made it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy my meal. Highly recommend this place!

Name: Dessert Plus Kikuchi Sushi
Address: Shop 6/67 Main Hurstbridge Rd, Diamond Creek
Author: cindy chan
Review: I've tried the Matcha, lychee and mango bingsu, very great flavour (love lychee in particular) and a good size for either eating oneself or sharing between 2. The sushi rolls are delicious. Will come back for more dessert!

Name: Dessert Plus Kikuchi Sushi
Address: Shop 6/67 Main Hurstbridge Rd, Diamond Creek
Author: Rob Roo
Review:
Not sure about all these raving reviews because I disagree with most of them.

Their sushi used to be decent when they first opened, but definitely has gone down in quality since then.

Their sushi is dry and I taste margarine in it which is awful. I don't know what they've done to their rice either, but quality is not same as before. Cost-cutting measures I presume?

Their bingsu is also not good. Never was since I tried it the first time so I don't know why people are raving about how good it is.

This place has gone downhill, which is a shame because they were so good when they opened.

Name: Dessert Plus Kikuchi Sushi
Address: Shop 6/67 Main Hurstbridge Rd, Diamond Creek
Author: Emily Liu
Review: Great dessert, Incredible selection of excellent sushi. The staff there are professional, friendly and helpful all at once. It was a very pleasant eating experience.

Name: Dessert Plus Kikuchi Sushi
Address: Shop 6/67 Main Hurstbridge Rd, Diamond Creek
Author: Ann Xiu
Review: This is my favorite milk tea shop! The drinks are fantastic and the service is top-notch. They have a great selection of flavors and toppings. Highly recommend to any milk tea lover!

Name: Chatime Hawthorn
Author: Win Nawaphon
Review: I want to develop the flavor of the tea more intensely. The taste feels diluted like water. But the cream mousse tastes good. If the restaurant improves the taste a little, it would be great.

Name: Chatime Hawthorn
Author: Vera Vechalekar
Review:
The lady who served me was absolutely amazing very professional and delightful to take orders.
Very attentive and absolutely wonderful.

Name: Chatime Hawthorn
Author: J L
Review: It was a great experience, and the new teas are exceptionally good! 10/10 and it really made my day this year.

Name: Chatime Hawthorn
Author: Lenny Willis
Review: I have never had boba in my life before, and the drinks were great, but it was a very easy process to order, I'm usually a bit nervous doing stuff like that, the cashier could tell I think, so he guided me through my order step by step in a really helpful way.

Name: Chatime Hawthorn
Author: Molly Rooke
Review: Lovely staff, really quick service, always great quality drinks

Name: Bubble Cup QV Melbourne
Address: Qv Food Hall, Level 1/210 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Skandh Kapoor
Review: Had a great experience at Bubble Cup QV Melbourne! The tea was fabulously refreshing, and the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. A wonderful spot to enjoy a tasty drink and excellent service

Name: Bubble Cup QV Melbourne
Address: Qv Food Hall, Level 1/210 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Oisho Tamam
Review:
I used to go for Gong Cha more regularly, but this place has quite a few advantages:
- Quality of flavor is just as good
- Smaller line and smaller waiting time
- The straw is actually hard unlike Gong Cha's brittle paper straws that can't even stab at the container without bending
- The pearls taste better

Would highly recommend

Name: Bubble Cup QV Melbourne
Address: Qv Food Hall, Level 1/210 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Tiffany Leung
Review: Always go to gong cha but came here to try something new. Ordered strawberry green tea with crystal jelly, nothing special but more expensive than I expected

Name: Bubble Cup QV Melbourne
Address: Qv Food Hall, Level 1/210 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Melia Widayanti
Review: Unprofessional staff, look she doesn’t want to work and doesn’t bother to serve customers. drink just standard bubble tea, nothing special, never come back

Name: Bubble Cup QV Melbourne
Address: Qv Food Hall, Level 1/210 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Bee -
Review: Overly dialuted and very overpriced. Do yourself a favour and go to other bubble tea places and dont bother with this store!

Name: HappyLemon
Author: Puteri
Review: Went here almost everyday during my trip to Melbourne this winter. Our fave was milk tea with oreo & cheese. Their bubble waffle was the bomb! And staff was really friendly too :)

Name: HappyLemon
Author: Kimberly Maxwell
Review: I’m on a mission to find my favourite bubble waffle place in Melbourne and decided to give Happy Lemon a try. I got the Oreo waffle. The outside was nice and crispy and the inside was perfectly chewy. It wasn’t overly sweet and didn’t have an overwhelming Oreo tatse, but it still tasted good and with Oreo crumbs thoughts the waffle. I’d like to go back and try the Taro!

Name: HappyLemon
Author: Foodie Files Melbourne
Review: I found the bubble tea very strong and the waffles a bit lacklustre. Perhaps we are all used to pimped up toppings these days so the subtlety of the plain original flavour was none too remarkable. The one that had the pearls inside the bubbles were more interesting though

Name: HappyLemon
Author: Anh Nguyen
Review: Staffs are so cute. I orderd pearl milktea and it is really nice with quite strong tea flavour. Really love the puffing cream. Will come back next time!😗

Name: HappyLemon
Author: Kien Con
Review:
Food ordered:
Yakult Lemon Green Tea 3/5
Pearl Milk Tea with Puff Cream 2.5/5. The pearls tasted mediocre and hard.
Bubble Wrap with Tapioca Pearls 3.5/5

The bubble wrap had a crunchy edge and soft inside, but the tapioca was plain. The bubble wrap alone would taste better.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Dip Silwal
Review:
I had 2large teas for $10 and it was great.The place was nice and clean and the cups were fancy,loved it.
Also the customer service was excellent,so I'll surely come back again.
Highly recommended🙏

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Susi Sushma
Review: I ordered mango milk tea with signature pearls, my transactions went through from my phone, was not on pending. Initially they didn’t want to give me my drink they said bank will refund me in 2, 3 days and if doesn’t, reach out to them and I live in Sunbury and cost me more than the drink I purchased. I demanded them to give me my drink and when they gave me the drink it was tasteless, flavourless and pearls were also less just tasted like milk and sugar.  Very bad taste. I don’t recommend them.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Foodie Files Melbourne
Review:
I have to say for a takeaway tea joint they really nail the interiors. I tried the signature fruit tea which was as the name suggests super fruity and you can see the fresh pieces floating through the vibrantly coloured cup.

I also had a passionfruit galaxy tea but found it not as full bodied although I adored its galactic multicoloured appearance. My third drink was the black sugar fresh milk tea and I absolutely loved the pearls in this. Probably a tad too sweet but I really enjoyed the flavours and I believe you can ask for half sugar if you like. There’s a crazy number of options to choose from so I was glad these three were dictated to me as the popular choice

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: Katie Fretche
Review: I rarely come for strolls in the city but when I do my kids always drags me to Gotcha. They love the drinks! 10/10. We’ve had good experiences with the store and the drinks since we’ve visited a couple of time before as well. We haven’t had the time to sit inside the place and enjoy our drinks since we’re always rushing to places so I can’t give a rating on that for sure. But other than that, anyone who’s a boba fan, this place is a must try😉

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea- The Empire
Author: vu minh
Review:
Good place to take a cup of milk tea. Nice and clean decorated shop. The pearls are tasty and chewy. However, the drink is too sweet compared to other milk tea shops although we already ordered 50% sugar. You can ask to change the toppings on the default drink.
Currently, they have the cute pokemon cup and mon-fri $9.9 promotion for 2 cups which is quite worth it.

Name: Chatime Melbourne Central Kiosk
Address: Central, Kiosk 2-3, Lower Ground, 211 La Trobe St, Melbourne
Author: Sreerag Nampoothiri K
Review: Tried the Lychee Fruit Bubble tea with black pearls. The customer service was not up to the mark. Some guy(I guess the manager) was staring at me as if why I am getting a bubble tea. Anyway, the lady at the counter at least asked me whether I am getting a Green Tea or Black Tea? In fact, that is the first time I am noticing there are two types of tea. The service was average, the bubble tea tasted decent.

Name: Chatime Melbourne Central Kiosk
Address: Central, Kiosk 2-3, Lower Ground, 211 La Trobe St, Melbourne
Author: Kimberly Maxwell
Review: All the bubble tea flavours you would expect plus plenty of jellies and popping pearls to choose from. Cha Time is consistent and there are many around the city. I like the rewards system Cha Time has and I always order through the app to get points. Every now and then you accumulate enough for a free bubble tea. Oolong tea is my favourite, followed by matcha!

Name: Chatime Melbourne Central Kiosk
Address: Central, Kiosk 2-3, Lower Ground, 211 La Trobe St, Melbourne
Author: Wilbert Sebastian
Review: She was working alone and we dont blame her. We waited patiently and got our order wrong. Ordered tea with coconut jelly but got lychee instead

Name: Chatime Melbourne Central Kiosk
Address: Central, Kiosk 2-3, Lower Ground, 211 La Trobe St, Melbourne
Author: lihan
Review: I FOUND HAIR AND TWO ACRYLIC NAILS IN MY DRINK, really thought someone died in my drink. I tried contacting chattime but got ghosted.

Name: Chatime Melbourne Central Kiosk
Address: Central, Kiosk 2-3, Lower Ground, 211 La Trobe St, Melbourne
Author: S C
Review: The perfect summer drink. Become a member so you can earn points on every drink you buy and work towards getting that free drink! Highly recommend the Green Tea Lychee. There can be long queues during peak hours so be patient.

Name: Chatime 289 Flinders Lane
Author: Rosie H
Review:
I am writing to bring to your attention an issue I experienced at your establishment on Thursday, August 22, 2024, at 14:38. During my visit, I observed that one of your staff members was very rude. The staff member shouted at a customer in a loud voice, which was quite unprofessional and unpleasant.

I hope you will address this matter with your team to ensure better customer service in the future.

Name: Chatime 289 Flinders Lane
Author: Lavanya Monica Jyothis
Review: Super delicious boba🧋! We all loved ours, lots of options for customisation. We ordered lychee, honeydew milky, and strawberry matcha latte: all of them were fabulous, and we particularly enjoyed the strawberry popping boba 🍓and the coconut jelly🥥

Name: Chatime 289 Flinders Lane
Author: Sarah Wells
Review: Overall quite disappointed, waited for a good 20 minutes after getting absolutely no assistance when using the broken order machine after we requested for help. Worker asked if we had ordered which we then had to go out of our way to prove after paying over $10. Turns out drink had already been made but had been sitting as we waited, which was evident through the deflated foam and lack of ice. We were faced with workers who were clueless and judgmental as we calmly tried to solve the issue that was not our doing. This may come off as aggressive and rude but that reflects on our experience at Cha-Time

Name: Chatime 289 Flinders Lane
Author: Thuy Nguyen
Review: It is located in the center of Melbourne, easy to find and has wide range of choices. The taste is good and the staff is friendly

Name: Chatime 289 Flinders Lane
Author: Quang Quách
Review: Only need one word to describe this experience: AMAZING! Staff is unbelievably friendly and quick. If you want to experience what I experienced. Come and try it! You would come several times after the first time (Trust me:

Name: Mr.Panda Bubble Tea
Address: Cranbourne Park Shopping Center Food court (SP005, Cranbourne
Author: Adeline
Review:
Been coming here since it first opened!

The atmosphere of the shopped has improved since! Seating is available if you wish to sit inside, self serve board is readily accessible and of course when you can’t decide what bubble tea, smoothie/frappes and egg waffles you want… their are plenty of posters and menus to help you.

The staff are always super friendly and do their absolute best to make the best drinks to your liking.

100% recommend over chatime.

Name: Mr.Panda Bubble Tea
Address: Cranbourne Park Shopping Center Food court (SP005, Cranbourne
Author: Nixxy Chan
Review: I love the way they have done up the place and the menu was so cute! The drink was really good, I loved the packaging too. I would recommend!

Name: Mr.Panda Bubble Tea
Address: Cranbourne Park Shopping Center Food court (SP005, Cranbourne
Author: Tionne Lee Driscoll Bartel
Review: Omg I love panda tea especially the mouse cake range so delicious! Definitely try it out - friendly staff also at Cranbourne Park :)

Name: Mr.Panda Bubble Tea
Address: Cranbourne Park Shopping Center Food court (SP005, Cranbourne
Author: Lanny kurnia
Review:
I really love it . So yummy and Tasty ;)
Good price ;) good service ;) highly recommanded ❤️

Name: Mr.Panda Bubble Tea
Address: Cranbourne Park Shopping Center Food court (SP005, Cranbourne
Author: yuan wei
Review: Best bubble tea in Cranbourne Park. The lady serviced us is friendly. Highly recommend!

Name: Chatime Uni Hill
Address: University Hill Town Centre, Shop T04/5 Janefield Dr, Bundoora
Author: sof broo
Review: Me and my boyfriend ordered the chocolate milk tea with the brown sugar boba pearls and extra popping pearls. The pearls were very clearly not made fresh and tasted like they were old. The quality of the pearls was also very bad unfortunately. Almost all the boba pearls stuck together in 2 big clumps that sat at the bottom of my drink, I had to throw my drink away because the pearls were clogging up my straw and weren't able to even be removed from it, making it quiet literally undrinkable. The popping pearls also had an oddly plastic/firm casing and were noticeably sagged instead of plumpy and circular like a fresh one would be, leading me to believe they were definitely old ingredients. Ive been to multiple chai times, and the one at unihill is genuinely the only one I wouldn't recommend to anyone. It was an unfortunate experience.

Name: Chatime Uni Hill
Address: University Hill Town Centre, Shop T04/5 Janefield Dr, Bundoora
Author: Split the Bill
Review: Unfortunately not the best boba tea I’ve tried. I went in when it opened at 11:30, thinking that the boba will be freshly made and warm. The pearls were rubbery and cold. Not a lot of them, I ordered the chocolate milk tea for a change the chocolate flavour was there but it wasn’t strong.  Very disappointed.

Name: Chatime Uni Hill
Address: University Hill Town Centre, Shop T04/5 Janefield Dr, Bundoora
Author: Natalia Bruzzaniti
Review:
My friend has a  story

i actually cant rn... yesterday I called  chatime to ask about the hiring process,, I also called during a time where it was not busy. I called and I said 'hii, i was just wondering if u guys were hiri-.. and the lady was like NO so rudley. And then i was like oh ok , maybe in the futu...NO . And then i was like.. "that all good thank yo-" and then she hung up.! its doesnt cost money to be nice .

Sephora

Name: Chatime Uni Hill
Address: University Hill Town Centre, Shop T04/5 Janefield Dr, Bundoora
Author: jacob matta
Review: I LOVED THIS PLACE! As soon as I walked in, I was greeted with all the employees, and they all got on their knees and started praising me, I then ordered a nice tea with black chewy balls. After they had given me about 10 drinks, I spilled some all on the floor and they started licking it with their tounges to clean it up after I asked them to. They kicked out and cussed out anyone who tried to walk in. And they let me have all the drinks for free, and gave me all their lifesavings! Great place, I would reccommend!

Name: Chatime Uni Hill
Address: University Hill Town Centre, Shop T04/5 Janefield Dr, Bundoora
Author: Tâm Trang
Review: Came during quiet time today, and waited much longer than I usually wait for my drink. Decided to peak at the counter to see if my drink is going to be finished soon, only to see the staffs were chatting with each other without making my drink 🤦🏻‍♀️

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Cam
Review:
Best milk tea! Especially if you like them on the sweeter side. The honeydew milk tea is addictive here! Well priced and friendly staff.
I've been going here since they opened 23 years ago, they're always consistent.
Five stars!

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Rachael Wang
Review: love my favourite black forest milk tea drink and their wheat-made straws alot! much better than the other beverage stores. other beverages stores should update their straws instead of using cardboard straws

Name: Happy Cup
Author: M D
Review: Our go-to bubble tea shop.  We usually get the taro, roasted rice or classic milk tea and they are consistent, good value and not overly sweet.  Pearls are always soft and chewy with a bit of sweetness. Good place to come and hang out, with plenty of seating including a couple of sofas.

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Joey Tan
Review: The best Bubble tea I know and I’ve experienced bubble tea from both America and Australia. They have good prices and are insanely quick. Once I timed them and it took less than 20 seconds for my order.

Name: Happy Cup
Author: Robert D'Alberto
Review: I have been coming here for 20 years. By far the best bubble tea around.

Name: Sharetea Hawthorn
Author: Bridget P
Review:
Always love the bubble tea at ShareTea Hawthorn, service is always prompt and welcoming.
I especially like a hot taro milk tea on a cold day and a strawberry green tea with pearls whenever I need a pick me up.

Name: Sharetea Hawthorn
Author: Ngan Hun Ee
Review: Love the flavour of bubble tea drinks, especially the fruity ones. Drinks were made quickly without any delay, love the service provided! Would definitely come back to try more flavours!

Name: Sharetea Hawthorn
Author: taunthom
Review: One of the favorite Sharetea places to go to, the staff are very nice and service is always excellent with the speed and efficiency. 10/10 would recommend

Name: Sharetea Hawthorn
Author: Moni V
Review:
Good range of bubble tea drinks here. You can choose from fruity teas, milk teas, smoothies and crushes, and you can control the ice and sugar amounts.

I had the classic pearl milk tea, which was nice.

Sharetea is located on the side street across the road from Maccas. There is plenty of seating inside, with plants and even board games. Staff are friendly.

Name: Sharetea Hawthorn
Author: Lucy Van Der Arend
Review: this store is so good! they don’t mind if you sit for ages and do work and they are so so lovely and patient when you order! would highly recommend

Name: Cha Cha
Author: Kelly Peters
Review:
Very welcoming staff. Cha Cha has a variety of options for bubble and fresh teas that would definitely quench your thirst. Reasonably priced drinks from $6.50 and up.

I’ve tried the precious peach, passion fruit punch with lychee popping boba and messy black sugar. All of which I enjoyed. It’s is my goal to try a different one every time I’m in the area.

Name: Cha Cha
Author: Christine Tran
Review:
The quality of the tea doesn't have a strong tea taste, too diluted hence I prefer to purchase the fresh ice blends fruit drinks like the mango & cream cheese, the watermelon with cream cheese or kiwi. These are pretty good and tasty, more dull flavor. 😋🍧👍
Wait times seem to be VERY long though esp on a sunny Saturday, I'm not sure why, they are slow when there is quite a few staff on board. Maybe its the staff efficiency that needs to be trained to work quicker.

Name: Cha Cha
Author: Tez S
Review: So I decided to give this place a try as I was craving for some milktea. I ordered creme brulee with pearls. I was disappointed as it tasted just like an ordinary pearl milk tea. I have tried a couple of creme brulee milk tea in other shops and this one failed me. There was no crunchy caramelized sugar bits or anything of sorts as well as custard which is what other shops have.

Name: Cha Cha
Author: Florence Li
Review: Ordered a hot drink, came out cold, told the staff, staff looked like as if I was lying, made me another one reluctantly with not a very good look. Also staff was on her phone every second sometimes even when making drinks. Not a single smile seen. Purchase date and time: 27/6/24, 12:30pm

Name: Cha Cha
Author: Van Thomas
Review: My favourite milk tea in Melbourne!! Natalie and Lee are absolutely lovely and always have a warm smile on their face

Name: Popping & Tea Deer Park
Author: Mary Jade
Review: Favourite Bubble Tea place by far, my kids love it too. Great flavour, not too much ice. Fave is the coconut milk tea. Is definitely a must!! Always greeted by friendly and lovely staff. Fast and efficient service.

Name: Popping & Tea Deer Park
Author: Lanni
Review:
Been here about 3 to 4 times.

Last time the oolong milk tea made was rich however tonight the oolong milk tea I ordered tasted soooo watery. I can’t taste the tea properly.

I’d recommend to train your staff to make the milk tea ratio correctly.

Name: Popping & Tea Deer Park
Author: Taliah Yasmine
Review: My favourite boba shop and franchise in all of Melbourne. While it is a little more expensive than your other popular bubble tea shops around, their handmade boba pearls and premium taste in their drinks totally makes it worth the price. The staff are always friendly, greeting you every time you walk in and when you leave. I highly recommend to treat yourself to Popping and Tea boba if you ever walk past one!

Name: Popping & Tea Deer Park
Author: jian
Review: this review is written out of anger but I ordered drinks for my group of friends and I and they didn’t put any straws in the bag? We all had boba so we can’t drink with regular straw! Honestly so annoying!

Name: Popping & Tea Deer Park
Author: Andrea Tran
Review: I alway been a fan of jasmine milktea and strawberry green tea from popping & tea 😭😭💕💕💕 their handmade pearl alway got me melted with its chewy and sweet taste. If you have a chance please come to the shop. The staff was super friendly and nice. They offer free upside when u order directly from the store from mon to fri toooo :33 come here once and im sure you gonna crave for moreeee ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Chatime Knox City Fresh
Address: Westfield Knox, Kiosk K105A, Level 1/425 Burwood Hwy, Wantirna South
Author: Chloe Pudsey
Review: I love Chatime so much they’re my favourite tea shop. But the prices are getting higher and higher and they’re inconsistent from store to store. It’s almost $10 for one drink. If I went there with two friends we’d be spending almost $30 just on three drinks. It’s insanity. If it keeps up I won’t be able to purchase from them anymore. And I’ll be very sad. Very disappointed…inflations isn’t an excuse this is price gouging and it seems everyone is doing it these days.

Name: Chatime Knox City Fresh
Address: Westfield Knox, Kiosk K105A, Level 1/425 Burwood Hwy, Wantirna South
Author: elena tyers
Review: If you’re considering a job here, think twice. I've seen long-term employees with over 5 years of service being let go without any prior warning or explanation from management. Job postings seem more for show than actual hiring. The manager also cuts corners by understaffing, often leaving a single worker to handle busy shifts alone. It's not a supportive or fair environment for employees.

Name: Chatime Knox City Fresh
Address: Westfield Knox, Kiosk K105A, Level 1/425 Burwood Hwy, Wantirna South
Author: Jeremy D'Souza
Review: These guys always do a great job, make tasty drinks and the online order was prepared fast. I like the seating on the side of the counter where I can take my drink and then sit there and drink it. Awesome. Thanks Anna and the two others.

Name: Chatime Knox City Fresh
Address: Westfield Knox, Kiosk K105A, Level 1/425 Burwood Hwy, Wantirna South
Author: Chloe Tan
Review: Was served by Mellissa with 2 spider-man emojis. She was extremely friendly and efficient!  5/5 would recommend this Chatime!

Name: Chatime Knox City Fresh
Address: Westfield Knox, Kiosk K105A, Level 1/425 Burwood Hwy, Wantirna South
Author: Rhys
Review: Friendly service from staff member, however, franchisee needs to support their staff! Only 1 staff member for a busy store full of people waiting! Put more staff on.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jan Marie Limbo
Review: we love the mango slush and the brown sugar boba here!! the staff is also super lovely ❤️

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Ariel Lim
Review: I ordered the Taro milk tea with taro balls. The best taro milk tea I tried si far.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Furever Grooming
Review: Super friendly owner and staff, always love to come here for a nice cup of bubble tea!

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: Jenslie George
Review: Love the bubble tea here. It’s the best. The staff is very friendly.

Name: Tea One South Yarra
Author: O L
Review: Lovely service, nice decor. Loved the fresh fruit ingredients in the drinks, and a very good amount for the price. The drinks look beautiful and taste great, I recommend the Grateful Grape tea.

Name: Sharetea Swanston
Author: Misha Dench
Review: While the bubble tea itself isn’t quite as ‘authentic’ as others the brand offer a high level of customisation, though after a few poor experiences (across different stores) I can’t say the drinks are always high quality: recently they’ve felt watered down and have left an ‘artificial’ taste in my mouth. However, the spaces are often nice inside as well and are well suited for groups, while the staff are very nice. Having been here with friends quite a few times I can confidently say that it invites a very social atmosphere though I can’t attest the tea quality.

Name: Sharetea Swanston
Author: Rouven Grossmann
Review:
Vert delicious but I must say that even we went with the 30% sugar option, the teas were still very sweet.

Taro + pearl 💥💥💥💥💥
Peach iced tea + raspberry pearls and rainbow jelly 💥💥💥💥
Cleanliness 💥💥💥💥💥
Staff💥💥💥💥💥

Name: Sharetea Swanston
Author: Max Gross
Review:
ShareTea is a Bubble Tea cafe in the heart of the Melbourne. They brew a massive range of Brewed Tea, Fresh Milk, Fruit Tea & Ice Blended Milk Tea!

As a dairy free diner, I tried two of their fruit teas. On my first visit, I had the passionfruit tea with rainbow jelly & pearls. (normal sweetness, half ice) The tea was very refreshing, but there was way too much toppings in the tea.

On my second visit I had the strawberry tea with rainbow jelly (normal sweetness, half ice). This was a much more balanced blend, with just the right amount of toppings. Perfect afternoon pick-me-up.

If you're looking for great bubble tea in the city, check out ShareTea!

Name: Sharetea Swanston
Author: Jennifer Hammond
Review:
I ordered an Okinawa milk tea with half sugar and it tasted like it is 50% more sugar.
I even chewed pieces of sugar that was not dissolved properly.
My tongue was numb from the drink.
Transaction made on 23/07/2024 Tues at 1:45pm

Name: Sharetea Swanston
Author: Rach
Review: Yum yum cheese oolong tea!!!!!! ✨✨✨love the cheese on top which is very match with the tea.  Nice mix with the white pearl. No ice 🧊 30%sweetness 🤤😆

Name: Gong cha Springvale
Author: Rosalina Walsh
Review: This bubble tea shop in Springvale offers a wide variety of flavors and is always introducing new seasonal options, keeping things fresh and exciting. There's often a long line, but it's worth the wait! The location is super convenient, right next to the seating area in the middle of the market, making it easy to enjoy your drink. Highly recommend for bubble tea lovers!

Name: Gong cha Springvale
Author: Savvy Sivaraks
Review:
On the 29th July I ordered a cookie milktea but was given cookie choco milktea, I mentioned this to the staff but she kept insisting that I got the correct order because both drinks have the same color. I was not happy with the customer service, the way she spoke and refused to make me a new drink was rude. I didn’t want to argue further so I left. I have bought both drinks before and I know the difference in color and taste, even after I tasted the drink I knew it was definitely a cookie choco milktea.

Order taken/made incorrectly is okay, but it’s more about the reaction and the customer service after that.

Name: Gong cha Springvale
Author: Victor
Review: Well known bubble tea chain. You know exactly what to expect when coming. I usually order one of the top 10s with least sugar and they mostly come out tasting fine. The service is quick and efficient. Outside there is an area where you can sit down and enjoy your tea.

Name: Gong cha Springvale
Author: Noland Hoang
Review: Always mess up my order. I know they are busy but you should pay attention to the labels before making drinks. I order less sugar but they make it so sweet like more sugar

Name: Gong cha Springvale
Author: COM DRIVE
Review:
I never know what to get from here via uber. So many options.!! And perfect straw and lid. No mess to puncture it. Just one shot. Every time. but the fact they list calories on ubereats and give you so many sweetness customisations puts the service head and shoulders above the competiton. You can order without sugar and to use sweetner instead! Yall drink too much sugar and these drinks never need it. Use sweetner or eliminate it ppl

Vs. Teaser which has more premium feeling nicer cups but gong cha is a surprisingly good option. It all just works. Might be my goto if ican figure out what to pick for $20 all up so deluvery is free.

My issue with gong cha is their liquids seem thin. So ive drunk it all too fast. Mix it up or stop watering everything down?

Name: Pure Boba
Author: Le Nam Phuong Dang (Lee)
Review:
My fav neighborhood boba.

Super good price so I didn’t expect them to use fresh milk in their milk tea and natural ingredients like the more pricey places in the city. I usually don’t enjoy powdered milk tea and artificial flavourings, this place hit my spot. Heaps of options and even dairy-free alternatives.

Could tell the owners are really considerate and care about what they do, got served by one of them once and I was impressed.

My go-to: their new palm sugar boba.
Very pleasant sweetness, and would be healthier than regular refined sugar.

Name: Pure Boba
Author: Ishwor Bastakoti
Review: The tea taste amazing. Their brown sugar boba is the best one. The guys are friendky and of smiley nature. The atmosphere is elegant if you wish to enjoy the tea within. Overall, great place.

Name: Pure Boba
Author: Micaela Chang
Review: This is definitely my favourite boba place I come here every now and then and they always manage to impress. The service here is absolutely fantastic they are so helpful and love to help me what to decide. The atmosphere is also really nice and comfy with lots of patterns every where, they just need to get rid of the little bit of rust but other then that it’s amazing I would definitely recommend for everyone!

Name: Pure Boba
Author: Jasmine Viviana
Review: I absolutely love that they open late and the customer service is top tier whenever I want to adjust my sugar level. They even let me try it out whether I wanted more sugar or not on my drink. They also have a variety of flavours which I don’t usually see in other stores such as the ginger milk tea or the palm sugar milk tea.

Name: Pure Boba
Author: Carla Scotto
Review: Best boba on the Carnegie Main Street. We try to have different flavours every time, there are many options for alternative milk lovers. I love the earl grey, red velvet, spicy chai, lemon, strawberry milkshake, chocolate ice cream smoothie, black sesame, ovaltine, and green tea!!

Name: Cha Cha Australia
Author: me
Review: On the bright side the service was fantastic! The order came out quickly, although the pearls were a major letdown. They were incredibly hard, which is a bit of a dealbreaker for something you expect go be soft and chewy.

Name: Cha Cha Australia
Author: D Yas
Review:
I'm not a huge BBT drinker so I easily get overwhelmed with the options, take a while to decide only then to order one of the original basic flavours. Anyone else? The service I recieved today from the young lady was lovely. She was so patient, explained options available to me (as I wanted warm) and recommended me a few flavours.
I love places that offer different sizes because I just can't get through a large size cup and don't want to spend $8+ for a few sips.
I settled for a warm Taiwanese milk tea with grass jelly, around $6 for a regular size and it was perfect. For future, it's also great to know I can have a seat in-store to break up my eating & shopping expedition in Springvale :)

Name: Cha Cha Australia
Author: Victor
Review: Not my go to for bubble tea (only personal preference) but do enjoy their soft serves. Had the taro and there was a nice distinct taro flavour. Enjoyable and quick dessert following a meal at Springvale. Would love it if they had parfaits (hint hint)!

Name: Cha Cha Australia
Author: Will Kim
Review: I love this place! Their milk soft service is to die for! 🍦

Name: Cha Cha Australia
Author: Sunny Supalerksiri
Review: Great beverage as always. Friendly and helpful staff.

Name: Cha Cha Keysborough
Author: Stacey Veronique
Review: This is our favourite bubble tea spot in the south-east! The taste is always consistent and the staff are so friendly and careful. We always come back here, we have bubbletea more often than we should. I just made a big group order for work and they labled all the cups and provided the right sized straws depending if we had toppings or not and they didn't mess up any of our orders ❤️❤️ They seriously set the standard.

Name: Cha Cha Keysborough
Author: Eddie Orellana
Review: Recently tried this place for the first time and it's now become my favourite tea place! 😁 I'm determined to try every item on the menu! All that I have tried so far have been both delicious and refreshing! Definitely recommend!

Name: Cha Cha Keysborough
Author: kaitlin nguyen
Review: Please be more careful with what you put into the system when ordering because this is the 3rd time I’ve asked for my drink with white pearls but I get black pearls, and I see that the label says black pearls. I’m very sad 😔

Name: Cha Cha Keysborough
Author: chloe
Review: the staff are amazing! i go there all the time and i love it. such a great place to go to! i highly recommended. they made my order so well and so fast every time. also, barely ever long lines. 5 stars, definitely!

Name: Cha Cha Keysborough
Author: Byron C
Review:
Staff friendly, efficient and fairly quick.

The tea lacked flavour for my liking compared to other places I have frequented.

However, tea is still good and well worth it.

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Chau Tran
Review: The drinks were great. I’d love to try other drinks at Choulee later. But, the staff members were not friendly and welcoming with a cursoy attitude and no facial expression at all, although it was not busy at that time. I hope the store will take this into consideration and bring the customers better customer experience. ❤️

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Leonard
Review:
Really fun, clean, and vibrant atmosphere for bubble teas, yogurt drinks and more.
I ordered the people rice yogurt drink which was really good.

Aside from it being a tad bit more sweeter than I prefer and the rice being too small and not as cherry... all was good. I recommend the rice yogurt over Milk Flower place.

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Prashna Gautam
Review:
I love this place, I've been here thrice. I ordered the passion fruit tea for the first try, which was sincerely my first time drinking a fruit based tea but the only thing I can say about it is that it was very refreshing in the 30 degree weather of Melbourne. The next two times I have ordered the Earl Grey tea, since it's my favourite tea base. I have enjoyed adjusting the sweetness level and the milk as I like less sugar or no sugar in my drink.
I brought a friend of mine along with me, who didn't find boba tea as appealing when we had it in other places but she loved this one. We went there today and I found that the quality of the drinks have been consistent which I have not found in other places, so I like this place + I can sit and talk with my friend while drinking tea. The staff at the front desk was also really friendly and the service overall was great... I'm looking forward to exploring more flavours in the future, I love match and strawberries so maybe that'd be a good one to try...

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: v
Review: visited here multiple times & so far the drinks have always been good quality! store interior is also aesthetic so it’s nice to chill inside. drinks have always been served quite fast too! recommended to try :)

Name: CHOULEE 丘丘茶
Author: Brissy Reviews
Review: Such a cute bubble tea shop. Mu sister and I loved it. It was a bit hard to find using apple maps but that might have been my phone.

Name: Sharetea St Albans
Author: Quyên Bảo
Review: I order 2 pearl milk tea and 1 okinawa milk tea but I have to wait nearly 30 minutes while the shop is not crowded at that time. Moreover, the staff made my pearl milk tea wrong, and it seems like they just pour milk onto the black tea, it tastes like water.

Name: Sharetea St Albans
Author: minh anh
Review: Love the drinks but saw a male manager/supervisor (tall and brown) yelling at a female staff. The girl was very helpful and provided great service, was very off putting hearing the employer/manager yelling at her, it kind of ruins the atmosphere. The girl also seemed distressed and it wasnt even busy.

Name: Sharetea St Albans
Author: Henry
Review: Last week, I went to share tea with my son and I ordered 2 drinks for us. I got my drink very fast however a tall Indian man who I think was the manager was very rude by insulting the young female workers. I do not appreciate this type of toxic behaviour while drinking with my son!

Name: Sharetea St Albans
Author: Miss Minchin
Review:
Ordered a Large Tiger Fresh Milk Tea with Oreo and the boba pearls are either uncooked or been sitting for awhile. It was hard. Really disgusting.
What a waste of money. Not worth going back to this branch.

Update as a reply to your comment 7/24: Details had been emailed right after delivery. Disgusting drink 🤮

Name: Sharetea St Albans
Author: katie t
Review: Incredibly nice and friendly workers even though there was a huge rush. Ordered the tiger fresh milk tea  its so good!!

Name: Sharetea Springvale
Author: Victor
Review: Classic bubble tea chain located in the central main area of Springvale. Generally consistent in quality and made quickly and efficiently. There are a few stools inside the store though the cleanliness of the place could be improved with bubble tea stains on the walls and floors.

Name: Sharetea Springvale
Author: Edward Choi
Review:
Massive shoutout to Share Tea in Springvale! 🙌 I’ve been here multiple times, and every single visit has been amazing. The staff are always generous, super friendly, and they consistently whip up your order in no time!

🧋 Plus, unlike many other Share Teas, you can pay by card 💳 with no surcharge 💥.

The speed, quality, and convenience are unbeatable, making it my go-to for bubble tea. If you haven’t tried it yet, you’re seriously missing out!

Name: Sharetea Springvale
Author: GAIIA Official
Review: This is probably one of my favourite Bubble Tea places, even though I never drank Bubble Tea in my life. The drink I ordered was the "Rose Green Tea Cherry Blossom". It had a great balance of sweetness with the tea. The tea is not bitter. The flavour of Cherry Blossom does not overpower the Green Tea. Presentation wise, it's pretty definitely like a rose. And the white pearls inside definitely don't catch your throat, so it's easier to drink. And blends well with the flavour and balance of the Green Tea. Service was on point. Servers knew how to order our drinks and give the drinks to us when they were ready. Even asked us if we wanted a bag. But we didn't need one, so we politely declined. Overall it's a great place to start if you want to get into Bubble Tea, because I had no idea what to drink, let alone which drink would be the right one. So I just picked the prettiest and easiest one to drink. 👍👍

Name: Sharetea Springvale
Author: Too Mystic
Review: Recieved the wrong order, the store was unbearably small, unable to sit anywhere that isn't sitcky from the sugar. Customer service gave me a terrible attitude. The food was toleratable at best. Second time ordering and recieved an overly diluted drink, tasted like poor toilet water mixed with sugar

Name: Sharetea Springvale
Author: Alex King
Review:
I give a four stars. Wish they had sockets (power point) so that I can order and drink here while working with my laptop 💻
Because they Sharetea Springvale doesn’t have sockets so that I have to go somewhere else to drink their tea and work. As a freelancer, I would say that it is really an inconvenience

Name: Sharetea Glen Waverley
Author: Amilliah
Review:
seats inside, near Glen Waverley station, good service and tasty drinks.

I ordered the Tiger fresh milk tea, this is delicious and recommended, Sharetea used a brown sugar syrup, which is super sweet and tastes great with the fresh milk.

Sharetea offers drinks like yoghurt, frozen, classic, dalgona, tiger, milky, and fruity.

Name: Sharetea Glen Waverley
Author: Tu Thu
Review:
Friendly staff, nice and cozy environment. Recommend mango or Lychee greentea with aloevera topping and less sugar level, it is tasty and fresh. They are doing 1+1 promotion until 7/9 and also complimentary cute milktea key chain on 30$ spent :) I was lucky I went with my group of friend and got 1 of them ( as in photo)
Overall, I found out they just changed the owner and renovated this place, so the staff are very friendly and clean environment. Will def come back 😊

Name: Sharetea Glen Waverley
Author: Brianna Lim
Review: This place has amazing drinks and the employees are really nice i really recommend coming to share tea at the glen. they also provide a pool table while you wait for your drink. 10/10 recommendation

Name: Sharetea Glen Waverley
Author: Jackie Z
Review:
I had a truly disappointing experience. I visited around 1 pm on a quiet Sunday, with only one customer ahead of me. I didn't mind waiting for a few minutes to place my order.

The staff made a mistake by putting the wrong Topping on my order. When I kindly requested the correct Topping, the staff's response was both impatient and unwilling. Instead of an apology, she somehow 'blamed' me by saying 'most people order this topping.' (?????)

Finally, I was served a drink overflowing with ice. She explained that it was made based on formula.

The service was the worst and most disappointing I've encountered.

Name: Sharetea Glen Waverley
Author: Tiina Xplorer
Review:
Visit at 13/06/2023

Great location and seating is abundant with available power points.
Additional entertainment in the form of air hockey is a plus.

However, there is some room for improvement in the drink options. Some pearls were not cooked thoroughly and were sticking together. Despite requesting 50% sugar, the drink was still overly sweet.

Name: Sharetea Preston
Author: Cool Water
Review:
Hello, i have been going to this place since i was a little girl and it is one of my favourite branches of share tea to go too!

I go to this tea place after the dentist every single time, its basically a ritual to go to this tea place after getting my teeth done hahah.

I love the workers there and from what I have seen personally is that they have great communication skills, and that some of them have been working there for years!

I also like the variety in choices of drinks and the different kind of drinks (I don’t think they still do the yogurt one (TдT))

Basically I recommend and you should go there, super cheap and good quality as well as a resting area if you just want to chill out.

Name: Sharetea Preston
Author: Diana Rocha S
Review: I’ve tried to order the yogurt bubble tea three times in a row, only to find that it is never available. It's baffling that they include it on the menu if they consistently cannot offer it. Additionally, the attitude of the staff member who is always attending is disappointing, very rude, reflecting poor customer service. It makes one wonder why they run a business if they cannot offer proper service.

Name: Sharetea Preston
Author: David Wang
Review: The boba milk tea is good, but the girl put too much ice, so my brain hurts so badly! But at least the boba milk tea taste good tho

Name: Sharetea Preston
Author: Angela Rakocevic
Review: Teas are genuinely sickly sweet! I got through 2 sips before I had to give up on my drink, both my partner and I ordered no sugar but both of ours were far too sweet.

Name: Sharetea Preston
Author: Reyshyl Gresola
Review: We asked the staff in Preston Branch politely if they accept a preston central gift card because sharetea is on the list of the stores accepting it but the guy staff that is on duty today 30/10/23 said no, we asked if we can try and he said if it will go through, he will be the one to pay for it in the store and will be scolded by the owner. But how and why? Amount will be deducted on the gift card itself. Since we are craving for a taro milk tea, we ordered 9pcs and pay with a debit card. But, the milk tea doesn't have much taste. I ordered for normal sugar and half ice so it will be tastier but it disappoint us! We love sharetea especially taro flavor but this isn't taste good today and more watery! The guy on duty seems not to like working today, he didn't even smile.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Mandie L.
Review:
Tasted like the standard Chatime bubble tea. Nothing to complain about :-)

My friend tried the new Milo range and doesn’t recommend it (just make your own), but everything else (fruit tea, milk tea) tasted fine and good.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Joanne Fong
Review:
My recent experience at CT left me thoroughly impressed and eager to share my praise.
The atmosphere was inviting and staff were welcoming.
The service by outstanding staff Eric was flawless. He was not only attentive but also anticipated our needs without being intrusive.
Drink was right to our taste,thanks for Eric's recommendation.
I highly recommended.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Karuppusamy Vijaya
Review: Best experience at this chatime location, was served by this nice boys which gave good customer service. The atmosphere was very nice and enjoyable. I had brown sugar milk tea Drinks are very delicious!!, but too sugary less flavour but I would definitely recommend.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Pinky Tse
Review: Great location. Very easy to order. There’s option to order in person, scan QR code or self-order. Friendly staff and very clean.

Name: Chatime Spencer Street
Address: Spencer Outlet, Shop 219A, Level 1/201 Spencer St, Docklands
Author: Wong Jym
Review: Many thanks to Eric(the handsome cute guy) for giving excellent service. The staff is polite and attentive, friendly, going above and beyond to provide a wonderful experience. 5 star is not enough to rate for it. Would love to come again. Thanks.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Mandie L.
Review:
(Reviewing on behalf of my friend)…
Such a fun and yummy experience! They let you sample all the different milk tea flavours and they all tasted beautiful! Loved the honeydew flavour most. Wonderful range of toppings too!

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Mitchell Hoeboer
Review:
Actual S-tier boba.
You pay for a cup, add your own toppings & ice then choose the tea flavour you want.
They give you a little sample cup to try the tea before you decide which you want.
Definitely going to tell my boba appreciating friends about this place.

Also staff were super friendly and explain how it works if you haven't been there before.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Michy
Review:
I loved how fresh the boba tasted as well as all the variety of teas that we got to try before we made our drink.

Today I got the Thai milk tea with taro pudding, custard pudding and brown sugar pearls.

The staff was also very friendly!

I would recommend coming to toppings & tea when you are or ever go to Springvale 🧋

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: Lissa Breen (LissaCaldina)
Review:
AUSTRALIA’S FIRST DIY BUBBLE TEA (TOPPINGS N TEA) !!

With UNLIMITED teas and toppings. It was fun and my 1st experience with DIY Bubble Tea. I mixed 3 type of teas + 7 toppings, OMG heaven on earth. You only need to purchase the cup size and you can choose whichever tea flavor & toppings as much as your cup can hold . The best ever bubble tea.
You will be spoiled with more than 10 types of tea flavors and 20+ toppings to choose from and trust me you’re gonna want more than 1 cup in your hand. The lady(staff) in this photo was super friendly, helpful and funny as well .

Located just 5 mins walk from Springvale station .

It’s such a fun experience like no other ‼️ Great Bubble Tea with Great Service.

Name: Toppings n Tea Springvale
Author: May Vuong
Review:
Notice the ice machine, or else you gonna end up with a no-ice bubble tea like me 😂 this place is nice since you can add on as many toppings as you like but doesn't need to worry about the price. The only minus point is that you cannot adjust the sugar level tho

TOPPING & TEA
📍33A Buckingham Ave, Springvale VIC 3171
⏰ 10am - 9pm
💰 $6.30 small size
☑️🌕🌕🌕🌑🌑

Name: machi machi Box Hill
Author: Su Yeon Kwon
Review: Very disappointed to be honest. The atmosphere was okay but it took more than 20 minutes to get 2 bubble teas. We ordered the Matcha drinks- the Matcha taste was too bitter. I got the wrong drink initially after 20 minutes of waiting but it was fixed. Probably I would not come back. Pricy but the taste was not as good as other bubble tea stores nearby.

Name: machi machi Box Hill
Author: tiffii_c
Review: Machi machi has been my biggest craving lately. Staff are always so friendly and nice. Their milk tea is so good. Recommend their Black tea with pearls, Black tea with creme brulee and most of all their Grapefruit Green Tea slush. The grapefruit is just next level,  so refreshing and not overly sweet. Healthy choice. Don't forget to also join their membership $10 - you receive a free drink and a key ring. Earn points with every purchase.  You can also pay using Liven Pay

Name: machi machi Box Hill
Author: David J
Review: If this business was listed, I would bet against it in anticipation of it going bust real fast. Horrible inefficiency (the lady who's supposed to be serving at the counter isn't there most of the time, just running back and forth frantically) and the drinks are just as bad. I wouldn't be surprised if the excessive overpricing is due to the effort gone into developing the huge variety of drinks and coming up with some more. My two sons struggled to even finish their respective drinks and when we were there the first two of their choices weren't available and they ran out of pearls. :) Go and visit this place only if you're willing to wait 20+ minutes and happy to spend 5min going through a menu board full of items you've never even heard of and have no information for.

Name: machi machi Box Hill
Author: Kevin L
Review: The service was okay but had to wait 20 mins for 2 milk teas. My brown rice tea taste so bad. Im so disappointed since i waited that long for this drink. Honestly $8:50 is so not worth this drink.

Name: machi machi Box Hill
Author: Excalibur Murphy
Review: The Mango Smoothie with Panna Cotta was a sight to behold the flavours melted upon the slighted touch of my tongue. Though the waiting times are long, I guarantee that it is worth it.

Name: Toppings n Tea
Review: The worker was so friendly and explained how the place worked since we had never been before. The price is only based off of cup size and is very reasonable (this cup was $8.40). There was a lot of toppings to choose from and quite a few drink flavours too. My only issue was the you can’t control the sugar amount in the drinks, and they all tasted quite bitter and strong. Would’ve liked if they were a bit sweeter!

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Clare Taylor
Review: When we got there we got greeted and shown how the process of creating your own tea. Loved that we could sample the flavours and the variety of mix ins they had on offer. Process was quick and easy and tea was yummy, thank you! 🧋🩷

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Yvonne Lum
Review: This place is really cute and for a change, you get to make your own mixture of bubble tea. Reasonable price. Customer service is fantastic! Mady, the sweet girl full of smiles, showed us how it works and gave us a good run down of the options. Good job! Definitely recommend.

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Nara Lee
Review: Fun and unique experience of picking out your own tea and toppings! It’s a great place to try new combinations at a reasonable price per cup. Staff are friendly as well and the store is very cute and easy to locate! Would recommend!

Name: Toppings n Tea
Author: Tomomi
Review:
I recently visited a DIY bubble tea shop and had an amazing experience! The concept is fantastic—you can add as many toppings as you want, which made creating my bubble tea so much fun😍 The variety of teas available is impressive, and you can even taste them before making your choice. I noticed some people mixing different teas, which is a great option for those who like to experiment.

The staff were incredibly helpful and kind, even though they were quite busy. They always had a smile on their faces and were very friendly when talking to customers! Overall, it was a delightful visit, and I highly recommend this bubble tea shop to anyone looking for a unique and enjoyable experience!

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Sophia Wimshurst
Review: My fav boba shop in the town! I love their strawberry yoghurt one it’s so yummmm and the staff are all very lovely they are all nice people especially Jason he’s so friendly :)

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Suvarna Lee
Review: Really lovely tea shop with a bit of a different spin. Tea is delicious and pearls are freshly made so a whole lot chewier. Drinks are not stirred so the toppings are sort of layered. It’s unusual in a very pleasant way. Staff are very friendly and patient.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Herald - Barako PH
Review:
I'm absolutely loving Popping and Tea Williams Landing! My go-to order is the Coffee Milk Tea, and it never fails to impress. The perfect blend of rich coffee and creamy milk tea is a match made in heaven.

But what really sets this place apart is the friendly staff. They're always welcoming and attentive, making sure you feel right at home.
Can't wait to come back and try more of their delicious drinks!

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Mado
Review: Worst place to drink bubble tea. Got the mango milk tea and taro milk tea, both drinks taste was so bad. I threw them in the bin. The lady who is working there is so rude as well.

Name: Popping & Tea Williams landing
Address: Shop G01/102 Overton Rd, Williams Landing
Author: Srey Chhim
Review: My go to for bubble tea. Most of the time they will get the order right ✅️  and when they do they are delicious 😋 I find when you added too many toppings, one will get missed.

Name: Gong cha Elizabeth St
Author: Roongrawee Eabsakul
Review:
Order 3 items, then got only 2???? The funny thing is both 2 items that I've got are ALL WRONG. Moreover, I cannot contact the restaurant through the phone. Bravo!!! This branch is the NEXT LEVEL!!!! Try order something if you want your order to be randomised and cost more than what you'll get :)

Gong Cha, you better to your work not just sleep on it 🤯!

Name: Gong cha Elizabeth St
Author: Nawar Arnaout
Review: We got multiple boba flavors as I was with family. The drinks were nice and tasty as classics would usually be. Service was pretty quick and friendly. My only criticism would be having the menu only in front of the cashier hidden from the rest. We spent a while picking a drink because we had to wait out turn to see the menu. I suggest displaying the entire menus on the monitor screens on top so you can decide before it’s you’re turn to order.

Name: Gong cha Elizabeth St
Author: Kieren Watkins
Review: The taro flavour was gritty, like they had made it from a powder that hasn't dissolved properly. The toppings were good though. The self-ordering system with the huge display was great though, but it should estimate the wait time for your order; we were waiting there unexpectedly for 15 minutes with no place to sit.

Name: Gong cha Elizabeth St
Author: Thanya Thanyarin
Review: Gong cha is good, sometimes queue can get really long so do keep track of ur time!

Name: Gong cha Elizabeth St
Author: Ngan Le
Review:
I ordered 2 drinks for me and my boyfriend on october 6th around 11pm to 11.30pm.
The female staff made my drink wrong and instead of making another new one she poured out the wrong milk tea, washed the plastic cup with dirty hands and poured new milk tea in. What the hell is she doing ???
The owner or manager please should review the camera and instruct the staff on food safety and hygiene. 😶🙏🏻

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Josh Briscoe (Aer)
Review: I love going to Gotcha M-City. First time I went upstairs as I’m a worker nearby I came across this bubble tea shop, the staff were very welcoming and helpful because it was my first time buying a drink at Gotcha. There’s a lot of variety of drinks on offer which I appreciate a lot. Their smiles make my day which is why I come there a lot now. Very quick and efficient to bring out drinks to customers including me!. I highly recommend everyone to come and visit Gotcha M-City they make great quality drinks and their customer service is amazing. =)

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Emdwyn Anderson
Review: They make fresh pearls every day, so the texture is always fantastic (I got classic pearl milk tea). As it was the end of the day, they were getting rid of their excess pearls and gave us free pearls on the house!!! Love these people and their tea!!!!!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Dan T
Review: Excellent service, helpful and the drinks were delicious. First time having Brulee though, some instructions would have been good (I didn't stir and the Brulee was all at the bottom) but overall even the end bit was delicious, I just wish I mixed it prior!

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Lorraine Goh
Review:
24/9/2024 9pm

Absolutely appalled by the customer service I received today at the M-City Gotcha store. I have never been treated so poorly by wait staff in my entire life.

The lady working picked up her phone whilst taking our order and proceeded to speak on the phone and then gave us the incorrect drinks. When we came back to tell her, she was extremely rude, dismissive and unapologetic.

Not only that, she was also extremely rude to the other wait staff. Definitely not a good look and a very disappointing experience.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea x Brioche - M-City Clayton
Address: M-City Shopping Centre, Level 1 2107/2125 Princes Hwy, Clayton
Author: Hakan T.
Review: If I'm ever feeling like some bubble tea, I always find myself making my way to this store. Easily my favourite bubble tea in Melbourne! Dom is very friendly, polite and always greets his customers with a huge smile. He is always happy to give recommendations according to my taste and likes. He finished preparing my drinks after a couple minutes, with the perfect ratios and freshest ingredients. Highly recommend for anyone nearby in the area craving refreshing beverage.

Name: Milksha
Author: Foodie Luwee
Review:
My niece’s favourite boba in Melbourne and probably one of the cheapest too in terms of quality and size. We had Orange Green
Tea, Genmaicha milk w/ Honey
Pearl and brown sugar milk tea with pearl toppings. 3 different drinks for different preferences. The orange green tea was quite refreshing and was definitely a thirst quencher, the boba is on the sweet side which is my favourite while the genmaicha taste a like matcha but less strong.

Name: Milksha
Author: Malaysia Food Reviews
Review: Loved their latest Fresh Taro Milk with Mini Rice Ball, loaded with taro and QQ rice balls. Valrhona, Earl Grey and Oolong are good options too.

Name: Milksha
Author: Marveatsmelb
Review: Loved the bubble tea and also their signature honey pearls! One of my favs in the CBD 😋

Name: Milksha
Author: Anneliese
Review:
This is one of my absolute favourite bubble tea places! I love their variety in fruit and milk teas. The aesthetic is also very cute!

Flavours I tried ~
1. Brown sugar coffee latte with honey pearls
2. Genmaicha milk with honey pearls
3. Wintermelon lemon juice with herbal jelly
4. Cloudy cream dirty matcha with green tea jelly

I really like that they have a new coffee range with St Ali coffee. The coffee flavour is delicious and there is the option of dirty matcha. They have lots of matcha variety including genmaicha which is more bitter in taste and is good when you don’t want a sweet drink. A flavour I tried for the first time is the wintermelon and lemon drink that was both sour and sweet which I really liked and was very refreshing. Their pearls are also very soft and chewy, plus they have great topping choices like green tea and coffee jelly.

Definitely visit Milksha for some delicious drink flavours!

Name: Milksha
Author: keemekooh
Review: According to top 10 , this one is the top 1 highly recommended tea from them but for my own opinion , big no…  why? Flavor is tasteless, pearls are hard to chew,  you cant taste the tea flavor , more on ice than the flavours 😖I’ve tried so many different milkteas but this one is no for me , or maybe it depends on your tastebuds but the point here is when you say top 1, your expectations is high but 🤷‍♀️

Name: T-Theory
Author: Yosh Ha
Review: I was having a bad day, and the only thing that’s going to cheer me up is a large, fresh and tasty jasmine green milk tea with less ice, standard sugar (and black pearls yea). So today’s choice of vendor was the M store (undisclosed name for legal purposes). The milk tea was horrendous. It was so bad that we couldn’t finish our milk teas and we had to throw them away, then we decided to drive to T Theory because it’s right around the corner to dispose the two untouched M milk teas and to get new ones. When we got to the godly T Theory store, the employee initially told me that the store was closed. Feeling defeated I ranted about how terrible my day was and the one thing that was going to save it was even worse. Hearing that, that angel of a staff member offered to make me the most heavenly and beautifully constructed cups of milk tea ever grazed the surface of our Earth. It is so refreshing and so soul touching that my boyfriend shed a single tear. So thank you, for that kind stranger that I did not have the courtesy to ask for her name, for saving my day, and making my whole week. To T-Theory, from your new biggest fan/customer, if that lady (working at 10.30pm on 31st July 2024) wasn’t an owner, you MUST raise her salary by at least 25%. I thank you, T-Theory for introducing the world to her. We will continue taking out business back here REPEATEDLY and we urge who ever reads this to do the same. Thank you for your reading, evidently, I poured my heart and soul into this review, as did that staff member with our milk teas.

Name: T-Theory
Author: Rabia Zafar
Review:
Super yummy! Love bubble tea? Or have always wanted to try it? If you love bubble tea make sure you try T-Theory🧋
🥭🥝When it comes to the range of boba drinks and fruit teas available at T-Theory you might as well have a second stomach so you can taste all the deliciousness! 🤩So many great options! They also had faloodeh and it was just perfect combo with the bubble tea! Beautiful cosy store!
The options were fantastic and plenty, and the Mango Fruit tea was just delicious and very refreshing!! Overall, delish bubble teas, conveniently located. A must MUST go!!

Name: T-Theory
Author: Davina H.
Review:
Management seems questionable. Why is the employee working alone with no other assistance? Saw the server dealing with 15 orders on her own which made the waiting time a bit long...

However, I was served by a nice female indo server. Had a pleasant chat with her about our hometowns. She was very sweet and made my order super fast!

But please fix the management.

Name: T-Theory
Author: Karen
Review:
Ordered jasmine green milk tea and brown sugar milk tea, contained barely any flavour. Tasted like watery milk.

Never ordering here again, no wonder there’s only one in Melbourne!!!

Name: T-Theory
Author: Meghana Karande
Review: In Love with their bubble Milk Tea! Super close to University of Melbourne. It is usually hard to get the basic drinks right, but you will love it here with their multiple options of fruit tea, slushee and yogurts to choose from. And the decor is cute too!!

Name: Sharetea Clayton
Author: Mai Le
Review: this is not the first time that I felt disappointed in Sharetea! First time I bought the Purple Rice YG and still have too much big ice inside and they didnt give me a new one, they blended again and it like water not frozen anymore.
