Second time i bought Assam MT and it taste like no sugar, already told them and the staff said already put sugar, made for me new one but it taste not different.

Name: Sharetea Clayton
Author: Keira
Review: Drinks are always lovely but having one person working out front making drinks on a weekend is ridiculous. Waiting 20 minutes for two drinks bc this young guy was making drinks by himself on a Saturday lunch is sad to watch

Name: Sharetea Clayton
Author: Susan Yang
Review: Ordered a drink with 3x toppings from Fantuan but they forgot to give me a straw on delivery… so I called Shareatea back and they refused a refund and suggested I walk over to the shop get a straw 🤦🏻‍♀️

Name: Sharetea Clayton
Author: Hailey Li
Review: The staff was “nice”. During the order, mistake happened and the boss was “nice” to change drink for me. If the boss did not want to change, can let me know, why need to end up whit half cup of ice, even can’t shake the pearls. Btw the drink is good to try

Name: Sharetea Clayton
Author: juliette
Review:
we went to this location wednesday night, and it was a fairly standard sharetea experience until the gentleman working, we never caught his name, struck up a conversation with him. my friend asked him his favourite tea and the man told us the strawberry promotion drink and pointed to a poster. we agreed it looked delicious and promised the man we would come back to try it.
5 minutes later the man reappears with 4 samples for us to try. such kindness warmed my heart. admittedly at sharetea the staff are often busy and don't have time to interact or come off as cold, but this gentleman paused his cleaning tasks to develop a meaningful connection with us. i wish i asked his name to thank him and give him a special shoutout. he was a beautiful soul and we loved our experience

Name: Bubble Cup Fresh
Address: next to Schnitz, Kiosk 54/250 Heaths Rd, Werribee
Author: Leni Sirotic
Review: I loved my experience here, got the brown sugar milk tea and it was lovely! Perfect customer service. Would 100% reccomend

Name: Bubble Cup Fresh
Address: next to Schnitz, Kiosk 54/250 Heaths Rd, Werribee
Author: Talia Chapman
Review:
Had to wait 20 minutes for my order just for one drink... The tea was okay but I'm not really a fan; I got lychee flavour. It's also quite expensive (9.60 for a large tea with pearls) compared to other tea shops and wasn't worth it in my opinion. Also I wanted ice and I didn't even get any.

Positives: the pearls taste good and the screen was easy to use.

Name: Bubble Cup Fresh
Address: next to Schnitz, Kiosk 54/250 Heaths Rd, Werribee
Author: Angel-Rose Hodgetts
Review: This is my favorite place to get bubble tea, I always get the taro milk tea and it's perfect everytime!

Name: Bubble Cup Fresh
Address: next to Schnitz, Kiosk 54/250 Heaths Rd, Werribee
Author: Jitin Ambwani
Review: My daughter loves it, mango green tea with mixed pop is her favourite.

Name: Bubble Cup Fresh
Address: next to Schnitz, Kiosk 54/250 Heaths Rd, Werribee
Author: shahima Shahin
Review: Very bed experience evar.after buying bubble drink.i ask for bag and tissue the lady making rude face.her behaviors is very rude.plz take some action for this kind of stafs.we r customers and the drink is not free.

Name: Gong cha Melbourne Central
Address: Shop 236, Melbourne Central, Cnr Latrobe Street &, Swanston St, Melbourne
Author: M C
Review: Located next to the escalator at Melbourne Central, it’s easy to see why it’s a popular place to order your drinks. Tried their top #8 Lemon Roasted Melon Tea & Basil Seeds with no ice, and I loved it! Sweetness level is perfect, and I didn’t had to wait long for my drink. Keen to try their other drinks next time.

Name: Gong cha Melbourne Central
Address: Shop 236, Melbourne Central, Cnr Latrobe Street &, Swanston St, Melbourne
Author: Renz Kerr
Review:
Mia (if Im not mistaken) the store manager has a bad attitude, gave us terrible customer service and management there is awful. How did she even end up to be a manager there in the first place with that kind of personality and attitude?

My friend approached her if we can order at the till because we have vouchers from the Golden Tickets but said only one line to the self service screen to order and when we got there we asked how can we input it and said it needs to be ordered in the till, so misleading of her and wasting a lot of time. Also, she only punched 3 vouchers for us when we gave her 4, we didnt notice it until my friends are now paying me.

Name: Gong cha Melbourne Central
Address: Shop 236, Melbourne Central, Cnr Latrobe Street &, Swanston St, Melbourne
Author: boom confetti
Review: Despite it’s a always busy tea shop in the Melbourne Central, the staffs work quickly to serve up the delicious milk tea and always maintain such high standards even during the peak hours with nice customers service. High recommend trying their signature drinks!

Name: Gong cha Melbourne Central
Address: Shop 236, Melbourne Central, Cnr Latrobe Street &, Swanston St, Melbourne
Author: Silly Wander
Review: gongcha_australia just released the cutest bottle for Christmas Season. The gingerbread man bottle is super duper cute. Now it’s a top hit item you need for this Xmas season. Go to your nearest Gongcha and collect this cutest collection.

Name: Gong cha Melbourne Central
Address: Shop 236, Melbourne Central, Cnr Latrobe Street &, Swanston St, Melbourne
Author: Sammy T
Review:
This is a little great shop in Melbourne Central that serves Taiwanese Tea, the one I like the best is the Pearl Tea with Half Ice, I normally get the large one and it taste great, I tried the Taro Tea and it was awful, though some people seem to like it!

I also tried the Grape Green Tea & Basil Seeds and it was nice but my favourite is still the Pearl Tea with Half Ice, its really a great drink anytime of the day or night! If you haven't tried it you should, even just for the experience of it. The Pearl Tea with full ice is also great, really depends on each one's taste!

Name: Lucky Cat
Author: nicole johnston
Review:
There is a a noodle wall where u pick which noodle, pick your extras including pork and veggies. Definitely a fun place for kids to order!

Made to order Banh Mi’s

Name: Lucky Cat
Author: Branko
Review:
Lucky cat has been my favorite Banh mi place for quite some time. Lady preparing the banh mi is always very attentive, making sure all requests are being made. It’s sooo delicious, both chicken and pork.
I also tried the tea and while it’s good, it might be bit too sweet for me. So I’m sticking to banh mi order and once a month I go for the tea.
Please is very clean, order is always super quick. One happy returning customer!

Name: Lucky Cat
Author: Karl Ong
Review:
It's me, I'm the lucky cat seeing as Lucky Cat has opened right across the street from work.
Came here twice over two days - once for the matcha bubble tea, and then the next day for a banh mi.

The matcha was very very much matcha, which was fantastic. The banh mi was fresh, absolutely delicious and appropriately spicy! It wasn't the cheapest banh mi but it was worth every dollar 😁

Looking forward to more milk options for the bubble tea in the future, but I'll definitely be coming back a LOT!

Name: Lucky Cat
Author: Celia Thompson-Shaw
Review: I recently dined at Lucky Cat Vietnamese Restaurant and had an exceptional experience. The ambiance was delightful, the staff were friendly and attentive, and, most importantly, the food was outstanding. Each dish showcased authentic flavors, and the presentation was impeccable. The menu offered a variety of options, catering to different preferences. Overall, Lucky Cat is a gem for Vietnamese cuisine enthusiasts – a five-star dining destination that I highly recommend.

Name: Lucky Cat
Author: dontguess noname
Review: Worst boba I’ve ever had. ordered a lychee milk tea and a strawberry smoothie which are syrup in milk and syrup shredded ice. Taste super artificial. Had to drink this much because the weather was too hot

Name: Sharetea Dandenong Junction
Address: Woolworths Dandenong Junction, Shop T5, Unit 1/3 Gladstone Rd, Dandenong
Author: Geetika Mishra
Review:
Ordered a mango passionfruit yoghurt but when I got it...it was just Plain yoghurt with just a lil bit of mango syrup. It don't usually happen but this time all the milk teas were wrong. Firstly the yoghurt and secondly I ordered watermelon milk tea and I got honeydew instead.
Fully wastage of time and money.

Name: Sharetea Dandenong Junction
Address: Woolworths Dandenong Junction, Shop T5, Unit 1/3 Gladstone Rd, Dandenong
Author: Mikaela Alessandra Garillo
Review: They make the best bubble tea here! I really love their smoothies, it’s not too “icey” like the other ones. 🙏🙏

Name: Sharetea Dandenong Junction
Address: Woolworths Dandenong Junction, Shop T5, Unit 1/3 Gladstone Rd, Dandenong
Author: Manette Teng
Review:
I want to share another flavour which I discovered recently called 'Rose fruit tea with cherry blossom and raspberry popping pearls, 1/2 sugar, 1/2 ice.'
I've tried many flavours but this particular tea drink stood out for me most. It's different, took me to another level, an unforgettable journey.
I've purchased it many times and quality is still superb. It's so refreshing, the taste and flavour is so elegant, aromatic and romantically dances in my mouth. The feeling I had when drinking this flavour, left me wanting for more (one cup wasn't enough for one person).
There's so many more and new flavours coming out, outstanding!
The staff are always showing respect and friendly towards customers.
Look forward to tasting more flavours!

My family and I purchased many flavoured bubble tea drinks on Sunday 28/05/23. We have the power to decide what, how and when we want it done to our liking. The power is in what we order!
The place is easy to find, very clean and lots of varieties to choose from.
Most importantly, we received great customer service. Staff were very polite, friendly, patient and always gave positive attitude. They always smiled no matter how busy they were.
I recommend this place for bubble tea lovers like myself and kids. Even for those who just want to enjoy a sweet moment and for relaxation. A great place to hang out with family &/or friends.
Overall, I'm extremely satisfied with my experience.
Challenge yourself by trying all the different flavours available, you won't regret it! They put a smile on every face!
Sharetea Dandenong Junction team, thank you once again for your exceptional service and for making my family day meaningful and wonderful 😀. See you again soon for more flavours to try and dare!

Name: Sharetea Dandenong Junction
Address: Woolworths Dandenong Junction, Shop T5, Unit 1/3 Gladstone Rd, Dandenong
Author: Shaista Yawari
Review: NGL, I never bother myself leaving reviews & this is definitely my first time leaving a review. I was just beyond impressed. Loved the customer service, super friendly staffs especially the guy working there. Just because of the good service & the way he prepared my drink. I went back to them 3 times in one day. Honestly speaking this was my first time to have my bubble drink so delicious. They are super generous. My large cup was more than halfway filled with pearls & I only had chosen 3 different pearls. Definitely will be my 2nd home. :)

Name: Sharetea Dandenong Junction
Address: Woolworths Dandenong Junction, Shop T5, Unit 1/3 Gladstone Rd, Dandenong
Author: Josh Briscoe (Aer)
Review: I never want to put a negative review but I have to.  We ordered a Dalgona Pearl MT, dalgona was tasteless it was nothing like coffee at all and the milk tea was just bland. Also why did the staff didn’t bother using a dome lid and instead using the sealer as we order from other Shareteas they use one. I couldn’t believe it on that day as before we were occasionally ordering drinks from here and the service was great. I feel like the staff needs to be retrained as this is not acceptable. With this experience we probably won’t be coming back again. I hope you will improve from this day forward.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Emmy Lien
Review:
The staff was very friendly and enthusiastic. All of the drink is also delicious and suitable for all ages.

I have returned here so many times and still loving drinks in here.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Nuramalina Hassan
Review: Service is great and Fast  and the staff members are always friendly.we always come here to get the “Dirt-Tea”. My boys love it.  There’s always plenty of pearls. Today I had the watermelon quenchers.  It’s one of my favourite. Love it.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Charlotte Vine
Review: Usually enjoy this place but was super excited for a tea tonight and ordered, and was being prepared for around 15-20 minutes and then my order was cancelled all of a sudden with no reason provided? Which meant the other tea place I like was then closed when I tried to place order elsewhere. So a bit cut. Was keen for bubble tea. :(

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Diary of Baby boys
Review:
Love how the staff is so friendly and welcoming.
Being a bubble tea lover, this place has the best tasting flavours for bubble tea. Definitely coming back.

Name: Teaser Tarneit
Author: Tulsi Thakar
Review: We ordered mango milk tea, and it came up really tasty. The staff was very friendly and fast. The service was quite quick. Highly recommended for all those who love to drink bubble tea.

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Christophe Demouche
Review:
We ordered:
Taro Pearl Green Milk Tea
Red Beans Matcha, Very refreshing delicious drink, great customer service, will come back and try another delicious Boba Tea. As a bonus this store is open until 11:30pm when others around are closed.
If you're a bubble tea lover, you should definitely check this out

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: ADITI SAHA
Review:
The most refreshing boba feast you can have in the city @dingteaelizabeth.melb where they use quality, authentic and local ingredients to make the drinks.

What we had:

Berry sparkling drink, this will remind you of all things summer, so relaxing to sip on this even on a cold winter afternoon. The fresh minty taste will really make you feel refreshed. Must try
Aloe Vera honey and lemon drink, the sweet and sourness are so perfectly balanced in this drink. Strongly recommended and it’s very delicious
Brown sugar boba milk, oh my this is by far the best brown sugar boba drink I had in the city, the boba is so soft and melts in my mouth, the warmth of this drink is perfect to make you feel good in this weather. Very yummy and addictive, also it’s not very sweet enough to make you enjoy the flavours.

Also the vibe here is so cool and relaxing, just walk in to their store on Elizabeth street, order your favourite drink or two and enjoy it.

Also the prices are super standard and reasonable and the service is very prompt on a busy weekend.

Guys do checkout @dingteaelizabeth.melb this weekend for a tasty and refreshing boba treat with your friends and family.

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Stephanie Rose
Review:
🍮 Creme Brûlée Brown Sugar Pearl Milk Tea
🍏 Apple Green Fruit Tea, Star Jelly

Ding Tea is a bubble tea brand that believes in the infinite possibility of tea - no matter black tea or milk tea, consistently launching new and refined drinks. They are a big brand, promoting their Taiwanese tea over 5 continents! 🌎

I’m not the biggest expert on bubble tea, only really began drinking them this year and I often go for a Lychee Green Tea. When I saw their Creme Brûlée Milk Tea, I knew I had to try something new. I almost wish I hadn’t because now I’m OBSESSED! It is so perfectly balanced and creamy, with delicious brown sugar pearls and a crispy, blowtorched, caramelised cream top. I’ll be returning frequently for this one. 🔥🔥

I also tried their Apple Green Tea with Star Jelly, which was also really nice and I enjoyed the different texture of the jelly opposed to a regular soft Pearl. I recommend going with 50% less sugar in this flavour.

Staff were very friendly and were happy to help you through their many choices and explain them to you. The venue could have been more refined but that is my only feedback here! Great option for your CBD bubble tea fix.

⭐️ 4.5/5 (Great)

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Sarah Melbs

Name: G TEA Elizabeth
Author: Elina Ramezani
Review: The bubble tea was delightful, but unfortunately, the overall experience was marred by the messy and untidy environment. The bagasse disposal area was right in front of the customers, which wasn’t very pleasant. The place didn’t feel very clean.

Name: New Tea
Author: Marie Le
Review: This place I will go to for a refreshing beverage. They choose the finest and authentic tea. The fruits tea menu are delicious. My favourite is green tea cheese. The cup sealed it makes it leak proof, keeping you clean and on the move. Great service, James is polite and friendly. Store always look nice and clean.

Name: New Tea
Author: Oscar Riches
Review:
Tea is good.
Service is fine not rude. In fact since I've been back service is better.
Selection of new teas to keep interest is also nice.
Taro and sago thick not too sweet.
Tried the soy tea oolong and was pleased.
Best tea in Springvale beats most of the other franchises

Name: New Tea
Author: Victor
Review: Bubble tea store in Springvale. Quite enjoy my bubble tea here. You do pay a premium but tea taste fresh and the pearls are nice and bouncy.

Name: New Tea
Author: Thay
Review: love the service here at New Tea, the staff are friendly and welcoming, this oolong milk tea taste so so so good among all bubble tea shop I’ve tried. 9/10 for this flavor, must try this shop for your next bubble tea list.

Name: New Tea
Author: Lyva Sou
Review: Beautiful experience, i tried the drinks there and it did not disappoint. The creme brulee was phenomenal it was their signature drink. Staff were nice and friendly and were very helpful. The owner is very nice and welcoming as well. Reasonable price for good quality drinks. 10/10 would go again😄

Name: Chatime Pran Central
Address: Pran Central Shopping Centre, Shop 37/325 Chapel St, Prahran
Author: Meg O
Review: Always greeted with a smile from Cynthia who is the owner. I don’t live close by so only go every few weeks when I’m in the area but Cynthia always remembers my order and makes a perfect frozen mango half sugar tea for me. Wish I lived closer! Thanks Cynthia!

Name: Chatime Pran Central
Address: Pran Central Shopping Centre, Shop 37/325 Chapel St, Prahran
Author: Quang Le
Review: Nice and convenient place to get milk tea. Good service.

Name: Chatime Pran Central
Address: Pran Central Shopping Centre, Shop 37/325 Chapel St, Prahran
Author: Brandon C
Review: The atmosphere and staff were clean and great. I found my ‘watermelon’ frozen (ice-blended) drink taste like a cough syrup mixture- nothing bout the recipe taste like watermelon (not fresh, just syrupy stuff). Safer option would be the lychee frozen. It’s a shame their recipes are mid.

Name: Chatime Pran Central
Address: Pran Central Shopping Centre, Shop 37/325 Chapel St, Prahran
Author: Nghi Hà
Review:
Cha Time is the worst milk tea in the world. The sweetness in milk tea taste like the chemical flavors  from the toppings. Tea and powdered milk are clearly separated in my cup. The tea flavour is not intense and bland. Pearls are not soft, hard to chew
Never comeback.

Name: Chatime Pran Central
Address: Pran Central Shopping Centre, Shop 37/325 Chapel St, Prahran
Author: Kilisitina Sisifa
Review:
Check Out this Watering Hole! Quenches Thirst, Either Hot or Cold.
*service with a smile
*take time to explain menu choices
*spotlessly clean
*ambience- lovely
*upbeat music/uplifting for a young at heart Senior Citizen
Note: If you like your drinks hot, extra hot tell them.
(You can tell I like my drinks really hot 😁.
I commend Cynthia highly for putting her heart and soul into Chatime ❤👌💯

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: 樱木花
Review:
Chanced upon this bubble tea outlet.
Ordered my favourite oolong lychee - not many bubble tea have this flavour.
And they put real bits of lychee in your drink. Yum!!!
Was here on a tues midday and not too busy. Drink was ready fast and taste nice.

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Elly Brown
Review: Had milk teas from here and compared to other brands I'd have to give it one star for the quality and taste. Milk tea has no milk just sugar and water not milky consistency like proper milk teas.

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Mick Kay
Review: Angela was awesome , works her backside off and still smiles after a long day and produces the goods !! Bravo Angela , she could work in any field of hospitality .

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Shazia Hakimi
Review:
Very bad customer service. Gets the drink wrong but don’t want to change it.
I called 3 times no one picked up.
I guys called me over 8 hours later now am I supposed to still have the drink.
Plus we changed the topics the lady said yes that’s fine and added the other toppings.
She doesn’t usually work there and got it wrong. We had to repeat the order 3 times but she still got it wrong

Name: Mr panda bubble tea casey central
Address: Shop Fk06/400 Cranbourne Rd, Narre Warren South
Author: Fiona Lim
Review: We purchased two cups of bubble tea today around 3:30pm. My daughter accidentally dropped her bubble cup onto the floor and it spilt. My daughter went back to your store to seek for help for the mess that she had created. The young lady who served us prior handled the situation calmly and well, she pulled out the chairs to barricade the mess, told us she could clean it up for us, along with her colleague. And out of good will, she even made my daughter a replacement cup of bubble tea. I can't thank her more for being so nice.

Name: CoCo Bubble Tea（Glen Waverley）
Author: hxyyy Y
Review:
I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the service I received at your establishment on 07/09/2024. My recent experience was marked by significant issues that I believe warrant your immediate attention.

I ordered a hot bubble tea, clearly stating my preference for it to be served hot. During the order, the staff asked if I wanted ice and sugar, to which I responded affirmatively. Unfortunately, my order was mistakenly prepared as a cold drink. When I brought this mistake to the attention of the staff, they were dismissive and rude, insisting that my request for ice meant the drink should be cold.

The situation escalated when the staff, displaying unprofessional behavior, threw our items on the table and forced us to pick them up. To my dismay, they also told us not to return to the store and to complaint how ever I want, yet they refused to provide their names or wear name tags, which is a basic expectation in customer service.

This level of service is unacceptable and does not reflect the standards one would expect from a reputable establishment. I am requesting that you address this issue and ensure that such incidents do not recur in the future. Additionally, I would appreciate a formal apology for the treatment I received and for the inconvenience caused.

Name: CoCo Bubble Tea（Glen Waverley）
Author: 张曦文
Review:
I've been trying every drink on the menu for a year now and I love it. My friends and family were fascinated.

I have never had a problem with their service and usually take my order very quickly. Highly recommend!!

Name: CoCo Bubble Tea（Glen Waverley）
Author: Jun Teh
Review: All the milk tea store are so crowded. In the end I chose Coco with the least crowd, but there’s also 7 people in front of me. The drinks are good, always a fan of coco, just that the waiting time is a little long.

Name: CoCo Bubble Tea（Glen Waverley）
Author: Mandie L.
Review:
I've been here a few times and find both their milky and fruity range really nice!!! When my friends and I visit The Glen/Kingsway, CoCo (and Sharetea) is our first choice when it comes to bubble tea.

My sister doesn't usually like bubble tea, but CoCo offers some bubble-tea-hater friendly drink options. She really enjoyed here orange yakult drink.

Name: CoCo Bubble Tea（Glen Waverley）
Author: Alan Bu
Review: We have tried nearly all shops at Glen Waverley and we consider this to be the best. There are seating area at the back, middle counter and front entrance area. Service is reasonably above average. Drinks are consistently good, albeit there are a few situations where the fresh taro was not fully cooked properly. The sales assistant are quick with making the dreams. Overall great for the drinks, above average for service.

Name: The Alley LuJiaoXiang
Author: BlingBling
Review:
I do not recommend anyone ever go here.

I ordered a warm taro milk tea without pearls.

The staff gave me a cold one with Pearls and then tried to convince me to take it, I declined.

After "fixing" the issue I have come home to find that they have pretty much just scooped out some of the pearls.

After pouring it out in a mug to warm it up in the microwave I've found multiple pearls.

Pretty inconsiderate and not acceptable at all for $9.

Name: The Alley LuJiaoXiang
Author: Rodina S. Abenoja
Review:
We just wanted to try their milk teas since we often walk past this place and the facade is really catchy with all the animé decals. We finally got a chance and ordered (my usual choice) Brown Sugar Milk Tea, and a regular Pearl Milk Tea for my husband (they have different names for these drinks though). The presentation's really nice and for a second we thought it's good that we gave this place a try, until we had a sip and instantly regretted it. Sorry,  but I believe reviews have to be brutally honest so the management will hear us out and do something to improve their products. The milk teas tasted like a cold beverage that's been left out overnight in room temp so the ice has all melted and now it's just mocha-colored water with equally tasteless bobas. We've tried so many milk teas before and this by far is the worst, really sorry. Reading the previous reviews sharing similar experiences, I think the management doesn't even care that customers are not satisfied with their products? I don't know. And to think their milk teas are priced at $7.30 for a regular cup (for this size at Coco or Gotcha, you only pay between 5.90 to 6.50). Definitely not going back. Hope they find a way to improve.

We didn't want to waste food (cos these cost us $14.60), so we tried our best to finish it all up (see photo), but we couldn't. Sometimes trying out new stuff isn't worth it.

Name: The Alley LuJiaoXiang
Author: Vyvian
Review: Nice friendly staff, one place that is not in a terrible hurry to close their doors straight at 9pm (closing time). Asked for less ice and less sugar in my milk tea, but still nice and tasty. Liked how the milk tea come with 3 different toppings, good for when you don’t know which toppings to choose, and you want it all at the same time.

Name: The Alley LuJiaoXiang
Author: Victor
Review:
My go to place for rice yoghurt. Perfectly sweetened and super refreshing. The flavours are distinct, creamy and it just makes you go mmmmm mmmmm. Bubble tea here is a hit and miss but the pearls are normally served warm.

Addit to prior review:
First time in a bubble tea place where classical music was playing.  First movement moonlight sonata was blasting onto the streets and I appreciated it immensely!!

Name: The Alley LuJiaoXiang
Author: Nikola Milošela
Review:
Not bad usually but they messed up my order. I asked for a hot Boba and they gave me a boba that was mostly ice. When I told this, they apologised but didn't offer to make it again.

The main problem is that it's expensive and it cost me $10 for that Boba which is why messing up is way worse.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nina Genuino
Review: We regularly go here for their milk tea. It’s our first time to try their Bahn mi and it’s the best!! Better than Lily’s! and better than the ones we’ve had in Vietnam. The bread was crispy on the outside but light and fluffy on the inside and the crispy pork was sooo crunchy 🤯 I regret sharing because it’s soooo good 🤤🤤🤤

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Nicole
Review:
Very friendly service, I was greeted as soon as I walked in the store. Nice decor and a clean store if you’re wanting to dine in.
I had a drink chosen based on the menu attached to the shop front window but discovered heaps more options once inside the store and promptly changed my mind 😆 Was then blown away to discover my Mango Milk Tea had actual mango in it… totally thought it would just  be a flavouring syrup.

UPDATE: Have now tried their Ba Minh 🤤 Me, being the fussy features that I am, meant I wanted mine without salad etc. but I somehow managed to still get a sauce… thankfully it was DELICIOUS! Hands down, it’s up there with one of the best I’ve had. Crispy roll, succulent pork and oh so tasty.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: Andrew Carlson
Review: I came here for lunch and had their rice paper rolls. 1 prawn and 1 chicken. OMG so delicious and fresh. Very flavourful with fresh herbs and salad. Their spicy / soy dipping sauce with so good. And their friendly delightful service made my day. Also affordable too. This place is a little gem. Thank you.

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: crisy
Review: i love this place! i always come after work and it’s one of the only boba places open. such amazing couple running the shop and always working hard! WONDERFUL CUSTOMER SERVICE! definitely needs more recognition! i absolutely love the drinks, visit if you love more traditional styled bubble tea! fierce competition at werribee but this place always continues to make amazing boba. DEFINITELY RECOMMEND!!

Name: Topepop Tea
Author: hallemah assaad
Review: Best bubble tea store in Werribee, most polite, friendly owners and delicious bubble tea no matter what you choose.

Name: Mr.Panda tea Carlton
Author: Merrily L
Review: Ordered on Uber eats pineapple green tea with coconut jelly & white pearls + lemon black tea with mango jelly , one of the most refreshing fruit teas I had in Melbourne (I had a lot) even had pineapple pieces in my pineapple tea . Was soooo yum !

Name: Mr.Panda tea Carlton
Author: Kimberly Maxwell
Review: A regular place for me! All of the bubble tea flavours you would expect with reasonable pricing. One of my favourite toppings is the Oreo or pudding. I also tried a matcha bubble waffle and it was perfectly chewy and crisp.

Name: Mr.Panda tea Carlton
Author: Roselyn Ye
Review: Came here out of a bubble tea craving - Matcha had a nice taste and the customer service was good. Prices are reasonable too! Safe to say I will be back again 😊😊

Name: Mr.Panda tea Carlton
Author: Gerelt-Od Munkhbat
Review: I went there with my kids and We had an awful experience. We did not clearly know about the products so everytime we asked for clarification, the lady was really hesitating to serve and showing lot of unappropiate face expressions. I would say, service is the worst in Melbourne

Name: Mr.Panda tea Carlton
Author: heize
Review: Taro bubble tea is really good I've tried taro bubble tea from many places, but it was the best The staff are kind and above all very clean. They make drinks very carefully It's the most delicious bubble tea place in Melbourne i love this place

Name: Top Tea
Author: Thanh Hảo Lê
Review:
While it wasn't bad, it wasn't quite the bubble tea revelation I was hoping for. They have a huge selection of flavours and toppings, which is definitely a plus. I went for a classic brown sugar milk tea with tapioca pearls, and the tea itself was good - strong and flavourful. The pearls were a bit on the chewier side than I like, but that's a personal preference.

One thing that surprised me was the atmosphere. The place was clean and bright, but it felt more like a grab-and-go coffee shop than a place to relax and enjoy a drink. The music was loud, and the seating was a bit cramped.

Overall, Top Tea is a decent option for a quick bubble tea fix. If you're looking for a place to catch up with friends and chat, there might be better options out there.

Name: Top Tea
Author: Czarina Buenaventura
Review: Great Brulee milk tea, as well as the hand-peeled pomelo but the price for the latter is quite exorbitant. I love the chewiness of the pearl and taste of their drinks. Store is always crowded but the staff moves quickly to get the orders out. The paper bag for two drinks or more is appreciated so I can lug the drinks back safely to my hotel.

Name: Top Tea
Author: Ζ L
Review: I got the creme brulee trea with pearls. It was an okay bubble tea. But, for a 30 minute wait, it does not seem worth it.

Name: Top Tea
Author: Trang Nguyen
Review:
Popular tea shop. Got queues most of the time so you need to wait for like 15-20 mins to order and to get your drinks.
Tried brulee milk tea with extra cheese foam. It was just so so, nothing special. The milk tea is no different to homemade milktea. Easily find better milktea somewhere else. Havent tried their fruit teas yet, hope they are better.

Name: Top Tea
Author: Brian Duy Nguyen
Review: I recently visited Top Tea Melbourne and had a fantastic experience. The tea selection was extensive and the staff were knowledgeable and passionate about tea. The atmosphere was cozy and inviting, and the decor was beautiful. I ordered a pot of their signature blend and it was absolutely delicious. The tea was brewed to perfection and served in beautiful teaware. I also tried some of their desserts and they were heavenly - the perfect complement to the tea. Overall, I highly recommend Top Tea Melbourne to anyone looking for a high-quality tea experience. I can't wait to visit again and try more of their blends!

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Emily Le
Review:
Overall amazing experience here. Pearls are made fresh every 2-3hrs cause apparently they do it in small batches at a time so pearls always fresh. Good mixing with sugar level and ice that is not too sweet but also not too bland

P/s: the tall guy with glasses is cute and nice, plus he has a puppy that he brings to work sometimes and so so so so so cuteeeeee

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: M O R M E N
Review: It was pretty delicious. The Dirtea was like a brown sugar bubble milk tea but with creamy add-ons. The super Dirtea is the same but without fresh milk.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Cairo K
Review: Hands down the best TEASER in MELBOURNE! From all the drinks down to the taste 🥰🥰 I order every week atleast, the drinks are always the most tastiest at this store , I usuallly order 1 LT Fresh fruit tea and Lemon Bomber, but recently have got into Punched Lemon Ice Tea (Strawberry) ! I love that they are open late as well! Thanks so much! ❤️❤️❤️

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Alexander Pomnikow
Review: Delicious bubble tea right in southbank. Lively staff, great tasting bubble tea and awesome trading hours. Not much salad I could say about this place. Used to have a gaming centre, but how turned into an Asian shop. Nice variety of stuff for sale there.

Name: Teaser Southbank Store
Author: Matt
Review: Share a space with a gaming lounge and a snack shop.  Drinks were not too bad.

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Lakesha James
Review:
They forgot my cream cheese foam on two different occassions and it's definitely full sweetness when I asked for half.

What is the point in customisability if they keep getting it wrong. I've only been there twice and it's been a mess up every time. Wasted my money and my friend was driving me, by the time we got home and realised my order was messed up it was too late to go back.

I may avoid them in the future.

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Danielle CLARKE
Review: My daughter and I went exploring around the Bentleigh Shopping Strip and saw the sign for Palgong Tea. We got excited when we saw at the bottom of the street board say Korea's finest bubble tea. I ordered the Banana flavoured tea. It was yummy 😋 I would definitely recommend visiting if you are in the area. Great staff, very friendly and you will leave smiling 😃

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Kenneth Lee
Review:
🧋🧋🧋🧋🧋REFRESHING AND DELICIOUS

We ordered the lychee black tea with pearls and it really hit the spot!! The staff were extremely friendly and accomodating and the setting of the cafe was clean, modern and inviting.

Highly recommend visiting this gem in Bentleigh especially when bubble tea stores are scarce in the area - can’t wait to revisit!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Sarah Melbs
Review:
@palgongtea.australia 📍 With 200 stores worldwide I can’t believe I didn’t know this was in melbourne 😄🇰🇷🧋This South Korean BBT chain is the first of its kind to land here 🇰🇷🇦🇺 highly recommend the k- classics including the banana milk tea😄🍌 as well as the refreshing Korean grape soda ade🍇!!

the menu is v reasonably priced imho starting from $4.90+ 🤯 Highly recommend if you’re keen to try a Korean style bubble tea! 🇰🇷🧋🫰🏻They were so busy with locals! The line was insane. there’s seating out the back too!

Name: Palgong Tea Australia
Author: Yu Kim
Review: Best tea place in town!! I’ve been there a couple of times with my friends and family. The staffs were friendly and really helpful. They make sure that everyone feels comfortable and answer all the questions I asked for the menu. You must try the Green grape Ade!! It is refreshing and freezy🤍💚🤍💚 Also, my best drink from Palgong tea is YOGURT SMOOTHIE!! Absolute favourite❤️

Name: Sharetea Forest Hill
Address: Forest Hill Shopping Centre, Food Court, Level 1, SHOP F010/270 Canterbury Rd, Forest Hill
Author: Saxa
Review:
Love the frozen chocolate and like the fact that they dont miss asking if its normal ice / sugar.  Also tried the frozen watermelon but did not taste any natural watermelon, it was like all powder only and flavoring so it wasnt worth the price. With normal sugar it was very very sweet.

The variety of pearls offered is great but they only add a very small portion.

Service was quick and since this is located in the foodcourt , there is a good seating area.

Name: Sharetea Forest Hill
Address: Forest Hill Shopping Centre, Food Court, Level 1, SHOP F010/270 Canterbury Rd, Forest Hill
Author: Kee Chua
Review: First time tried bubble tea. Drink perfectly made and tea tasted great. The lady that served me was very friendly and polite. Her recommendation of drinks is unquestionable. Happy with their service too! Will definitely come back again!

Name: Sharetea Forest Hill
Address: Forest Hill Shopping Centre, Food Court, Level 1, SHOP F010/270 Canterbury Rd, Forest Hill
Author: XinXin
Review: Love the drinks here, so many choices and good customer service. Ordered Mango Green Tea with Mango Jelly, the drink taste delicious. Will definitely come back again.

Name: Sharetea Forest Hill
Address: Forest Hill Shopping Centre, Food Court, Level 1, SHOP F010/270 Canterbury Rd, Forest Hill
Author: Ronald Young
Review: The old woman at the counter was very rude to me and my family. After when I went to collect my drinks. I asked VERY nicely about the milk tea plushie that was being advertised and was a given a VERY inappropriate attitude! This made the overall experience very uncomfortable and awkward. I wish for this woman to be TERMINATED or MAKE HER GO THROUGH MORE TRAINING ABOUT TREATING CUSTOMERS CORRECTLY. I have never seen such ATTITUDE in my years of reviewing establishments. I paid over $30 worth of Bubble Tea and was treated this way? This is not the SHARETEA I know. The OLD woman was VERY harsh towards other customers, and should be terminated or fired or sent to a different establishment to reflect on her traits and change those values and hope that she may be able to represent the traits of a good sharetea employee.

Name: Sharetea Forest Hill
Address: Forest Hill Shopping Centre, Food Court, Level 1, SHOP F010/270 Canterbury Rd, Forest Hill
Author: Ruth Wong
Review: My favourite bubble tea store! The staff here are so friendly and happy to accomodate customers’ requests! The consistency is really good compared to the other stores. Their store is also super clean.

Name: Gong cha State Library
Author: Jessica NGUYEN
Review: Very bad customer service! The male cashier I encountered today was very rude. I just wanted a cup of milk tea without ice because I was going to drink it after a few hours, he shouted at me "NO CHANGE NO CHANGE". I'm not asking for a free drink, I might even be willing to pay extra (although that's a free choice for custom your cup). I changed to another type then the female employee mistakenly made it with ice and she tried to remove all the ice and add more tea. I received a cup that was as bland as water. No second time

Name: Gong cha State Library
Author: Olga O
Review: Bubble tea is another obsession I picked up throughout my time in Melbourne. Gong Cha has been our go to place. There are many other bubble tea place in town. But Gong Cha is the most consistent one which delivers delicious beverages day in and day out. My favourite is still the classic pearl milk tea. I also like to add aloe vera or coconut jelly. We go there almost every week. I used to love boost, but now Gong Cha has taken its place.

Name: Gong cha State Library
Author: Piggy Eatalot
Review: 2.5 Star ⭐️ I used to like Gong Cha but I wondered if they have changed the formula to the taro milk tea in the last 6 months?  They used to use more fresh taro and I just find that this time it tasted a bit fake and the colour is more purple compared to last time I drank it... then again I did drink it in another store...  Thank goodness when I asked for a little sweet they really did give me just a little sweet, so it’s just the right sweetness.  I must try another Gong cha outlet to compare cos they used to make such good taro milk tea!

Name: Gong cha State Library
Author: Kim Vu
Review:
Very bad customer service and bad drink!
The male cashier's attitude was very unpleasant. Unprofessional and dirty female bartender. The drink is not like gongcha, the glass doesn't close.
I'm not here for a free drink!!!!!!

Name: Gong cha State Library
Author: Terry Reidy
Review: Good reliable gong cha bubble tea. Just like all their stores you will get exactly what you ordered. Consistent taste good quality and efficient service. This particular culture seems a little bit quieter than the others in the CBD so it's a good option if you're in a rush.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Sallie Morrison
Review: A special treat that has turned into a weekly outing for my son and I. The staff are amazing and know my order each time. Tea tastes great and I can’t wait for summer to have the frozen teas.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Kevin Fear
Review: Best bubble tea I ever had. affordable, taste good, customer service was lovely, and the consistency of quality it shows they care about the product. Highly recommend. Beats franchise bubble tea. I had strawberry with green tea and herbal jelly. I just wish they had a ward system buying their bubble tea. Had plenty selection there as well.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Katrina Blinoff
Review: I suppose I’m a regular here!! They remember my order and it’s such a cute shop, always feel comfortable going there. Tasty and close place to my house! Recommend it.

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Anna K
Review:
Yummy taro milk tea, it was so tasty that I forgot to make a photo earlier 😋
Thank you!

Name: Tea Break
Address: Shop 9C, The Village Dandenong, Dandenong South
Author: Jess Y
Review: Loved the bubble tea here. Made just right and friendly staffs. Thank you Tea Break. I will be back 😊

Name: Sharetea Emporium
Address: Emporium Shopping Centre, Shop 24, Level 3/287 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Jonathan Lee
Review:
I visited this shop on Tuesday, and after drinking a taro milk tea, I experienced an upset stomach that lasted for over six hours.

The only other thing I had eaten that day was brunch at a fine dining restaurant, several hours earlier, so I’m pretty sure the bubble tea may have been the cause. The tapioca pearls were a bit firm, but at the time, I didn’t think much of it.

Additionally, the service could have been better. The staff member who took my order was quite unclear, and when I said “sorry” twice, because I couldn’t understand her, she smirked instead of clarifying. Her English was a bit hard to follow, and she mumbled, which made communication difficult. I was trying to be polite, but her response felt unprofessional.

Name: Sharetea Emporium
Address: Emporium Shopping Centre, Shop 24, Level 3/287 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Leonie Westerhof
Review: The staff member made us pay more money even though it clearly said the price, when we complained the worker told us it was just a set charge for there only being 2 workers. When we drank the bubble tea it wasn’t too bad but it was 80% ice. For the amount of money we payed I’m not satisfied.

Name: Sharetea Emporium
Address: Emporium Shopping Centre, Shop 24, Level 3/287 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Isabelle Puyat
Review: Staff are rude and only interested in chatting to each other. I had to repeat my order multiple times because she kept talking in her language to the other staff. They pre put pearls in the cups so all the pearls were clumped together …. And it’s just sitting exposed on the shelf. Gross if there’s dust collecting inside.

Name: Sharetea Emporium
Address: Emporium Shopping Centre, Shop 24, Level 3/287 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: me
Review: Although I had asked for regular ice they gave me a drink that was just 80% ice and 20% drink. Not happy with the service here, I love Sharetea but not this one particular shop.

Name: Sharetea Emporium
Address: Emporium Shopping Centre, Shop 24, Level 3/287 Lonsdale St, Melbourne
Author: Bibek Adhikari
Review:
1st time trying the thing, it was a good experience, at least it got some taste on the drink...
The location of the shops is in a good and convenient place, people walking in footpath have easy access to the shop....
Customer service was also good and service was also fast...
Will be back to try some more of the drink...

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Sarah
Review: Tried the teas for the first time today and they were all excellent. Perfect ratios of sugar, ice and flavour. We ordered the honeydew, Thai red, lychee and signature. Can't wait to try more flavours next visit.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Kim Chu
Review: Oolong Milk Tea with pearls is my go-to! Usually have the one with ice, but got a hot one today which is great too! Love it! Also very friendly staff!

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Amanda B
Review: Ordered a few teas via delivery expecting an average experience, but was surprisingly blown away. Easily some of the best, if not THE best, teas I’ve ever had. The taro tea specifically, it’s my favourite tea but can be really hit or miss depending on how the place makes it - the one from here was perfectly made, exceptionally smooth and creamy with the right amount of flavour. The fruit teas are made with a really lovely syrup that has a taste unlike other tea places. Highly recommend, this will be my new regular tea place.

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Maria M Dimitrov
Review: Definitely one of my favourite bubble tea stores, I even bought there cup and get 50 cents off every time I use that cup. Good price range as other places like to up there prices which end up being too expensive. Good variety of flavours, but wish they could add kiwifruit fruit tea as not many bubble tea places do that flavour. Overall, amazing store with friendly staff :)

Name: Pearl Tea Epping
Author: Vanessa Wong-Lee
Review: A bubble tea store with the most laid out display of toppings. 4 sizes to pick from and also a unique can style for an additional cost. Honeu milk tea taro pudding and pearls. The tea is aromatic with hints of honey. The pearls are so soft and chewy whilst the taro pudding has a strong flavour, perfect to match with the drink.

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Ines Fernandes
Review:
Absolutely recommend!

The decoration of this place is just gorgeous and it is probably one of the most instagramable bubble tea places I have been. Super soft tones of salmon and white, with some gold touches and the vibe is just so enjoyable that you will want to sit here for hours!

I actually have visited this place 5 times (in 2 months!) and have to say that I will keep coming back. Their acai bowls are AMAZING in terms of size, taste, consistency and toppings! Price is also very reasonable and fair - it comes in a small or regular size.
They now have another option of pistachio soft serve and although I haven't tried it yet, I have to make sure I do next time.

The bubble tea menu they have is also incredible in terms of options as expected and they also have soy milk available as a diary-free option.

There are also other items on the menu such as mochi waffle that looks like a normal waffle but actually has a mochi consistency! How cool. There's 3 different flavours and they are quite popular.

The staff was lovely and the place/atmosphere is just bliss.
Would 100% come back!

…
[Follow my adventures on instagram @crushinglimits]

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Jen
Review:
✨BBT & AÇAI✨

Head to Tea Royale to get their açai and bbt because you won’t regret it! Super refreshing and so many options to choose from! Loved the açai and drinks were so tasty! 🤤

Don’t forget to try their mochi waffles because these are AMAZING! 🤩🤩

Featured:
🧋 royal milk tea
💜 taro milk tea
🥭 mango grape oolong tea
🍓 strawberry yakult
🫐 açai w/ pb
🧇 Biscoff mochi waffle

Thank you for the invite. 💌

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Janelle
Review:
Finally trying them after hearing that it‘s one of the most popular bubbletea in town🥸 I was actually surprised that they have soooo many different tea/drinks options to choose from😲 Here’s what we‘ve got✨

🍇Green grape Yakult
🍇Green grape Smoothie
🧋Phoenix Pearl Bubbletea
🥤Pistachio Shake
🍵Peach Spring Tea
🧇Mochi Waffle
🧇Biscoff Mochi Waffle

The Latest additions to the menu are the Green Grape series❇️ They were so refreshing and there were actually some big green grapes inside the drink🤤 The Pistachio Shake also got me! My first time seeing/trying this and I love it, if you love a creamy milk shake and/or love pistachio like me, definitely try it✨

Have to mention their mochi waffles as well, cause they are actually chewy!! And it’s $4.5 only what the😲 To be the biscoff mochi waffle wasn‘t that strong in biscoff, it was rather mild, so I like the original mochi waffle more, enjoyed the taste of their batter🫶🏻

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Davy S
Review:
I love bubble tea and this place offer a variety and more!
My fav is Taro smoothie with coconut jelly. Soo good!
Their Jasmine and black pearl also good.
They currently have the grapes + yakult combo which is delicious too
Happy sippimg
O and the prize is reasonable also.

Name: Tea Royale
Author: Noland Hoang
Review: Pistachio shake not so good but cost 10$ , everytime i purchase drinks here its a disappointment hurt my stomach so bad probably because high in fat. Their strawberry yakult tasted really bad. but cant get enough of their mochi waffle , best dessert to munch on
